```{r}
      p4 <- dotplot(do_result, showCategory = min(20, nrow(as.data.frame(do_result)))) +
        ggtitle(sprintf("%s Disease Ontology Enrichment", direction))
      ggsave(file.path(output_dir, sprintf("%s_DO_dotplot.png", direction)),
             p4, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    }
    
    cat(sprintf("  DO: 发现 %d 个相关疾病\n", nrow(as.data.frame(do_result))))
  }
  
  # 4. 基因集富集分析（MSigDB）
  cat("进行MSigDB基因集富集分析...\n")
  
  # Hallmark基因集
  hallmark_gs <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "H")
  hallmark_list <- split(hallmark_gs$gene_symbol, hallmark_gs$gs_name)
  
  hallmark_result <- tryCatch({
    enricher(gene = genes,
             TERM2GENE = hallmark_gs[, c("gs_name", "gene_symbol")],
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
             qvalueCutoff = 0.1)
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
  
  if (!is.null(hallmark_result) && nrow(as.data.frame(hallmark_result)) > 0) {
    results$Hallmark <- hallmark_result
    
    # 保存结果
    write.csv(as.data.frame(hallmark_result), 
              file.path(output_dir, sprintf("%s_Hallmark.csv", direction)),
              row.names = FALSE)
    
    cat(sprintf("  Hallmark: 发现 %d 个富集基因集\n", nrow(as.data.frame(hallmark_result))))
  }
  
  return(results)
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：生成细胞类型特定报告
# =============================================================================

generate_celltype_report <- function(de_results, enrich_results, celltype_name, output_dir) {
  cat("\n生成综合报告...\n")
  
  # 创建HTML报告
  report_file <- file.path(output_dir, "enrichment_report.html")
  
  html_content <- sprintf('
    <html>
    <head>
      <title>%s Enrichment Analysis Report</title>
      <style>
        body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; margin: 20px; }
        h1 { color: #333; }
        h2 { color: #666; }
        table { border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%%; }
        th, td { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; text-align: left; }
        th { background-color: #f2f2f2; }
      </style>
    </head>
    <body>
      <h1>%s - 富集分析报告</h1>
      <h2>差异表达统计</h2>
      <p>总差异基因数: %d</p>
      <p>显著差异基因数 (p.adj < 0.05, |log2FC| > 0.5): %d</p>
    </body>
    </html>
  ', celltype_name, celltype_name, 
     nrow(de_results),
     nrow(filter(de_results, p_val_adj < 0.05, abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.5)))
  
  writeLines(html_content, report_file)
  
  # 生成综合热图（如果有富集结果）
  if (length(enrich_results) > 0) {
    create_summary_heatmap(enrich_results, celltype_name, output_dir)
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：创建综合热图
# =============================================================================

create_summary_heatmap <- function(enrich_results, celltype_name, output_dir) {
  # 收集所有富集分析的top terms
  all_terms <- data.frame()
  
  for (direction in names(enrich_results)) {
    for (analysis in names(enrich_results[[direction]])) {
      result <- enrich_results[[direction]][[analysis]]
      if (!is.null(result)) {
        df <- as.data.frame(result)
        if (nrow(df) > 0) {
          top_terms <- head(df, 5)
          top_terms$Direction <- direction
          top_terms$Analysis <- analysis
          top_terms$neg_log_p <- -log10(top_terms$p.adjust + 1e-10)
          all_terms <- rbind(all_terms, top_terms[, c("Description", "neg_log_p", "Direction", "Analysis")])
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (nrow(all_terms) > 0) {
    # 创建热图矩阵
    heatmap_data <- all_terms %>%
      unite("Term", Description, Analysis, sep = " - ") %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Direction, values_from = neg_log_p, values_fill = 0)
    
    if (ncol(heatmap_data) > 1) {
      matrix_data <- as.matrix(heatmap_data[, -1])
      rownames(matrix_data) <- heatmap_data$Term
      
      # 生成热图
      pdf(file.path(output_dir, "enrichment_summary_heatmap.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
      pheatmap(matrix_data,
               color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "red"))(100),
               cluster_rows = TRUE,
               cluster_cols = FALSE,
               main = sprintf("%s - Enrichment Summary", celltype_name),
               fontsize_row = 8)
      dev.off()
    }
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：执行分析
# =============================================================================

# 存储所有细胞类型的结果
all_celltype_results <- list()

# 对每个细胞类型进行分析
for (ct in cell_types) {
  # 提取该细胞类型的差异表达结果
  ct_de <- combined_de %>%
    filter(cell_type == ct)
  
  if (nrow(ct_de) > 0) {
    ct_results <- perform_celltype_enrichment(ct_de, ct, output_dir)
    all_celltype_results[[ct]] <- ct_results
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤7：生成跨细胞类型比较
# =============================================================================
cat("\n========== 生成跨细胞类型比较 ==========\n")

# 收集所有细胞类型的关键富集terms
comparison_data <- data.frame()

for (ct in names(all_celltype_results)) {
  ct_results <- all_celltype_results[[ct]]
  
  for (direction in names(ct_results)) {
    for (analysis in names(ct_results[[direction]])) {
      result <- ct_results[[direction]][[analysis]]
      if (!is.null(result)) {
        df <- as.data.frame(result)
        if (nrow(df) > 0) {
          top_term <- df[1, ]  # 取最显著的term
          comparison_data <- rbind(comparison_data, data.frame(
            CellType = ct,
            Direction = direction,
            Analysis = analysis,
            TopTerm = top_term$Description,
            P_adjust = top_term$p.adjust,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          ))
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# 修复版：α-synuclein相关通路特别分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n========== α-synuclein相关通路分析 ==========\n")

# 定义α-synuclein相关的关键通路
synuclein_pathways <- c(
  "Parkinson", "dopaminergic", "synapse", "autophagy", "lysosome",
  "mitochondr", "oxidative", "protein folding", "ubiquitin", "proteasome",
  "neurodegeneration", "inflammation", "apoptosis", "alpha-synuclein", "synuclein",
  "SNCA", "Lewy", "neuron", "vesicle", "endoplasmic reticulum", "ER stress"
)

# 初始化结果列表而不是数据框
synuclein_related_list <- list()
result_counter <- 1

# 搜索相关通路
for (ct in names(all_celltype_results)) {
  ct_results <- all_celltype_results[[ct]]
  
  for (direction in names(ct_results)) {
    for (analysis in names(ct_results[[direction]])) {
      result <- ct_results[[direction]][[analysis]]
      if (!is.null(result)) {
        df <- as.data.frame(result)
        
        # 确保Description列存在
        if ("Description" %in% colnames(df)) {
          # 搜索包含关键词的通路
          for (keyword in synuclein_pathways) {
            matching_rows <- grepl(keyword, df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
            
            if (any(matching_rows)) {
              matching <- df[matching_rows, ]
              
              # 标准化数据框结构，只保留关键列
              standardized_df <- data.frame(
                CellType = ct,
                Direction = direction,
                Analysis = analysis,
                Keyword = keyword,
                Description = matching$Description,
                p.adjust = if("p.adjust" %in% colnames(matching)) matching$p.adjust else matching$pvalue,
                GeneRatio = if("GeneRatio" %in% colnames(matching)) matching$GeneRatio else NA,
                Count = if("Count" %in% colnames(matching)) matching$Count else NA,
                stringsAsFactors = FALSE
              )
              
              # 添加到列表
              synuclein_related_list[[result_counter]] <- standardized_df
              result_counter <- result_counter + 1
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

# 合并所有结果
if (length(synuclein_related_list) > 0) {
  synuclein_related <- do.call(rbind, synuclein_related_list)
  
  # 去重（同一个term可能匹配多个关键词）
  synuclein_related <- synuclein_related %>%
    distinct(CellType, Direction, Analysis, Description, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    arrange(p.adjust)
  
  # 保存结果
  write.csv(synuclein_related, 
            file.path(output_dir, "synuclein_related_pathways.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat(sprintf("发现 %d 个α-synuclein相关通路\n", nrow(synuclein_related)))
  
  # 显示前20个最显著的
  cat("\n前20个最显著的α-synuclein相关通路:\n")
  print(head(synuclein_related[, c("CellType", "Direction", "Description", "p.adjust")], 20))
  
  # 生成可视化
  if (nrow(synuclein_related) > 0) {
    # 1. 按细胞类型统计
    celltype_summary <- synuclein_related %>%
      group_by(CellType, Direction) %>%
      summarise(
        n_pathways = n(),
        min_p = min(p.adjust),
        .groups = 'drop'
      )
    
    cat("\n各细胞类型的α-synuclein相关通路数量:\n")
    print(celltype_summary)
    
    # 2. 创建热图显示每个细胞类型的通路富集程度
    heatmap_data <- synuclein_related %>%
      group_by(CellType, Keyword) %>%
      summarise(
        n_hits = n(),
        min_p = min(p.adjust),
        .groups = 'drop'
      ) %>%
      mutate(score = -log10(min_p + 1e-10)) %>%
      pivot_wider(
        names_from = Keyword,
        values_from = score,
        values_fill = 0
      )
    
    if (ncol(heatmap_data) > 1) {
      # 转换为矩阵
      heatmap_matrix <- as.matrix(heatmap_data[, -1])
      rownames(heatmap_matrix) <- heatmap_data$CellType
      
      # 生成热图
      pdf(file.path(output_dir, "synuclein_pathways_heatmap.pdf"), 
          width = 14, height = 8)
      pheatmap(heatmap_matrix,
               color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "yellow", "orange", "red"))(100),
               cluster_rows = nrow(heatmap_matrix) > 1,
               cluster_cols = ncol(heatmap_matrix) > 1,
               main = "α-Synuclein Related Pathways by Cell Type",
               fontsize = 10,
               angle_col = "45")
      dev.off()
      
      png(file.path(output_dir, "synuclein_pathways_heatmap.png"), 
          width = 14*100, height = 8*100, res = 100)
      pheatmap(heatmap_matrix,
               color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "yellow", "orange", "red"))(100),
               cluster_rows = nrow(heatmap_matrix) > 1,
               cluster_cols = ncol(heatmap_matrix) > 1,
               main = "α-Synuclein Related Pathways by Cell Type",
               fontsize = 10,
               angle_col = "45")
      dev.off()
    }
    
    # 3. 创建通路网络图（显示最显著的通路）
    top_pathways <- head(synuclein_related, 30)
    
    network_plot <- ggplot(top_pathways, aes(x = CellType, y = Description)) +
      geom_point(aes(size = -log10(p.adjust + 1e-10), 
                     color = Direction),
                 alpha = 0.7) +
      scale_size_continuous(range = c(3, 10), 
                           name = "-log10(p.adjust)") +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("upregulated" = "red", 
                                   "downregulated" = "blue")) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
            panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
      labs(x = "Cell Type", 
           y = "Pathway",
           title = "Top α-Synuclein Related Pathways")
    
    ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "synuclein_pathways_network.png"),
           network_plot, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
    ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "synuclein_pathways_network.pdf"),
           network_plot, width = 12, height = 10)
  }
  
} else {
  cat("未发现α-synuclein相关通路\n")
  synuclein_related <- data.frame()
}

# =============================================================================
# 生成α-synuclein专题报告
# =============================================================================

generate_synuclein_report <- function(synuclein_data, output_dir) {
  if (nrow(synuclein_data) > 0) {
    # 创建Markdown报告
    report_lines <- c(
      "# α-Synuclein相关通路分析报告",
      "",
      "## 概述",
      sprintf("- 发现 %d 个相关通路", nrow(synuclein_data)),
      sprintf("- 涉及 %d 个细胞类型", length(unique(synuclein_data$CellType))),
      "",
      "## 最显著的通路 (Top 10)",
      ""
    )
    
    top10 <- head(synuclein_data[order(synuclein_data$p.adjust), ], 10)
    for (i in 1:nrow(top10)) {
      report_lines <- c(report_lines,
        sprintf("%d. **%s**", i, top10$Description[i]),
        sprintf("   - 细胞类型: %s", top10$CellType[i]),
        sprintf("   - 方向: %s", top10$Direction[i]),
        sprintf("   - p.adjust: %.2e", top10$p.adjust[i]),
        ""
      )
    }
    
    # 添加细胞类型特异性发现
    report_lines <- c(report_lines,
      "## 细胞类型特异性发现",
      ""
    )
    
    for (ct in unique(synuclein_data$CellType)) {
      ct_data <- synuclein_data[synuclein_data$CellType == ct, ]
      report_lines <- c(report_lines,
        sprintf("### %s", ct),
        sprintf("- 相关通路数: %d", nrow(ct_data)),
        sprintf("- 最显著通路: %s (p=%.2e)", 
                ct_data$Description[1], ct_data$p.adjust[1]),
        ""
      )
    }
    
    # 保存报告
    writeLines(report_lines, 
              file.path(output_dir, "synuclein_analysis_report.md"))
    
    cat("α-synuclein分析报告已生成\n")
  }
}

# 生成报告
generate_synuclein_report(synuclein_related, output_dir)

cat("\nα-synuclein相关通路分析完成！\n")
```
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# WGCNA分析（修改版）：挖掘与PEA处理和细胞状态相关的共表达模块
# 每个图表都由独立的代码块生成
# =============================================================================

# 加载必要的包
# 确保已安装WGCNA及其依赖
# if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
#     install.packages("BiocManager")
# BiocManager::install(c("GO.db", "preprocessCore", "impute"))
# install.packages("WGCNA")

library(WGCNA)
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(pheatmap)

# 允许多线程计算
enableWGCNAThreads()

# 设置工作目录和输出路径
setwd("F:/projectmanfei/final")
input_dir <- "module_score_analysis"
output_dir <- "WGCNA_analysis"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：数据准备
# =============================================================================
cat("=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤1：WGCNA 数据准备 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 加载包含模块评分的Seurat对象
seurat_pure <- readRDS(file.path(input_dir, "seurat_with_module_scores.rds"))

# 筛选目标细胞类型
target_cell_types <- c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
seurat_wgcna <- subset(seurat_pure, refined_celltype %in% target_cell_types)
cat(sprintf("用于WGCNA分析的细胞数: %d\n", ncol(seurat_wgcna)))

# 提取表达矩阵
datExpr0 <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(GetAssayData(seurat_wgcna, slot = "data"))))
cat(sprintf("原始表达矩阵维度: %d 细胞, %d 基因\n", nrow(datExpr0), ncol(datExpr0)))

# 检查缺失值
gsg <- goodSamplesGenes(datExpr0, verbose = 3)
if (!gsg$allOK) {
  datExpr0 <- datExpr0[gsg$goodSamples, gsg$goodGenes]
  cat("移除了有问题的基因/样本\n")
}

# 过滤低表达/低方差的基因
gene_vars <- apply(datExpr0, 2, var)
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_vars, decreasing = TRUE)[1:5000])
datExpr <- datExpr0[, top_genes]
cat(sprintf("过滤后用于WGCNA的基因数: %d\n", ncol(datExpr)))

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：构建表型数据 (Traits) - 修正版
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤2：构建表型数据 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 提取元数据
traitData <- seurat_wgcna@meta.data

# 创建PEA_status向量: 0 = BHI, 1 = PEA
traitData$PEA_status <- ifelse(traitData$group == "PEA", 1, 0)

# 创建Cell_state向量: 0 = Epi_7, 1 = Epi_13, 2 = Tuft_30
traitData$Cell_state <- case_when(
  traitData$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" ~ 0,
  traitData$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" ~ 1,
  traitData$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" ~ 2
)

# 使用 dplyr::select() 来明确指定函数来源，避免冲突
traitData <- traitData %>% 
  dplyr::select(PEA_status, Cell_state)

cat("表型数据构建完成:\n")
print(head(traitData))
# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：选择软阈值 (Soft-thresholding power)
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤3：选择软阈值 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

powers <- c(c(1:10), seq(from = 12, to = 20, by = 2))
sft <- pickSoftThreshold(datExpr, powerVector = powers, verbose = 5)
power_val <- sft$powerEstimate
if (is.na(power_val)) {
  power_val <- 6
  cat("无法自动确定power，使用默认值6\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("最佳软阈值power: %d\n", power_val))
}

# --- 生成图1：软阈值选择图 ---
cat("生成图1：软阈值选择图...\n")
sft_data <- sft$fitIndices
sft_plot <- ggplot(sft_data, aes(x = Power, y = -sign(slope) * SFT.R.sq)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Power), nudge_y = 0.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.85, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(x = "Soft Threshold (Power)", 
       y = "Scale Free Topology Model Fit, signed R^2") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "01_soft_threshold_selection.png"), sft_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "01_soft_threshold_selection.pdf"), sft_plot, width = 8, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：构建共表达网络与模块识别
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤4：构建网络与识别模块 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

net <- blockwiseModules(
  datExpr, power = power_val, TOMType = "unsigned", minModuleSize = 30,
  reassignThreshold = 0, mergeCutHeight = 0.25, numericLabels = TRUE,
  pamRespectsDendro = FALSE, saveTOMs = TRUE,
  saveTOMFileBase = file.path(output_dir, "TOM"), verbose = 3
)
moduleColors <- labels2colors(net$colors)

# --- 生成图2：基因树状图和模块颜色 ---
cat("生成图2：基因树状图和模块颜色...\n")
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "02_gene_dendrogram_and_modules.pdf"), width = 12, height = 9)
plotDendroAndColors(
  net$dendrograms[[1]], moduleColors[net$blockGenes[[1]]], "Module colors",
  dendroLabels = FALSE, hang = 0.03, addGuide = TRUE, guideHang = 0.05
)
dev.off()
png(file.path(output_dir, "02_gene_dendrogram_and_modules.png"), width = 12*100, height = 9*100, res = 100)
plotDendroAndColors(
  net$dendrograms[[1]], moduleColors[net$blockGenes[[1]]], "Module colors",
  dendroLabels = FALSE, hang = 0.03, addGuide = TRUE, guideHang = 0.05
)
dev.off()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：模块-表型关联分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤5：模块-表型关联分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

MEs0 <- moduleEigengenes(datExpr, moduleColors)$eigengenes
MEs <- orderMEs(MEs0)
moduleTraitCor <- cor(MEs, traitData, use = "p")
moduleTraitPvalue <- corPvalueStudent(moduleTraitCor, nrow(datExpr))
write.csv(moduleTraitCor, file.path(output_dir, "module_trait_correlation.csv"))
write.csv(moduleTraitPvalue, file.path(output_dir, "module_trait_pvalue.csv"))

# --- 生成图3：模块-表型相关性热图 ---
cat("生成图3：模块-表型相关性热图...\n")
textMatrix <- paste(signif(moduleTraitCor, 2), "\n(", signif(moduleTraitPvalue, 1), ")", sep = "")
dim(textMatrix) <- dim(moduleTraitCor)
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "03_module_trait_heatmap.pdf"), width = 8, height = 10)
par(mar = c(6, 8.5, 3, 3))
labeledHeatmap(
  Matrix = moduleTraitCor, xLabels = names(traitData), yLabels = names(MEs),
  ySymbols = names(MEs), colorLabels = FALSE, colors = blueWhiteRed(50),
  textMatrix = textMatrix, setStdMargins = FALSE, cex.text = 0.5,
  zlim = c(-1, 1), main = "Module-Trait Relationships"
)
dev.off()
png(file.path(output_dir, "03_module_trait_heatmap.png"), width = 8*100, height = 10*100, res = 100)
par(mar = c(6, 8.5, 3, 3))
labeledHeatmap(
  Matrix = moduleTraitCor, xLabels = names(traitData), yLabels = names(MEs),
  ySymbols = names(MEs), colorLabels = FALSE, colors = blueWhiteRed(50),
  textMatrix = textMatrix, setStdMargins = FALSE, cex.text = 0.5,
  zlim = c(-1, 1), main = "Module-Trait Relationships"
)
dev.off()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：核心模块识别与富集分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤6：核心模块富集分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# --- 识别核心模块 ---
pea_cor <- moduleTraitCor[, "PEA_status"]
disease_module_color <- gsub("ME", "", names(pea_cor)[which.max(pea_cor)])
health_module_color <- gsub("ME", "", names(pea_cor)[which.min(pea_cor)])

cell_state_cor <- moduleTraitCor[, "Cell_state"]
cell_state_module_color <- gsub("ME", "", names(cell_state_cor)[which.max(abs(cell_state_cor))])

cat(sprintf("疾病模块 (最正相关PEA): %s\n", disease_module_color))
cat(sprintf("健康模块 (最负相关PEA): %s\n", health_module_color))
cat(sprintf("细胞状态模块 (最相关Cell_state): %s\n", cell_state_module_color))

# --- 对"疾病模块"进行富集分析 ---
cat("\n--- 分析疾病模块 (", disease_module_color, ") ---\n")
disease_genes <- names(datExpr)[moduleColors == disease_module_color]

# GO富集
go_disease <- enrichGO(disease_genes, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "SYMBOL", ont = "BP", qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
if (!is.null(go_disease) && nrow(go_disease) > 0) {
  write.csv(as.data.frame(go_disease), file.path(output_dir, paste0("enrich_GO_", disease_module_color, ".csv")))
  
  # --- 生成图4：疾病模块GO富集图 ---
  cat("生成图4：疾病模块GO富集图...\n")
  p_go_disease <- dotplot(go_disease, showCategory = 20) + ggtitle(paste("GO Enrichment - Disease Module (", disease_module_color, ")"))
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "04_GO_enrich_disease_module.png"), p_go_disease, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "04_GO_enrich_disease_module.pdf"), p_go_disease, width = 10, height = 8)
}

# KEGG富集
entrez_ids_disease <- mapIds(org.Mm.eg.db, keys = disease_genes, column = "ENTREZID", keytype = "SYMBOL", multiVals = "first")
kegg_disease <- enrichKEGG(entrez_ids_disease[!is.na(entrez_ids_disease)], organism = 'mmu', qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
if (!is.null(kegg_disease) && nrow(kegg_disease) > 0) {
  write.csv(as.data.frame(kegg_disease), file.path(output_dir, paste0("enrich_KEGG_", disease_module_color, ".csv")))
  
  # --- 生成图5：疾病模块KEGG富集图 ---
  cat("生成图5：疾病模块KEGG富集图...\n")
  p_kegg_disease <- dotplot(kegg_disease, showCategory = 20) + ggtitle(paste("KEGG Enrichment - Disease Module (", disease_module_color, ")"))
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "05_KEGG_enrich_disease_module.png"), p_kegg_disease, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "05_KEGG_enrich_disease_module.pdf"), p_kegg_disease, width = 10, height = 8)
}

# --- 对"健康模块"进行富集分析 ---
cat("\n--- 分析健康模块 (", health_module_color, ") ---\n")
health_genes <- names(datExpr)[moduleColors == health_module_color]

# GO富集
go_health <- enrichGO(health_genes, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "SYMBOL", ont = "BP", qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
if (!is.null(go_health) && nrow(go_health) > 0) {
  write.csv(as.data.frame(go_health), file.path(output_dir, paste0("enrich_GO_", health_module_color, ".csv")))
  
  # --- 生成图6：健康模块GO富集图 ---
  cat("生成图6：健康模块GO富集图...\n")
  p_go_health <- dotplot(go_health, showCategory = 20) + ggtitle(paste("GO Enrichment - Health Module (", health_module_color, ")"))
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "06_GO_enrich_health_module.png"), p_go_health, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "06_GO_enrich_health_module.pdf"), p_go_health, width = 10, height = 8)
}

# KEGG富集
entrez_ids_health <- mapIds(org.Mm.eg.db, keys = health_genes, column = "ENTREZID", keytype = "SYMBOL", multiVals = "first")
kegg_health <- enrichKEGG(entrez_ids_health[!is.na(entrez_ids_health)], organism = 'mmu', qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
if (!is.null(kegg_health) && nrow(kegg_health) > 0) {
  write.csv(as.data.frame(kegg_health), file.path(output_dir, paste0("enrich_KEGG_", health_module_color, ".csv")))
  
  # --- 生成图7：健康模块KEGG富集图 ---
  cat("生成图7：健康模块KEGG富集图...\n")
  p_kegg_health <- dotplot(kegg_health, showCategory = 20) + ggtitle(paste("KEGG Enrichment - Health Module (", health_module_color, ")"))
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "07_KEGG_enrich_health_module.png"), p_kegg_health, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "07_KEGG_enrich_health_module.pdf"), p_kegg_health, width = 10, height = 8)
}

# --- 对"细胞状态模块"进行富集分析 ---
cat("\n--- 分析细胞状态模块 (", cell_state_module_color, ") ---\n")
cell_state_genes <- names(datExpr)[moduleColors == cell_state_module_color]

# GO富集
go_cell_state <- enrichGO(cell_state_genes, OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db, keyType = "SYMBOL", ont = "BP", qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
if (!is.null(go_cell_state) && nrow(go_cell_state) > 0) {
  write.csv(as.data.frame(go_cell_state), file.path(output_dir, paste0("enrich_GO_", cell_state_module_color, ".csv")))
  
  # --- 生成图8：细胞状态模块GO富集图 ---
  cat("生成图8：细胞状态模块GO富集图...\n")
  p_go_cell_state <- dotplot(go_cell_state, showCategory = 20) + ggtitle(paste("GO Enrichment - Cell State Module (", cell_state_module_color, ")"))
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "08_GO_enrich_cell_state_module.png"), p_go_cell_state, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "08_GO_enrich_cell_state_module.pdf"), p_go_cell_state, width = 10, height = 8)
}

# KEGG富集
entrez_ids_cell_state <- mapIds(org.Mm.eg.db, keys = cell_state_genes, column = "ENTREZID", keytype = "SYMBOL", multiVals = "first")
kegg_cell_state <- enrichKEGG(entrez_ids_cell_state[!is.na(entrez_ids_cell_state)], organism = 'mmu', qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
if (!is.null(kegg_cell_state) && nrow(kegg_cell_state) > 0) {
  write.csv(as.data.frame(kegg_cell_state), file.path(output_dir, paste0("enrich_KEGG_", cell_state_module_color, ".csv")))
  
  # --- 生成图9：细胞状态模块KEGG富集图 ---
  cat("生成图9：细胞状态模块KEGG富集图...\n")
  p_kegg_cell_state <- dotplot(kegg_cell_state, showCategory = 20) + ggtitle(paste("KEGG Enrichment - Cell State Module (", cell_state_module_color, ")"))
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "09_KEGG_enrich_cell_state_module.png"), p_kegg_cell_state, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "09_KEGG_enrich_cell_state_module.pdf"), p_kegg_cell_state, width = 10, height = 8)
}

# =============================================================================
# 最终总结
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("========== WGCNA分析完成 ==========\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("输出文件位于目录:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("- 01_soft_threshold_selection.png/pdf\n")
cat("- 02_gene_dendrogram_and_modules.png/pdf\n")
cat("- 03_module_trait_heatmap.png/pdf\n")
cat("- 04_GO_enrich_disease_module.png/pdf\n")
cat("- 05_KEGG_enrich_disease_module.png/pdf\n")
cat("- 06_GO_enrich_health_module.png/pdf\n")
cat("- 07_KEGG_enrich_health_module.png/pdf\n")
cat("- 08_GO_enrich_cell_state_module.png/pdf\n")
cat("- 09_KEGG_enrich_cell_state_module.png/pdf\n")
cat("- module_trait_correlation.csv\n")
cat("- enrich_... .csv\n")

cat("\n分析完成！\n")
```
图1：软阈值选择图 (Soft Threshold Selection)
横轴 (Soft Threshold - Power)：候选的软阈值幂指数。
纵轴 (Scale Free Topology Model Fit, signed R^2)：无标度网络拓扑模型的拟合度（R²值）。R²越高，网络越接近真实生物网络的“无标度”特性。
生物学意义：WGCNA旨在构建一个无标度网络，即网络中大多数基因只有少数几个连接，而少数“核心”基因（hubs）有大量连接。此图帮助我们选择一个合适的幂指数（power），以在尽可能保留网络连接性的同时，最大化其无标度特性。通常选择红色虚线（R²=0.85）以上的第一个power值。
图2：基因聚类树状图与模块划分 (Gene Dendrogram and Modules)
顶部树状图：展示了所有基因基于其表达相似性的层次聚类结果。距离越近的基因，其表达模式越相似。
底部彩色条带 (Module colors)：每个颜色代表一个通过动态剪切算法识别出的共表达基因模块。灰色模块（grey）通常包含未被分入任何模块的基因。
生物学意义：此图直观地展示了数据中天然存在的、协同表达的基因群体（模块）。同一个颜色模块内的基因在功能上可能相关，并受共同的调控机制影响。
图3：模块-表型相关性热图 (Module-Trait Heatmap)
横轴 (X-axis)：您定义的表型特征，即PEA_status（是否为PEA处理）和Cell_state（细胞类型）。
纵轴 (Y-axis)：每个共表达模块的特征基因（Module Eigengene, ME），ME可以看作是该模块内所有基因表达模式的代表。
热图颜色：代表模块ME与表型之间的相关性系数。红色表示强正相关，蓝色表示强负相关，白色表示无相关性。
单元格内的数字：上方数字是相关性系数值（-1到1），括号内的数字是该相关性的p值。
生物学意义：这是WGCNA分析的核心输出。它直接揭示了哪些基因网络（模块）与您的生物学问题（PEA处理、细胞类型分化）最相关。例如，与PEA_status呈强正相关的红色模块，其内部的基因在PEA处理后整体表达上调，可能参与了疾病的发生发展，可被视为“疾病模块”。
图4/5：GO/KEGG富集分析点图 (Enrichment Dot Plot)
横轴 (GeneRatio)：模块内的基因在某个GO/KEGG条目中出现的比例。值越大，代表富集程度越高。
纵轴 (Y-axis)：富集到的GO功能术语或KEGG代谢通路。
点的大小 (Size)：富集到该条目的基因数量。点越大，数量越多。
点的颜色 (Color)：富集的显著性（通常是校正后的p值）。颜色越红，p值越小，富集结果越可靠。
生物学意义：此图揭示了核心模块内的基因主要参与哪些生物学功能或信号通路。例如，如果“疾病模块”富集到了“炎症反应”和“细胞凋亡”通路，这为PEA处理可能通过诱导炎症和凋亡来影响细胞提供了机制层面的解释。将这些结果与您之前的模块评分分析进行对比，可以验证和深化您对α-synuclein功能网络的理解。
cat(sprintf("疾病模块 (最正相关PEA): %s\n", disease_module_color))
疾病模块 (最正相关PEA): magenta
cat(sprintf("健康模块 (最负相关PEA): %s\n", health_module_color))
健康模块 (最负相关PEA): turquoise
cat(sprintf("细胞状态模块 (最相关Cell_state): %s\n", cell_state_module_color))
细胞状态模块 (最相关Cell_state): grey
PEA_status 最正相关（即“疾病模块”）和最负相关（即“健康模块”）的模块。
识别与 Cell_state 特异性相关的模块
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 增强版拟时序分析 - 全模块分析和细胞动态变化（修复版）
# 修复内容：
# 1. 解决数据框行数不匹配问题
# 2. 正确处理NA值和无效数据
# 3. 确保BHI为对照组，PEA为疾病组
# =============================================================================

# 加载必要的包
library(monocle3)
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(pheatmap)
library(corrplot)
library(gridExtra)
library(viridis)
library(tibble)

# 解决可能的命名空间冲突
select <- dplyr::select
filter <- dplyr::filter
mutate <- dplyr::mutate
group_by <- dplyr::group_by
summarise <- dplyr::summarise

# 设置工作目录和输出路径
setwd("F:/projectmanfei/final")
seurat_input_dir <- "module_score_analysis"
output_dir <- "enhanced_trajectory_analysis"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：数据准备和基础轨迹分析
# =============================================================================
cat("=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤1：数据准备与轨迹构建 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 定义所有基因集
synuclein_network <- list(
  Core_Synuclein = c("Snca", "Sncb", "Sncg"),
  Protein_Degradation = c(
    "Ube2n", "Stub1", "Hspa8", "Lamp2a", "Ctsd",
    "Psmc1", "Psmd11", "Becn1", "Atg5", "Atg7", "Sqstm1",
    "Map1lc3a", "Map1lc3b", "Gabarapl2", "Ulk1"
  ),
  Protein_Aggregation = c(
    "Park7", "Lrrk2", "Gba", "Mapt",
    "Dnajb1", "Dnajc5", "Cryab", "Bag1", "Bag3",
    "Hspb1", "Hspb8", "Apoe", "Clu"
  ),
  Stress_Response = c(
    "Hspa1a", "Hspa1b", "Hsp90aa1", "Atf4", "Xbp1",
    "Nfe2l2", "Sod2", "Gpx1", "Cat", "Hmox1",
    "Ddit3", "Eif2ak3", "Ern1"
  ),
  Mitochondrial_Function = c(
    "Pink1", "Park2", "Mfn2", "Opa1", "Dnm1l",
    "Ndufs3", "Ndufa9", "Cox4i1", "Tomm20", "Timm23",
    "Vdac1", "Ppargc1a", "Tfam", "Cycs"
  ),
  Vesicle_Transport = c(
    "Syt1", "Stx1a", "Vamp2", "Snap25",
    "Dnm1", "Rab3a", "Rab27a", "Rab7a", "Syn1", "Syn2",
    "Rab5a", "Rab11a", "Nsf", "Stxbp1"
  ),
  Inflammation = c(
    "Il1b", "Tnf", "Il6", "Nfkb1", "Rela",
    "Tlr2", "Tlr4", "Nlrp3", "Cx3cr1", "Ccl2",
    "Csf1", "Tgfb1", "Cxcl10", "Ifng"
  )
)

cell_type_markers <- list(
  Epithelial_General = c(
    "Epcam", "Cdh1", "Krt8", "Krt18", "Krt19",
    "Cldn4", "Cldn7", "Ocln", "Tjp1"
  ),
  Intestinal_Epithelial = c(
    "Vil1", "Alpi", "Fabp2", "Slc5a1", "Slc2a2",
    "Sis", "Cdx2", "Hnf4a", "Gata4"
  ),
  Stem_Proliferation = c(
    "Lgr5", "Olfm4", "Ascl2", "Sox9", "Cd44",
    "Mki67", "Pcna", "Top2a", "Ccnd1"
  ),
  Tuft_Activation = c(
    "Dclk1", "Trpm5", "Gnat3", "Gng13", "Plcb2",
    "Tas1r3", "Tas2r108", "Tas2r138", "P2ry2",
    "Il25", "Il13", "Il4ra", "Tslp",
    "Alox5", "Alox5ap", "Ptgs1", "Ptgs2",
    "Chat", "Gfi1b", "Pou2f3", "Sox4",
    "Advillin", "Krt18", "Krt20"
  ),
  Secretory_Function = c(
    "Muc2", "Tff3", "Spdef", "Atoh1", "Gfi1",
    "Chga", "Chgb", "Neurog3", "Insm1"
  ),
  Barrier_Function = c(
    "Cldn2", "Cldn3", "Cldn15", "Muc1", "Muc13",
    "Defa5", "Defa24", "Reg3g", "Reg3b"
  ),
  Metabolic_Function = c(
    "Aldob", "Pck1", "G6pc", "Slc2a5", "Slc5a9",
    "Hmgcs2", "Cyp3a11", "Cyp2c55", "Ugt1a1"
  )
)

disease_signatures <- list(
  Oxidative_Stress = c(
    "Sod1", "Sod2", "Cat", "Gpx1", "Gpx4",
    "Gsr", "Txn1", "Prdx1", "Nqo1", "Gclc"
  ),
  ER_Stress = c(
    "Hspa5", "Pdia3", "Calr", "Canx", "Atf6",
    "Ire1", "Perk", "Chop", "Gadd34", "Bip"
  ),
  Apoptosis = c(
    "Bax", "Bak1", "Bcl2", "Bcl2l1", "Mcl1",
    "Casp3", "Casp7", "Casp9", "Apaf1", "Cycs"
  ),
  Fibrosis = c(
    "Col1a1", "Col3a1", "Fn1", "Acta2", "Vim",
    "Tgfb1", "Smad2", "Smad3", "Ctgf", "Lox"
  )
)

# 合并所有基因集
all_gene_sets <- c(synuclein_network, cell_type_markers, disease_signatures)
cat("定义了", length(all_gene_sets), "个基因集:\n")
for (name in names(all_gene_sets)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %s: %d genes\n", name, length(all_gene_sets[[name]])))
}

# 读取数据并构建轨迹
seurat_obj <- readRDS(file.path(seurat_input_dir, "seurat_with_module_scores.rds"))

# 检查并清理数据
cat("\n检查数据质量...\n")
cat("原始细胞数:", ncol(seurat_obj), "\n")

# 检查是否有NA细胞类型并移除
na_cells <- is.na(seurat_obj$refined_celltype) | seurat_obj$refined_celltype == "" | seurat_obj$refined_celltype == "NA"
if (sum(na_cells) > 0) {
  cat("发现", sum(na_cells), "个NA/空白细胞类型，将被移除\n")
  seurat_obj <- seurat_obj[, !na_cells]
}

# 检查组别信息
cat("治疗组分布:\n")
print(table(seurat_obj$group, useNA = "ifany"))

# 确保BHI为对照组，PEA为疾病组
if (!all(c("BHI", "PEA") %in% seurat_obj$group)) {
  cat("警告：未找到期望的BHI和PEA组别\n")
  cat("实际组别:", unique(seurat_obj$group), "\n")
}

# 计算所有模块的评分（如果还没有的话）
cat("\n计算所有模块评分...\n")
for (module_name in names(all_gene_sets)) {
  score_name <- paste0(module_name, "_Score")
  if (!score_name %in% colnames(seurat_obj@meta.data)) {
    seurat_obj <- AddModuleScore(
      seurat_obj,
      features = list(all_gene_sets[[module_name]]),
      name = score_name,
      seed = 123
    )
    # 重命名列名（AddModuleScore会自动添加数字后缀）
    old_name <- paste0(score_name, "1")
    if (old_name %in% colnames(seurat_obj@meta.data)) {
      colnames(seurat_obj@meta.data)[colnames(seurat_obj@meta.data) == old_name] <- score_name
    }
  }
}

# 筛选目标细胞类型
target_cell_types <- c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
available_cell_types <- unique(seurat_obj$refined_celltype)
cat("\n可用细胞类型:", paste(available_cell_types, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# 检查目标细胞类型是否存在
missing_types <- target_cell_types[!target_cell_types %in% available_cell_types]
if (length(missing_types) > 0) {
  cat("警告：以下细胞类型未找到:", paste(missing_types, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  target_cell_types <- target_cell_types[target_cell_types %in% available_cell_types]
}

if (length(target_cell_types) == 0) {
  stop("未找到任何目标细胞类型，请检查细胞类型注释")
}

seurat_subset <- subset(seurat_obj, refined_celltype %in% target_cell_types)
cat(sprintf("用于轨迹分析的细胞数: %d\n", ncol(seurat_subset)))
cat("细胞类型分布:\n")
print(table(seurat_subset$refined_celltype))

# 转换为Monocle3对象并构建轨迹
cds <- as.cell_data_set(seurat_subset)
cds <- preprocess_cds(cds, num_dim = 100)
set.seed(123)
cds <- reduce_dimension(cds, reduction_method = "UMAP")
cds <- cluster_cells(cds, resolution = 1e-5)
cds <- learn_graph(cds)

# 设置根节点并计算伪时间
get_root_node <- function(cds, cell_type = "Epithelial_7"){
  available_types <- unique(colData(cds)[, "refined_celltype"])
  if (!cell_type %in% available_types) {
    cell_type <- available_types[1]  # 使用第一个可用类型
    cat("使用", cell_type, "作为根节点细胞类型\n")
  }
  
  cell_ids <- which(colData(cds)[, "refined_celltype"] == cell_type)
  if (length(cell_ids) == 0) {
    stop("未找到指定细胞类型的细胞")
  }
  
  closest_vertex <- cds@principal_graph_aux[["UMAP"]]$pr_graph_cell_proj_closest_vertex
  closest_vertex <- as.matrix(closest_vertex[cell_ids, ])
  root_pr_nodes <- igraph::V(principal_graph(cds)[["UMAP"]])$name[as.numeric(names(which.max(table(closest_vertex))))]
  root_pr_nodes
}

root_node <- get_root_node(cds, cell_type = target_cell_types[1])
cds <- order_cells(cds, root_pr_nodes = root_node)
cat(sprintf("轨迹学习和伪时间计算完成，起点为: %s\n", root_node))

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：创建综合数据框（修复版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤2：创建综合数据框 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 首先创建完整的数据框，包含所有模块评分
cat("创建包含所有数据的综合数据框...\n")

# 获取所有需要的列
module_score_cols <- grep("_Score$", colnames(colData(cds)), value = TRUE)
cat("找到", length(module_score_cols), "个模块评分列\n")

# 创建完整的数据框（先不过滤）
trajectory_data_full <- data.frame(
  cell_id = rownames(colData(cds)),
  refined_celltype = colData(cds)$refined_celltype,
  group = colData(cds)$group,
  pseudotime = pseudotime(cds),
  UMAP_1 = reducedDims(cds)$UMAP[, 1],
  UMAP_2 = reducedDims(cds)$UMAP[, 2],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 添加所有模块评分
for (col in module_score_cols) {
  trajectory_data_full[[col]] <- colData(cds)[[col]]
}

cat("完整数据框行数:", nrow(trajectory_data_full), "\n")

# 现在过滤掉无效数据
trajectory_data <- trajectory_data_full %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(pseudotime),                    # 有效的伪时间
    !is.na(refined_celltype),                # 有效的细胞类型
    !is.na(group),                           # 有效的组别
    refined_celltype != "",                   # 非空细胞类型
    group != ""                              # 非空组别
  )

cat("过滤后数据框行数:", nrow(trajectory_data), "\n")
cat("过滤掉的细胞数:", nrow(trajectory_data_full) - nrow(trajectory_data), "\n")

# 检查最终数据质量
cat("\n最终数据质量检查:\n")
cat("细胞类型分布:\n")
print(table(trajectory_data$refined_celltype))
cat("治疗组分布:\n")
print(table(trajectory_data$group))
cat("伪时间范围:", range(trajectory_data$pseudotime), "\n")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：基础轨迹可视化
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤3：基础轨迹可视化 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 基础轨迹图
# 为细胞类型设置颜色
celltype_colors <- c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")
# 只使用实际存在的细胞类型
existing_types <- intersect(names(celltype_colors), unique(trajectory_data$refined_celltype))
celltype_colors <- celltype_colors[existing_types]

p_base1 <- plot_cells(cds, color_cells_by = "refined_celltype", label_cell_groups = TRUE,
                      group_label_size = 4, cell_size = 0.75) +
  scale_color_manual(values = celltype_colors) +
  labs(title = "Trajectory by Cell Type") + theme_minimal()

p_base2 <- plot_cells(cds, color_cells_by = "pseudotime", label_leaves = TRUE,
                      label_branch_points = TRUE, graph_label_size = 4, cell_size = 0.75) +
  labs(title = "Trajectory by Pseudotime") + theme_minimal()

p_base3 <- plot_cells(cds, color_cells_by = "group", cell_size = 0.75) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Trajectory by Treatment Group (BHI=Control, PEA=Disease)") + theme_minimal()

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "01_basic_trajectory_celltype.pdf"), p_base1, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "02_basic_trajectory_pseudotime.pdf"), p_base2, width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "03_basic_trajectory_group.pdf"), p_base3, width = 8, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：细胞数量动态变化分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤4：细胞数量动态变化分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 将伪时间分成10个区间
trajectory_data$pseudotime_bin <- cut(trajectory_data$pseudotime, breaks = 10, labels = FALSE)
trajectory_data$pseudotime_bin_center <- cut(trajectory_data$pseudotime, breaks = 10) %>%
  as.character() %>%
  gsub("\\(|\\]", "", .) %>%
  strsplit(",") %>%
  sapply(function(x) mean(as.numeric(x)))

# 计算每个时间区间内各细胞类型的比例
celltype_dynamics <- trajectory_data %>%
  group_by(pseudotime_bin, pseudotime_bin_center, refined_celltype) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(pseudotime_bin) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(count),
         proportion = count / total * 100)

# 细胞类型比例随时间变化的堆叠面积图
p_celltype_dynamics <- ggplot(celltype_dynamics, aes(x = pseudotime_bin_center, y = proportion, fill = refined_celltype)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = celltype_colors) +
  labs(title = "Cell Type Composition Changes Along Pseudotime",
       x = "Pseudotime", y = "Cell Type Proportion (%)",
       fill = "Cell Type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# 细胞类型数量随时间变化的线图
p_celltype_counts <- ggplot(celltype_dynamics, aes(x = pseudotime_bin_center, y = count, color = refined_celltype)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = celltype_colors) +
  labs(title = "Cell Count Changes Along Pseudotime",
       x = "Pseudotime", y = "Cell Count",
       color = "Cell Type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# 治疗组细胞分布随伪时间变化
group_dynamics <- trajectory_data %>%
  group_by(pseudotime_bin, pseudotime_bin_center, group) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(pseudotime_bin) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(count),
         proportion = count / total * 100)

p_group_dynamics <- ggplot(group_dynamics, aes(x = pseudotime_bin_center, y = proportion, fill = group)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693"),
                    labels = c("BHI" = "Control (BHI)", "PEA" = "Disease (PEA)")) +
  labs(title = "Treatment Group Distribution Along Pseudotime",
       x = "Pseudotime", y = "Group Proportion (%)",
       fill = "Treatment") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# 保存动态变化图
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "04_celltype_dynamics_area.pdf"), p_celltype_dynamics, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "05_celltype_dynamics_counts.pdf"), p_celltype_counts, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "06_group_dynamics.pdf"), p_group_dynamics, width = 10, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：全模块分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤5：全模块综合分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 提取所有模块评分列
module_cols <- module_score_cols[module_score_cols %in% colnames(trajectory_data)]
cat("用于分析的", length(module_cols), "个模块评分列:\n")
for (col in module_cols) {
  cat(sprintf("  %s\n", col))
}

# 将数据转换为长格式便于绘图
module_long_data <- trajectory_data %>%
  select(cell_id, pseudotime, refined_celltype, group, all_of(module_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(module_cols), names_to = "Module", values_to = "Score") %>%
  mutate(Module = gsub("_Score$", "", Module)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Score))  # 移除NA值

# 模块评分随伪时间变化的总览图
p_all_modules <- ggplot(module_long_data, aes(x = pseudotime, y = Score)) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = refined_celltype), method = "loess", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~Module, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = celltype_colors) +
  labs(title = "All Module Scores Along Pseudotime by Cell Type",
       x = "Pseudotime", y = "Module Score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "07_all_modules_pseudotime.pdf"), p_all_modules, width = 16, height = 12)

# 模块在不同细胞类型中的表达热图
cat("生成模块在不同细胞类型中的表达热图...\n")

module_celltype_matrix <- trajectory_data %>%
  select(refined_celltype, all_of(module_cols)) %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype) %>%
  summarise_all(function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("refined_celltype") %>%
  as.matrix()

# 清理列名
colnames(module_celltype_matrix) <- gsub("_Score$", "", colnames(module_celltype_matrix))

# 生成热图
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "08_module_celltype_heatmap.pdf"), width = 12, height = 8)
pheatmap(t(module_celltype_matrix),
         scale = "row",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = FALSE,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         main = "Module Expression Across Cell Types (Z-scaled)",
         fontsize = 10)
dev.off()

# 模块在不同治疗组中的比较
cat("生成模块在不同治疗组中的比较图...\n")

module_group_comparison <- trajectory_data %>%
  select(group, all_of(module_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(module_cols), names_to = "Module", values_to = "Score") %>%
  mutate(Module = gsub("_Score$", "", Module)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Score))

# 模块在治疗组间的箱线图比较
p_modules_group <- ggplot(module_group_comparison, aes(x = group, y = Score, fill = group)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~Module, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693"),
                    labels = c("BHI" = "Control", "PEA" = "Disease")) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Module Scores: Control (BHI) vs Disease (PEA)",
       x = "Treatment Group", y = "Module Score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "09_modules_group_comparison.pdf"), p_modules_group, width = 16, height = 12)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：模块间相关性分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤6：模块间相关性分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 计算模块间相关性
module_cor_data <- trajectory_data %>%
  select(all_of(module_cols)) %>%
  rename_all(~gsub("_Score$", "", .))

# 移除完全为NA的列
module_cor_data <- module_cor_data[, colSums(is.na(module_cor_data)) < nrow(module_cor_data)]

correlation_matrix <- cor(module_cor_data, use = "complete.obs", method = "pearson")

# 相关性热图
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "10_module_correlation_heatmap.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
corrplot(correlation_matrix, 
         method = "color", 
         type = "upper", 
         order = "hclust",
         tl.cex = 0.8, 
         tl.col = "black",
         title = "Module Correlation Matrix",
         mar = c(0,0,1,0))
dev.off()

# 分层聚类分析模块关系
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "11_module_clustering_dendrogram.pdf"), width = 12, height = 8)
dist_matrix <- as.dist(1 - abs(correlation_matrix))
hc <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "ward.D2")
plot(hc, main = "Module Clustering Based on Correlation", 
     xlab = "Modules", ylab = "Distance")
dev.off()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤7：统计检验和定量分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤7：统计检验和定量分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 模块评分与伪时间的相关性分析
cat("计算模块评分与伪时间的相关性...\n")
pseudotime_correlations <- data.frame(
  Module = character(),
  Correlation = numeric(),
  P_value = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (col in module_cols) {
  col_clean <- gsub("_Score$", "", col)
  valid_data <- trajectory_data[!is.na(trajectory_data[[col]]) & is.finite(trajectory_data$pseudotime), ]
  
  if (nrow(valid_data) > 10) {
    cor_test <- cor.test(valid_data$pseudotime, valid_data[[col]], method = "pearson")
    pseudotime_correlations <- rbind(pseudotime_correlations, 
                                    data.frame(Module = col_clean, 
                                              Correlation = cor_test$estimate,
                                              P_value = cor_test$p.value))
  }
}

pseudotime_correlations$FDR <- p.adjust(pseudotime_correlations$P_value, method = "fdr")
pseudotime_correlations <- pseudotime_correlations[order(abs(pseudotime_correlations$Correlation), decreasing = TRUE), ]

write.csv(pseudotime_correlations, file.path(output_dir, "pseudotime_module_correlations.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# 治疗组间模块差异的统计检验
cat("进行治疗组间模块差异的统计检验...\n")
group_comparisons <- data.frame(
  Module = character(),
  Statistic = numeric(),
  P_value = numeric(),
  Effect_Size = numeric(),
  Median_Control = numeric(),
  Median_Disease = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (col in module_cols) {
  col_clean <- gsub("_Score$", "", col)
  bhi_scores <- trajectory_data[trajectory_data$group == "BHI", col]
  pea_scores <- trajectory_data[trajectory_data$group == "PEA", col]
  
  # 去除NA值
  bhi_scores <- bhi_scores[!is.na(bhi_scores)]
  pea_scores <- pea_scores[!is.na(pea_scores)]
  
  if (length(bhi_scores) > 5 && length(pea_scores) > 5) {
    wilcox_test <- wilcox.test(pea_scores, bhi_scores, alternative = "two.sided")
    median_bhi <- median(bhi_scores, na.rm = TRUE)
    median_pea <- median(pea_scores, na.rm = TRUE)
    effect_size <- (median_pea - median_bhi) / mad(c(bhi_scores, pea_scores), na.rm = TRUE)
    
    group_comparisons <- rbind(group_comparisons,
                              data.frame(Module = col_clean,
                                        Statistic = wilcox_test$statistic,
                                        P_value = wilcox_test$p.value,
                                        Effect_Size = effect_size,
                                        Median_Control = median_bhi,
                                        Median_Disease = median_pea))
  }
}

group_comparisons$FDR <- p.adjust(group_comparisons$P_value, method = "fdr")
group_comparisons <- group_comparisons[order(group_comparisons$P_value), ]

write.csv(group_comparisons, file.path(output_dir, "group_module_comparisons.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# 保存完整的轨迹数据
write.csv(trajectory_data, file.path(output_dir, "comprehensive_trajectory_data.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(celltype_dynamics, file.path(output_dir, "celltype_dynamics_data.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(group_dynamics, file.path(output_dir, "group_dynamics_data.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤8：生成总结报告
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤8：生成分析总结 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 生成总结统计
cat("=== 分析完成总结 ===\n")
cat("总细胞数:", nrow(trajectory_data), "\n")
cat("细胞类型:\n")
print(table(trajectory_data$refined_celltype))
cat("治疗组分布:\n")
print(table(trajectory_data$group))
cat("分析的模块数:", length(module_cols), "\n")
cat("显著相关的模块数（与伪时间，FDR<0.05）:", sum(pseudotime_correlations$FDR < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("组间显著差异的模块数（FDR<0.05）:", sum(group_comparisons$FDR < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

cat("\n最显著的伪时间相关模块（前5个）:\n")
print(head(pseudotime_correlations[pseudotime_correlations$FDR < 0.05, ], 5))

cat("\n最显著的组间差异模块（前5个）:\n")
print(head(group_comparisons[group_comparisons$FDR < 0.05, ], 5))

cat("\n=== 生成的文件总结 ===\n")
cat("基础轨迹图（3个）:\n")
cat("  01_basic_trajectory_celltype.pdf - 按细胞类型的轨迹图\n")
cat("  02_basic_trajectory_pseudotime.pdf - 按伪时间的轨迹图\n")
cat("  03_basic_trajectory_group.pdf - 按治疗组的轨迹图\n\n")

cat("细胞动态变化图（3个）:\n")
cat("  04_celltype_dynamics_area.pdf - 细胞类型比例变化\n")
cat("  05_celltype_dynamics_counts.pdf - 细胞数量变化\n")
cat("  06_group_dynamics.pdf - 治疗组分布变化\n\n")

cat("模块时序表达图（每个模块3类图，共", length(all_modules) * 3, "个）:\n")
cat("  07a_[模块名]_overall_trend.pdf - 每个模块的总体时序趋势\n")
cat("  08a_[模块名]_by_celltype.pdf - 每个模块按细胞类型的时序趋势\n")
cat("  09a_[模块名]_by_group.pdf - 每个模块按治疗组的时序趋势\n\n")

cat("重要模块详细分析图（6个重要模块 × 3类图 = 18个）:\n")
cat("  10a_[重要模块]_detailed_comprehensive.pdf - 综合详细视图\n")
cat("  10b_[重要模块]_detailed_by_celltype.pdf - 按细胞类型分面\n")
cat("  10c_[重要模块]_detailed_by_group.pdf - 按治疗组对比\n\n")

cat("热图和相关性分析（4个）:\n")
cat("  11_module_trajectory_heatmap.pdf - 模块在时序阶段的热图\n")
cat("  12_module_celltype_heatmap.pdf - 模块在细胞类型的热图\n")
cat("  14_module_correlation_heatmap.pdf - 模块间相关性热图（已修复颜色）\n")
cat("  15_module_clustering_dendrogram.pdf - 模块聚类树图\n\n")

cat("模块比较图（每个模块1个，共", length(all_modules), "个）:\n")
cat("  16a_[模块名]_group_comparison.pdf - 每个模块的组间比较箱线图\n\n")

cat("数据文件（5个CSV）:\n")
cat("  pseudotime_module_correlations.csv - 模块与伪时间的相关性\n")
cat("  group_module_comparisons.csv - 组间模块差异统计\n")
cat("  comprehensive_trajectory_data.csv - 完整轨迹数据\n")
cat("  celltype_dynamics_data.csv - 细胞类型动态数据\n")
cat("  group_dynamics_data.csv - 治疗组动态数据\n")
cat("  module_trajectory_summary.csv - 模块时序阶段汇总\n\n")

cat("总计生成图片文件:", 3 + 3 + length(all_modules) * 3 + 18 + 4 + length(all_modules), "个\n")
cat("总计生成数据文件: 6个\n\n")
cat("所有输出文件已保存到:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("分析完成！\n")

```
图1：按细胞类型着色的UMAP图 (UMAP by Cell Type)
坐标轴：UMAP_1 和 UMAP_2，是细胞在高维基因表达空间中降维后的坐标，仅用于可视化细胞间的相对距离。
点：每个点代表一个单细胞。
颜色：代表每个细胞的注释类型（Epi_7, Epi_13, Tuft_30）。
生物学意义：此图用于检查降维后细胞是否按照其生物学身份聚类。理想情况下，相同类型的细胞会聚集在一起。这是构建轨迹前的基本质量控制，可以观察到Epi_13是否在空间上位于Epi_7和Tuft_30之间。
图2：按处理分组着色的UMAP图 (UMAP by Treatment Group)
坐标轴与点：同图1。
颜色：代表细胞来源的处理组（BHI 或 PEA）。
生物学意义：展示不同处理组的细胞在降维空间中的分布情况。可以观察PEA处理是否诱导了细胞向某个特定方向聚集，这可能与细胞状态的转变有关。
图3：叠加轨迹的UMAP图 (Inferred Trajectory)
背景：同图1，按细胞类型着色的UMAP图。
黑色线条：代表Monocle3学习到的细胞状态转换轨迹图。线条连接了细胞密度较高的区域，形成了“路径”。
生物学意义：这是轨迹分析的核心可视化结果。它直观地展示了最可能的细胞分化或状态转变路径。您可以根据线条的走向，判断细胞是否可能从Epi_7/Epi_13状态流向Tuft_30状态。
图4：按伪时间着色的UMAP图 (Trajectory by Pseudotime)
背景：同图3，带有轨迹线的UMAP图。
颜色：代表每个细胞的“伪时间”（Pseudotime）值。颜色从早（如紫色/蓝色）到晚（如黄色）变化，代表了细胞在推断轨迹上的进展程度。
图上的标签：Leaves表示轨迹的终点，Branch points表示细胞命运发生分叉的决策点。
生物学意义：伪时间是一个衡量细胞分化“进度”的指标。通过此图，您可以清晰地看到细胞从起点（我们设定为Epi_7区域）开始，沿着轨迹颜色逐渐变“晚”，最终到达终点。这为细胞状态的连续转变提供了定量的“时间”证据。
图5：伪时间密度图 (Distribution of Cells along Pseudotime)
横轴 (Pseudotime)：细胞在轨迹上的伪时间值。
纵轴 (Density)：在该伪时间点上，细胞分布的密度。
分面 (Facet)：每个图分别展示一种细胞类型（Epi_7, Epi_13, Tuft_30）。
生物学意义：这是验证您假说最关键的图。
如果 Epi_7 的密度峰主要出现在伪时间的早期。
如果 Tuft_30 的密度峰主要出现在伪时间的晚期。
如果 Epi_13 的密度峰主要出现在Epi_7和Tuft_30之间。
那么，这个结果将强烈支持“Epi_13是Epi_7向Tuft_30转变过程中的一个中间状态”这一假说。
如何解读新生成的图表来验证假设
H1_trajectory_by_group.png (富集假设)
如何看：观察代表PEA处理的颜色（红色）和代表BHI的颜色（蓝色）在轨迹上的分布。
验证标准：如果假说成立，您会看到在轨迹的末端（即Tuft_30细胞富集的区域），红色的点（PEA细胞）明显比蓝色的点（BHI细胞）更多、更密集。
H2_trajectory_by_module_score.png (活性假设 - UMAP图)
如何看：观察颜色的变化趋势。颜色越亮（黄色），代表“转分化模块”的得分越高。
验证标准：如果假说成立，您会看到颜色从轨迹的起点（Epi_7区域）到终点（Tuft_30区域）有一个从暗到亮的清晰渐变，表明模块活性沿着这条路径被逐渐激活。
H2_module_score_vs_pseudotime.png (活性假设 - 趋势图)
如何看：这是一个更定量的图。观察黑色平滑曲线的总体趋势。
验证标准：如果假说成立，这条黑线会呈现明显的上升趋势，即模块得分（Y轴）随着伪时间（X轴）的增加而增加。
H3_pseudotime_by_group.png (进程假设)
如何看：比较PEA和BHI两个小提琴图的整体位置。图上方的p = ...值是统计检验的结果。
验证标准：如果假说成立，PEA组的小提琴图（代表数据分布）会整体高于BHI组，并且p值会非常小（通常小于0.05），表明PEA组细胞的伪时间值在统计上显著高于BHI组。
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 细胞通讯分析 - 全细胞类型网络构建与重点细胞深度解析
# **最终版本：整合了NA值移除、下游绘图修复和总体CSV生成**
# =============================================================================

# 加载必要的包
library(CellChat)
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(NMF)

# 设置工作目录和输出路径
setwd("F:/projectmanfei/final")
seurat_input_dir <- "stage0_preprocessing_results"
output_dir <- "cell_communication_analysis"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：数据准备（包含您修正的NA移除步骤）
# =============================================================================
cat("=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤1：数据准备（移除NA） =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

seurat_pure <- readRDS(file.path(seurat_input_dir, "seurat_pure_annotated.rds"))

# 移除refined_celltype为NA的细胞
cat("正在移除refined_celltype为NA的细胞...\n")
cells_to_keep <- !is.na(seurat_pure$refined_celltype)
seurat_pure_clean <- seurat_pure[, cells_to_keep]
cat(sprintf("移除了 %d 个NA细胞，剩余 %d 个细胞用于分析。\n", sum(is.na(seurat_pure$refined_celltype)), ncol(seurat_pure_clean)))

# 重新子集化
seurat_bhi <- subset(seurat_pure_clean, group == "BHI")
seurat_pea <- subset(seurat_pure_clean, group == "PEA")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：创建和处理CellChat对象（包含您修正的因子处理）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤2：创建和处理CellChat对象 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

create_and_process_cellchat <- function(seurat_object, group_label) {
  cat(sprintf("\n--- 正在处理 %s 组 ---\n", group_label))
  data.input <- GetAssayData(seurat_object, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
  meta <- seurat_object@meta.data
  
  # 确保refined_celltype是因子并清理未使用的水平
  meta$refined_celltype <- factor(as.character(meta$refined_celltype))
  meta$refined_celltype <- droplevels(meta$refined_celltype)  # 重要：移除未使用的因子水平
  
  cellchat <- createCellChat(object = data.input, meta = meta, group.by = "refined_celltype")
  CellChatDB <- CellChatDB.mouse
  cellchat@DB <- CellChatDB
  cellchat <- subsetData(cellchat)
  cellchat <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat)
  cellchat <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cellchat)
  cellchat <- computeCommunProb(cellchat, raw.use = TRUE)
  cellchat <- filterCommunication(cellchat, min.cells = 10)
  cellchat <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat)
  cellchat <- aggregateNet(cellchat)
  cat(sprintf("%s 组处理完成\n", group_label))
  return(cellchat)
}

cellchat_bhi <- create_and_process_cellchat(seurat_bhi, "BHI")
cellchat_pea <- create_and_process_cellchat(seurat_pea, "PEA")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2.5：生成总体CSV文件
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤2.5：生成总体CSV文件 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 函数：计算细胞通讯摘要
calculate_communication_summary <- function(cellchat_obj, group_name) {
  # 获取细胞类型
  cell_types <- levels(cellchat_obj@idents)
  
  # 初始化结果数据框
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    Group = character(),
    CellType = character(),
    Cell_Count = numeric(),
    Outgoing_Signals = numeric(),
    Incoming_Signals = numeric(),
    Total_Signals = numeric(),
    Outgoing_Strength = numeric(),
    Incoming_Strength = numeric(),
    Total_Strength = numeric(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  for (cell_type in cell_types) {
    # 计算细胞数量
    cell_count <- sum(cellchat_obj@idents == cell_type)
    
    # 计算信号发出（outgoing）
    outgoing_count <- sum(cellchat_obj@net$count[cell_type, ], na.rm = TRUE)
    outgoing_weight <- sum(cellchat_obj@net$weight[cell_type, ], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # 计算信号接收（incoming）
    incoming_count <- sum(cellchat_obj@net$count[, cell_type], na.rm = TRUE)
    incoming_weight <- sum(cellchat_obj@net$weight[, cell_type], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # 计算总信号
    total_count <- outgoing_count + incoming_count
    total_weight <- outgoing_weight + incoming_weight
    
    # 添加到结果数据框
    summary_df <- rbind(summary_df, data.frame(
      Group = group_name,
      CellType = cell_type,
      Cell_Count = cell_count,
      Outgoing_Signals = outgoing_count,
      Incoming_Signals = incoming_count,
      Total_Signals = total_count,
      Outgoing_Strength = round(outgoing_weight, 4),
      Incoming_Strength = round(incoming_weight, 4),
      Total_Strength = round(total_weight, 4),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  
  return(summary_df)
}

# 生成各组的通讯摘要
summary_bhi <- calculate_communication_summary(cellchat_bhi, "BHI")
summary_pea <- calculate_communication_summary(cellchat_pea, "PEA")

# 合并两组数据
total_summary <- rbind(summary_bhi, summary_pea)

# 保存总体CSV文件
write.csv(total_summary, file.path(output_dir, "total_communication_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
cat("总体通讯摘要已保存到 total_communication_summary.csv\n")

# 生成更详细的配体-受体对摘要
generate_detailed_LR_summary <- function(cellchat_obj, group_name) {
  # 获取所有通讯信息
  communications <- subsetCommunication(cellchat_obj)
  
  if (nrow(communications) > 0) {
    # 按细胞类型对汇总
    lr_summary <- communications %>%
      group_by(source, target, pathway_name, ligand, receptor) %>%
      summarise(
        prob = mean(prob, na.rm = TRUE),
        pval = mean(pval, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = 'drop'
      ) %>%
      mutate(Group = group_name) %>%
      arrange(desc(prob))
    
    return(lr_summary)
  } else {
    return(data.frame())
  }
}

# 生成详细的配体-受体对摘要
lr_summary_bhi <- generate_detailed_LR_summary(cellchat_bhi, "BHI")
lr_summary_pea <- generate_detailed_LR_summary(cellchat_pea, "PEA")

# 合并并保存
if (nrow(lr_summary_bhi) > 0 || nrow(lr_summary_pea) > 0) {
  total_lr_summary <- rbind(lr_summary_bhi, lr_summary_pea)
  write.csv(total_lr_summary, file.path(output_dir, "detailed_LR_pairs_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("详细配体-受体对摘要已保存到 detailed_LR_pairs_summary.csv\n")
}

# 生成通路活跃度摘要
generate_pathway_summary <- function(cellchat_obj, group_name) {
  pathways <- cellchat_obj@netP$pathways
  
  if (length(pathways) > 0) {
    pathway_summary <- data.frame(
      Group = group_name,
      Pathway = pathways,
      Total_Interactions = numeric(length(pathways)),
      Total_Strength = numeric(length(pathways)),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    for (i in seq_along(pathways)) {
      pathway <- pathways[i]
      # 计算该通路的总交互数和强度
      pathway_net <- cellchat_obj@netP$prob[,,pathway]
      pathway_summary$Total_Interactions[i] <- sum(pathway_net > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
      pathway_summary$Total_Strength[i] <- round(sum(pathway_net, na.rm = TRUE), 4)
    }
    
    return(pathway_summary[order(pathway_summary$Total_Strength, decreasing = TRUE), ])
  } else {
    return(data.frame())
  }
}

# 生成通路摘要
pathway_summary_bhi <- generate_pathway_summary(cellchat_bhi, "BHI")
pathway_summary_pea <- generate_pathway_summary(cellchat_pea, "PEA")

# 合并并保存
if (nrow(pathway_summary_bhi) > 0 || nrow(pathway_summary_pea) > 0) {
  total_pathway_summary <- rbind(pathway_summary_bhi, pathway_summary_pea)
  write.csv(total_pathway_summary, file.path(output_dir, "pathway_activity_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("通路活跃度摘要已保存到 pathway_activity_summary.csv\n")
}

cat("所有CSV摘要文件生成完成！\n")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：全局比较与差异分析（修复NA细胞显示问题）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤3：全局比较与差异分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 确保两个CellChat对象的细胞类型标签一致（移除NA相关的水平）
cellchat_bhi@idents <- droplevels(cellchat_bhi@idents)
cellchat_pea@idents <- droplevels(cellchat_pea@idents)

cellchat_merged <- mergeCellChat(list(BHI = cellchat_bhi, PEA = cellchat_pea), 
                                 add.names = c("BHI", "PEA"))

# --- 1. 全局交互比较 (柱状图) ---
tryCatch({
  gg1 <- compareInteractions(cellchat_merged, show.legend = FALSE, group = c(1, 2))
  gg2 <- compareInteractions(cellchat_merged, show.legend = FALSE, group = c(1, 2), 
                             measure = "weight")
  p_global <- gg1 + gg2
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "01_global_interaction_comparison.png"), 
         p_global, width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "01_global_interaction_comparison.pdf"), 
         p_global, width = 12, height = 5)
  
  # 提取并保存交互数据
  interaction_summary <- data.frame(
    Group = c("BHI", "PEA"),
    Number_of_interactions = c(
      sum(cellchat_bhi@net$count > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      sum(cellchat_pea@net$count > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    Total_interaction_weight = c(
      sum(cellchat_bhi@net$weight, na.rm = TRUE),
      sum(cellchat_pea@net$weight, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  )
  write.csv(interaction_summary, 
            file.path(output_dir, "global_interaction_comparison_data.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
}, error = function(e) {
  cat(sprintf("全局交互比较时出错: %s\n", e$message))
})

# --- 2. 比较不同条件下的网络圈图 (Circle Plots) - 修复版本 ---
tryCatch({
  group.names <- names(cellchat_merged@net)
  all_weights <- c(cellchat_merged@net[[group.names[1]]]$weight, 
                   cellchat_merged@net[[group.names[2]]]$weight)
  weight.MinMax <- c(min(all_weights[all_weights > 0]), max(all_weights))
  
  # 使用修复后的细胞类型标签
  valid_labels_1 <- levels(cellchat_bhi@idents)
  valid_labels_2 <- levels(cellchat_pea@idents)
  
  gg1 <- netVisual_circle(cellchat_merged@net[[group.names[1]]]$count, 
                          weight.scale = TRUE, label.edge = FALSE, 
                          edge.weight.max = weight.MinMax[2], edge.width.max = 12, 
                          title.name = paste0("Number of interactions - ", group.names[1]),
                          vertex.label = valid_labels_1)
  gg2 <- netVisual_circle(cellchat_merged@net[[group.names[2]]]$count, 
                          weight.scale = TRUE, label.edge = FALSE, 
                          edge.weight.max = weight.MinMax[2], edge.width.max = 12, 
                          title.name = paste0("Number of interactions - ", group.names[2]),
                          vertex.label = valid_labels_2)
  p_circle_comparison <- gg1 + gg2
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "02_network_comparison_circle.png"), 
         p_circle_comparison, width = 11, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "02_network_comparison_circle.pdf"), 
         p_circle_comparison, width = 11, height = 6)
}, error = function(e) {
  cat(sprintf("网络圈图绘制时出错: %s\n", e$message))
})

# --- 3. 比较信号通路热图 (Heatmap) ---
tryCatch({
  p_heatmap_comparison <- netVisual_heatmap(cellchat_merged, color.heatmap = "Reds") + 
                         netVisual_heatmap(cellchat_merged, measure = "weight", 
                                         color.heatmap = "Reds")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "03_interaction_heatmap.png"), 
         p_heatmap_comparison, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "03_interaction_heatmap.pdf"), 
         p_heatmap_comparison, width = 12, height = 6)
}, error = function(e) {
  cat(sprintf("热图绘制时出错: %s\n", e$message))
})

# --- 4. 差异配体-受体气泡图 ---
tryCatch({
  p_diff_bubble <- netVisual_bubble(cellchat_merged, comparison = c(1, 2), 
                                    angle.x = 45, max.dataset = 2,
                                    title.name = "Increased signaling in PEA", 
                                    signaling.group = "PEA")
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "04_differential_LR_pairs_bubble.png"), 
         p_diff_bubble, width = 12, height = 15, dpi = 300, limitsize = FALSE)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "04_differential_LR_pairs_bubble.pdf"), 
         p_diff_bubble, width = 12, height = 15, limitsize = FALSE)
  
  # 保存差异通路数据
  diff_data <- rankNet(cellchat_merged, mode = "comparison", stacked = FALSE, 
                       do.stat = TRUE)
  write.csv(diff_data, file.path(output_dir, "differential_pathways_data.csv"), 
            row.names = TRUE)
}, error = function(e) {
  cat(sprintf("差异分析时出错: %s\n", e$message))
})

cat("全局比较和差异分析已完成\n")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：为所有细胞类型生成详细信号图（修复NA细胞显示）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤4：为所有细胞类型生成详细信号图 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

dir_bhi_details <- file.path(output_dir, "All_Cells_BHI_Details")
dir_pea_details <- file.path(output_dir, "All_Cells_PEA_Details")
dir.create(dir_bhi_details, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(dir_pea_details, showWarnings = FALSE)

# 保存所有交互信息
write.csv(subsetCommunication(cellchat_bhi), 
          file.path(dir_bhi_details, "all_interactions_bhi.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(subsetCommunication(cellchat_pea), 
          file.path(dir_pea_details, "all_interactions_pea.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# 获取有效的细胞类型（已经移除了NA）
cell_types_bhi <- levels(cellchat_bhi@idents)
cell_types_pea <- levels(cellchat_pea@idents)
cell_types_in_chat <- intersect(cell_types_bhi, cell_types_pea)

cat(sprintf("BHI组细胞类型: %s\n", paste(cell_types_bhi, collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("PEA组细胞类型: %s\n", paste(cell_types_pea, collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("共同细胞类型: %s\n", paste(cell_types_in_chat, collapse = ", ")))

# 为BHI组的每个细胞类型生成图表
for (cell_type in cell_types_bhi) {
  cat(sprintf("--- 正在为BHI组细胞类型 '%s' 生成图表 ---\n", cell_type))
  
  tryCatch({
    p_out_bhi <- netVisual_bubble(cellchat_bhi, sources.use = cell_type, 
                                  remove.isolate = FALSE) + 
                 labs(title = sprintf("Outgoing from %s in BHI", cell_type))
    ggsave(file.path(dir_bhi_details, sprintf("outgoing_%s.png", cell_type)), 
           p_out_bhi, width = 10, height = 12, dpi = 300, limitsize = FALSE)
    ggsave(file.path(dir_bhi_details, sprintf("outgoing_%s.pdf", cell_type)), 
           p_out_bhi, width = 10, height = 12, limitsize = FALSE)
    
    p_in_bhi <- netVisual_bubble(cellchat_bhi, targets.use = cell_type, 
                                 remove.isolate = FALSE) + 
                labs(title = sprintf("Incoming to %s in BHI", cell_type))
    ggsave(file.path(dir_bhi_details, sprintf("incoming_%s.png", cell_type)), 
           p_in_bhi, width = 10, height = 12, dpi = 300, limitsize = FALSE)
    ggsave(file.path(dir_bhi_details, sprintf("incoming_%s.pdf", cell_type)), 
           p_in_bhi, width = 10, height = 12, limitsize = FALSE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("处理BHI组细胞类型 '%s' 时出错: %s\n", cell_type, e$message))
  })
}

# 为PEA组的每个细胞类型生成图表
for (cell_type in cell_types_pea) {
  cat(sprintf("--- 正在为PEA组细胞类型 '%s' 生成图表 ---\n", cell_type))
  
  tryCatch({
    p_out_pea <- netVisual_bubble(cellchat_pea, sources.use = cell_type, 
                                  remove.isolate = FALSE) + 
                 labs(title = sprintf("Outgoing from %s in PEA", cell_type))
    ggsave(file.path(dir_pea_details, sprintf("outgoing_%s.png", cell_type)), 
           p_out_pea, width = 10, height = 12, dpi = 300, limitsize = FALSE)
    ggsave(file.path(dir_pea_details, sprintf("outgoing_%s.pdf", cell_type)), 
           p_out_pea, width = 10, height = 12, limitsize = FALSE)
    
    p_in_pea <- netVisual_bubble(cellchat_pea, targets.use = cell_type, 
                                 remove.isolate = FALSE) + 
                labs(title = sprintf("Incoming to %s in PEA", cell_type))
    ggsave(file.path(dir_pea_details, sprintf("incoming_%s.png", cell_type)), 
           p_in_pea, width = 10, height = 12, dpi = 300, limitsize = FALSE)
    ggsave(file.path(dir_pea_details, sprintf("incoming_%s.pdf", cell_type)), 
           p_in_pea, width = 10, height = 12, limitsize = FALSE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("处理PEA组细胞类型 '%s' 时出错: %s\n", cell_type, e$message))
  })
}

cat("所有细胞类型的详细信号图已生成\n")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：重点细胞深度分析（完全修正版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤5：重点细胞深度分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

dir_focus <- file.path(output_dir, "Special_Focus_Epi_Tuft")
dir.create(dir_focus, showWarnings = FALSE)

focus_cells <- c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
focus_cells_bhi <- intersect(focus_cells, cell_types_bhi)
focus_cells_pea <- intersect(focus_cells, cell_types_pea)

cat(sprintf("重点细胞在BHI组: %s\n", paste(focus_cells_bhi, collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("重点细胞在PEA组: %s\n", paste(focus_cells_pea, collapse = ", ")))

# 完全修正的chord图绘制函数
draw_focus_chord <- function(cellchat_obj, cell_types, condition_name, dir_focus) {
  if(length(cell_types) > 1) {
    tryCatch({
      # 方法1：使用net参数绘制所有通讯
      pdf(file.path(dir_focus, paste0("focus_cells_interactions_", condition_name, ".pdf")), 
          width = 8, height = 8)
      netVisual_chord_cell(cellchat_obj, 
                          net = cellchat_obj@net$count,
                          sources.use = cell_types, 
                          targets.use = cell_types, 
                          lab.cex = 0.5, 
                          legend.pos.y = 30)
      dev.off()
      
      png(file.path(dir_focus, paste0("focus_cells_interactions_", condition_name, ".png")), 
          width = 8*100, height = 8*100, res=100)
      netVisual_chord_cell(cellchat_obj, 
                          net = cellchat_obj@net$count,
                          sources.use = cell_types, 
                          targets.use = cell_types, 
                          lab.cex = 0.5, 
                          legend.pos.y = 30)
      dev.off()
      
      cat(sprintf("%s组重点细胞chord图绘制成功\n", condition_name))
      return(TRUE)
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("%s组chord图绘制失败: %s\n", condition_name, e$message))
      
      # 备选方案1：使用netVisual_circle
      tryCatch({
        pdf(file.path(dir_focus, paste0("focus_cells_circle_", condition_name, ".pdf")), 
            width = 8, height = 8)
        netVisual_circle(cellchat_obj@net$count, 
                        sources.use = cell_types, 
                        targets.use = cell_types,
                        vertex.label.cex = 0.8)
        dev.off()
        
        png(file.path(dir_focus, paste0("focus_cells_circle_", condition_name, ".png")), 
            width = 8*100, height = 8*100, res=100)
        netVisual_circle(cellchat_obj@net$count, 
                        sources.use = cell_types, 
                        targets.use = cell_types,
                        vertex.label.cex = 0.8)
        dev.off()
        
        cat(sprintf("%s组重点细胞circle图绘制成功（备选方案）\n", condition_name))
        return(TRUE)
      }, error = function(e2) {
        cat(sprintf("%s组circle图也失败: %s\n", condition_name, e2$message))
        
        # 备选方案2：使用netVisual_heatmap
        tryCatch({
          pdf(file.path(dir_focus, paste0("focus_cells_heatmap_", condition_name, ".pdf")), 
              width = 6, height = 5)
          netVisual_heatmap(cellchat_obj, 
                           sources.use = cell_types, 
                           targets.use = cell_types,
                           font.size = 8)
          dev.off()
          
          png(file.path(dir_focus, paste0("focus_cells_heatmap_", condition_name, ".png")), 
              width = 6*100, height = 5*100, res=100)
          netVisual_heatmap(cellchat_obj, 
                           sources.use = cell_types, 
                           targets.use = cell_types,
                           font.size = 8)
          dev.off()
          
          cat(sprintf("%s组重点细胞heatmap绘制成功（最终备选方案）\n", condition_name))
          return(TRUE)
        }, error = function(e3) {
          cat(sprintf("%s组所有可视化方案都失败\n", condition_name))
          return(FALSE)
        })
      })
    })
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("%s组重点细胞数量不足，跳过可视化\n", condition_name))
    return(FALSE)
  }
}

# 绘制重点细胞间的整体通讯
draw_focus_chord(cellchat_bhi, focus_cells_bhi, "BHI", dir_focus)
draw_focus_chord(cellchat_pea, focus_cells_pea, "PEA", dir_focus)

# 修正的特定信号通路chord图绘制函数
draw_pathway_chord <- function(cellchat_obj, pathway_name, cell_types, condition_name, dir_focus) {
  if(pathway_name %in% cellchat_obj@netP$pathways) {
    tryCatch({
      # 使用signaling参数绘制特定通路
      pdf(file.path(dir_focus, paste0("pathway_", pathway_name, "_chord_", condition_name, ".pdf")), 
          width = 8, height = 8)
      netVisual_chord_cell(cellchat_obj, 
                          signaling = pathway_name,
                          sources.use = cell_types, 
                          targets.use = cell_types, 
                          lab.cex = 0.5)
      dev.off()
      
      png(file.path(dir_focus, paste0("pathway_", pathway_name, "_chord_", condition_name, ".png")), 
          width = 8*100, height = 8*100, res=100)
      netVisual_chord_cell(cellchat_obj, 
                          signaling = pathway_name,
                          sources.use = cell_types, 
                          targets.use = cell_types, 
                          lab.cex = 0.5)
      dev.off()
      
      cat(sprintf("%s组%s通路chord图绘制成功\n", condition_name, pathway_name))
      return(TRUE)
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("%s组%s通路chord图绘制失败: %s\n", condition_name, pathway_name, e$message))
      
      # 备选：pathway的circle图
      tryCatch({
        pdf(file.path(dir_focus, paste0("pathway_", pathway_name, "_circle_", condition_name, ".pdf")), 
            width = 6, height = 6)
        netVisual_aggregate(cellchat_obj, 
                           signaling = pathway_name,
                           sources.use = cell_types, 
                           targets.use = cell_types,
                           layout = "circle")
        dev.off()
        
        cat(sprintf("%s组%s通路circle图绘制成功（备选方案）\n", condition_name, pathway_name))
        return(TRUE)
      }, error = function(e2) {
        cat(sprintf("%s组%s通路所有可视化都失败\n", condition_name, pathway_name))
        return(FALSE)
      })
    })
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("%s通路在%s组中不存在\n", pathway_name, condition_name))
    return(FALSE)
  }
}

# 分析重点信号通路（选择在两组中都存在的通路）
common_pathways <- intersect(cellchat_bhi@netP$pathways, cellchat_pea@netP$pathways)
important_pathways <- c("EGF", "BMP", "LAMININ", "THBS", "DESMOSOME")
target_pathways <- intersect(important_pathways, common_pathways)

cat("\n分析的重点信号通路:", paste(target_pathways, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# 为每个重点通路绘制图
for(pathway in target_pathways) {
  cat(sprintf("\n正在分析%s通路...\n", pathway))
  
  # BHI组
  if(length(focus_cells_bhi) > 0) {
    draw_pathway_chord(cellchat_bhi, pathway, focus_cells_bhi, "BHI", dir_focus)
  }
  
  # PEA组
  if(length(focus_cells_pea) > 0) {
    draw_pathway_chord(cellchat_pea, pathway, focus_cells_pea, "PEA", dir_focus)
  }
}

# 详细的通讯强度分析
analyze_detailed_communication <- function(cellchat_obj, cell_types, condition_name, dir_focus) {
  if(length(cell_types) > 1) {
    cat(sprintf("\n=== %s组重点细胞详细通讯分析 ===\n", condition_name))
    
    # 1. 整体通讯强度
    net_count <- cellchat_obj@net$count
    net_weight <- cellchat_obj@net$weight
    
    if(!is.null(net_count) && !is.null(net_weight)) {
      focus_count <- net_count[cell_types, cell_types, drop = FALSE]
      focus_weight <- net_weight[cell_types, cell_types, drop = FALSE]
      
      # 保存通讯矩阵
      write.csv(focus_count, 
               file.path(dir_focus, paste0("communication_count_", condition_name, ".csv")))
      write.csv(focus_weight, 
               file.path(dir_focus, paste0("communication_weight_", condition_name, ".csv")))
```
