```{r}
      # 统计信息
      total_interactions <- sum(focus_count > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
      max_count <- max(focus_count, na.rm = TRUE)
      mean_weight <- mean(focus_weight[focus_count > 0], na.rm = TRUE)
      
      cat(sprintf("总相互作用数: %d\n", total_interactions))
      cat(sprintf("最大通讯强度: %.2f\n", max_count))
      cat(sprintf("平均通讯权重: %.4f\n", mean_weight))
      
      # 找出前5强的通讯
      if(total_interactions > 0) {
        interactions_df <- expand.grid(Source = cell_types, Target = cell_types)
        interactions_df$Count <- as.vector(focus_count)
        interactions_df$Weight <- as.vector(focus_weight)
        interactions_df <- interactions_df[interactions_df$Count > 0, ]
        interactions_df <- interactions_df[order(interactions_df$Count, decreasing = TRUE), ]
        
        cat("前5强通讯:\n")
        top_interactions <- head(interactions_df, 5)
        for(i in 1:nrow(top_interactions)) {
          cat(sprintf("  %s -> %s: 数量=%d, 权重=%.4f\n", 
                     top_interactions$Source[i], 
                     top_interactions$Target[i],
                     top_interactions$Count[i], 
                     top_interactions$Weight[i]))
        }
        
        # 保存详细相互作用表
        write.csv(interactions_df, 
                 file.path(dir_focus, paste0("detailed_interactions_", condition_name, ".csv")), 
                 row.names = FALSE)
      }
    }
  }
}

# 进行详细分析
analyze_detailed_communication(cellchat_bhi, focus_cells_bhi, "BHI", dir_focus)
analyze_detailed_communication(cellchat_pea, focus_cells_pea, "PEA", dir_focus)

# 比较分析
compare_conditions <- function(cellchat1, cellchat2, cell_types1, cell_types2, dir_focus) {
  common_cells <- intersect(cell_types1, cell_types2)
  if(length(common_cells) > 1) {
    cat(sprintf("\n=== 条件间比较分析（共同细胞: %s) ===\n", paste(common_cells, collapse = ", ")))
    
    # 提取共同细胞的通讯数据
    count1 <- cellchat1@net$count[common_cells, common_cells, drop = FALSE]
    count2 <- cellchat2@net$count[common_cells, common_cells, drop = FALSE]
    
    # 计算差异
    diff_count <- count2 - count1
    
    # 保存比较结果
    write.csv(diff_count, 
             file.path(dir_focus, "communication_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv"))
    
    # 找出变化最大的通讯
    max_increase <- which(diff_count == max(diff_count, na.rm = TRUE), arr.ind = TRUE)
    max_decrease <- which(diff_count == min(diff_count, na.rm = TRUE), arr.ind = TRUE)
    
    if(length(max_increase) > 0) {
      source_inc <- rownames(diff_count)[max_increase[1,1]]
      target_inc <- colnames(diff_count)[max_increase[1,2]]
      change_inc <- diff_count[max_increase[1,1], max_increase[1,2]]
      cat(sprintf("最大增强通讯: %s -> %s (变化: +%.2f)\n", source_inc, target_inc, change_inc))
    }
    
    if(length(max_decrease) > 0) {
      source_dec <- rownames(diff_count)[max_decrease[1,1]]
      target_dec <- colnames(diff_count)[max_decrease[1,2]]
      change_dec <- diff_count[max_decrease[1,1], max_decrease[1,2]]
      cat(sprintf("最大减弱通讯: %s -> %s (变化: %.2f)\n", source_dec, target_dec, change_dec))
    }
  }
}

compare_conditions(cellchat_bhi, cellchat_pea, focus_cells_bhi, focus_cells_pea, dir_focus)

cat("\n重点细胞的深度分析已完成\n")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：生成最终报告
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤6：生成最终报告 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 创建最终报告
final_report <- list(
  "分析概述" = list(
    "BHI组细胞数" = ncol(seurat_bhi),
    "PEA组细胞数" = ncol(seurat_pea),
    "BHI组细胞类型数" = length(cell_types_bhi),
    "PEA组细胞类型数" = length(cell_types_pea),
    "共同细胞类型数" = length(cell_types_in_chat),
    "移除的NA细胞数" = sum(is.na(seurat_pure$refined_celltype))
  ),
  "生成的文件" = list(
    "总体通讯摘要" = "total_communication_summary.csv",
    "详细配体受体对" = "detailed_LR_pairs_summary.csv", 
    "通路活跃度摘要" = "pathway_activity_summary.csv",
    "全局交互比较" = "global_interaction_comparison_data.csv",
    "差异通路数据" = "differential_pathways_data.csv"
  ),
  "重点细胞分析" = list(
    "目标细胞" = focus_cells,
    "BHI组存在" = focus_cells_bhi,
    "PEA组存在" = focus_cells_pea,
    "分析的重点通路" = target_pathways
  )
)

# 保存报告
sink(file.path(output_dir, "final_analysis_report.txt"))
cat("=== 细胞通讯分析最终报告 ===\n\n")
cat("生成时间:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n\n")

for(section_name in names(final_report)) {
  cat(sprintf("=== %s ===\n", section_name))
  section_data <- final_report[[section_name]]
  for(item_name in names(section_data)) {
    if(is.character(section_data[[item_name]]) && length(section_data[[item_name]]) > 1) {
      cat(sprintf("%s: %s\n", item_name, paste(section_data[[item_name]], collapse = ", ")))
    } else {
      cat(sprintf("%s: %s\n", item_name, section_data[[item_name]]))
    }
  }
  cat("\n")
}

cat("=== 输出目录结构 ===\n")
cat(sprintf("主要结果保存在: %s\n", output_dir))
cat("- 总体CSV文件\n")
cat("- 全局比较图片和数据\n")
cat("- All_Cells_BHI_Details/: BHI组各细胞类型详细分析\n")
cat("- All_Cells_PEA_Details/: PEA组各细胞类型详细分析\n")
cat("- Special_Focus_Epi_Tuft/: 重点细胞深度分析\n")
cat("\n分析完成！\n")
sink()

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 所有分析步骤已完成！ =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n")

# 输出分析摘要
cat("\n分析摘要：\n")
cat(sprintf("- BHI组细胞数: %d\n", ncol(seurat_bhi)))
cat(sprintf("- PEA组细胞数: %d\n", ncol(seurat_pea)))
cat(sprintf("- BHI组细胞类型数: %d\n", length(cell_types_bhi)))
cat(sprintf("- PEA组细胞类型数: %d\n", length(cell_types_pea)))
cat(sprintf("- 共同细胞类型数: %d\n", length(cell_types_in_chat)))
cat(sprintf("- 分析的重点细胞: %s\n", paste(focus_cells, collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("- BHI组存在的重点细胞: %s\n", paste(focus_cells_bhi, collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("- PEA组存在的重点细胞: %s\n", paste(focus_cells_pea, collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("\n主要CSV文件已生成:\n"))
cat("- total_communication_summary.csv: 总体通讯摘要\n")
cat("- detailed_LR_pairs_summary.csv: 详细配体-受体对\n")
cat("- pathway_activity_summary.csv: 通路活跃度摘要\n")
cat(sprintf("\n结果保存在: %s\n", output_dir))

```
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 步骤7：生成详细的通讯差异分析文件
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤7：生成详细通讯差异分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 函数：生成详细的配体-受体对差异分析
generate_detailed_communication_difference <- function(cellchat_bhi, cellchat_pea, output_dir) {
  
  # 1. 获取两组的所有通讯信息
  cat("正在提取BHI组通讯信息...\n")
  comm_bhi <- subsetCommunication(cellchat_bhi)
  
  cat("正在提取PEA组通讯信息...\n")
  comm_pea <- subsetCommunication(cellchat_pea)
  
  if(nrow(comm_bhi) == 0 && nrow(comm_pea) == 0) {
    cat("警告：两组都没有检测到通讯，跳过差异分析\n")
    return()
  }
  
  # 2. 为每组数据添加组别标识
  if(nrow(comm_bhi) > 0) {
    comm_bhi$Group <- "BHI"
  }
  if(nrow(comm_pea) > 0) {
    comm_pea$Group <- "PEA"
  }
  
  # 3. 合并数据
  all_communications <- rbind(
    if(nrow(comm_bhi) > 0) comm_bhi else data.frame(),
    if(nrow(comm_pea) > 0) comm_pea else data.frame()
  )
  
  if(nrow(all_communications) == 0) {
    cat("警告：没有检测到任何通讯，跳过差异分析\n")
    return()
  }
  
  # 4. 创建通讯标识符
  all_communications$comm_id <- paste(
    all_communications$source, 
    all_communications$target, 
    all_communications$ligand, 
    all_communications$receptor, 
    sep = "_"
  )
  
  # 5. 计算每个通讯对在两组中的差异
  cat("正在计算通讯差异...\n")
  
  # 获取所有唯一的通讯对
  unique_comms <- unique(all_communications$comm_id)
  
  # 初始化差异分析结果
  diff_results <- data.frame(
    source = character(),
    target = character(),
    ligand = character(),
    receptor = character(),
    pathway_name = character(),
    prob_BHI = numeric(),
    prob_PEA = numeric(),
    prob_difference = numeric(),
    pval_BHI = numeric(),
    pval_PEA = numeric(),
    significance_BHI = character(),
    significance_PEA = character(),
    change_direction = character(),
    fold_change = numeric(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  for(comm_id in unique_comms) {
    # 获取该通讯在两组中的信息
    bhi_info <- all_communications[all_communications$comm_id == comm_id & 
                                   all_communications$Group == "BHI", ]
    pea_info <- all_communications[all_communications$comm_id == comm_id & 
                                   all_communications$Group == "PEA", ]
    
    # 获取基本信息（使用任一组的信息）
    if(nrow(bhi_info) > 0) {
      ref_info <- bhi_info[1, ]
    } else {
      ref_info <- pea_info[1, ]
    }
    
    # 获取概率值
    prob_bhi <- ifelse(nrow(bhi_info) > 0, bhi_info$prob[1], 0)
    prob_pea <- ifelse(nrow(pea_info) > 0, pea_info$prob[1], 0)
    
    # 获取p值
    pval_bhi <- ifelse(nrow(bhi_info) > 0, bhi_info$pval[1], 1)
    pval_pea <- ifelse(nrow(pea_info) > 0, pea_info$pval[1], 1)
    
    # 计算差异
    prob_diff <- prob_pea - prob_bhi
    
    # 计算倍数变化
    fold_change <- ifelse(prob_bhi > 0, prob_pea / prob_bhi, 
                         ifelse(prob_pea > 0, Inf, 1))
    
    # 确定变化方向
    if(abs(prob_diff) < 0.01) {
      change_direction <- "No_change"
    } else if(prob_diff > 0) {
      change_direction <- "Increased_in_PEA"
    } else {
      change_direction <- "Decreased_in_PEA"
    }
    
    # 确定显著性
    sig_bhi <- ifelse(pval_bhi < 0.05, "Significant", "Not_significant")
    sig_pea <- ifelse(pval_pea < 0.05, "Significant", "Not_significant")
    
    # 添加到结果中
    diff_results <- rbind(diff_results, data.frame(
      source = ref_info$source,
      target = ref_info$target,
      ligand = ref_info$ligand,
      receptor = ref_info$receptor,
      pathway_name = ref_info$pathway_name,
      prob_BHI = round(prob_bhi, 6),
      prob_PEA = round(prob_pea, 6),
      prob_difference = round(prob_diff, 6),
      pval_BHI = round(pval_bhi, 6),
      pval_PEA = round(pval_pea, 6),
      significance_BHI = sig_bhi,
      significance_PEA = sig_pea,
      change_direction = change_direction,
      fold_change = round(fold_change, 3),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  
  # 6. 按差异程度排序
  diff_results <- diff_results[order(abs(diff_results$prob_difference), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  
  # 7. 保存详细差异文件
  write.csv(diff_results, 
            file.path(output_dir, "detailed_communication_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat(sprintf("详细通讯差异分析已保存，共分析了 %d 个通讯对\n", nrow(diff_results)))
  
  # 8. 生成差异摘要
  increased_significant <- sum(diff_results$change_direction == "Increased_in_PEA" & 
                              (diff_results$significance_PEA == "Significant" | 
                               diff_results$significance_BHI == "Significant"))
  decreased_significant <- sum(diff_results$change_direction == "Decreased_in_PEA" & 
                              (diff_results$significance_PEA == "Significant" | 
                               diff_results$significance_BHI == "Significant"))
  
  cat(sprintf("- PEA组中显著增强的通讯: %d\n", increased_significant))
  cat(sprintf("- PEA组中显著减弱的通讯: %d\n", decreased_significant))
  
  # 9. 生成top变化的摘要
  cat("\n=== 前10个变化最大的通讯对 ===\n")
  top_changes <- head(diff_results, 10)
  for(i in 1:nrow(top_changes)) {
    cat(sprintf("%d. %s -> %s (%s-%s): %.4f (PEA) - %.4f (BHI) = %.4f (%s)\n",
               i,
               top_changes$source[i],
               top_changes$target[i], 
               top_changes$ligand[i],
               top_changes$receptor[i],
               top_changes$prob_PEA[i],
               top_changes$prob_BHI[i],
               top_changes$prob_difference[i],
               top_changes$change_direction[i]))
  }
  
  # 10. 按通路分组的差异分析
  pathway_summary <- diff_results %>%
    group_by(pathway_name) %>%
    summarise(
      total_communications = n(),
      increased_in_PEA = sum(change_direction == "Increased_in_PEA"),
      decreased_in_PEA = sum(change_direction == "Decreased_in_PEA"),
      no_change = sum(change_direction == "No_change"),
      avg_difference = mean(prob_difference),
      max_increase = max(prob_difference[prob_difference > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
      max_decrease = min(prob_difference[prob_difference < 0], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(avg_difference)))
  
  # 将Inf和-Inf替换为NA
  pathway_summary$max_increase[is.infinite(pathway_summary$max_increase)] <- NA
  pathway_summary$max_decrease[is.infinite(pathway_summary$max_decrease)] <- NA
  
  write.csv(pathway_summary, 
            file.path(output_dir, "pathway_difference_summary_PEA_vs_BHI.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat(sprintf("\n通路差异摘要已保存到 pathway_difference_summary_PEA_vs_BHI.csv\n"))
  
  return(diff_results)
}

# 生成详细的通讯差异分析
tryCatch({
  detailed_diff <- generate_detailed_communication_difference(cellchat_bhi, cellchat_pea, output_dir)
  cat("详细通讯差异分析完成！\n")
}, error = function(e) {
  cat(sprintf("生成详细通讯差异分析时出错: %s\n", e$message))
})

# =============================================================================
# 步骤8：生成细胞类型间通讯强度矩阵差异
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤8：生成细胞间通讯强度矩阵差异 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 函数：生成细胞类型间的通讯强度矩阵差异
generate_celltype_communication_matrix_difference <- function(cellchat_bhi, cellchat_pea, output_dir) {
  
  # 获取共同的细胞类型
  bhi_celltypes <- levels(cellchat_bhi@idents)
  pea_celltypes <- levels(cellchat_pea@idents)
  common_celltypes <- intersect(bhi_celltypes, pea_celltypes)
  
  if(length(common_celltypes) < 2) {
    cat("警告：共同细胞类型少于2个，跳过矩阵差异分析\n")
    return()
  }
  
  cat(sprintf("正在分析 %d 个共同细胞类型的通讯矩阵差异...\n", length(common_celltypes)))
  
  # 提取通讯矩阵
  count_bhi <- cellchat_bhi@net$count[common_celltypes, common_celltypes, drop = FALSE]
  count_pea <- cellchat_pea@net$count[common_celltypes, common_celltypes, drop = FALSE]
  
  weight_bhi <- cellchat_bhi@net$weight[common_celltypes, common_celltypes, drop = FALSE]
  weight_pea <- cellchat_pea@net$weight[common_celltypes, common_celltypes, drop = FALSE]
  
  # 计算差异矩阵
  count_diff <- count_pea - count_bhi
  weight_diff <- weight_pea - weight_bhi
  
  # 保存矩阵文件
  write.csv(count_bhi, file.path(output_dir, "communication_count_matrix_BHI.csv"))
  write.csv(count_pea, file.path(output_dir, "communication_count_matrix_PEA.csv"))
  write.csv(count_diff, file.path(output_dir, "communication_count_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv"))
  
  write.csv(weight_bhi, file.path(output_dir, "communication_weight_matrix_BHI.csv"))
  write.csv(weight_pea, file.path(output_dir, "communication_weight_matrix_PEA.csv"))
  write.csv(weight_diff, file.path(output_dir, "communication_weight_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv"))
  
  # 生成详细的差异表格
  detailed_matrix_diff <- data.frame(
    Source_Cell = character(),
    Target_Cell = character(),
    Count_BHI = numeric(),
    Count_PEA = numeric(),
    Count_Difference = numeric(),
    Weight_BHI = numeric(),
    Weight_PEA = numeric(),
    Weight_Difference = numeric(),
    Fold_Change_Count = numeric(),
    Fold_Change_Weight = numeric(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  for(i in 1:length(common_celltypes)) {
    for(j in 1:length(common_celltypes)) {
      source_cell <- common_celltypes[i]
      target_cell <- common_celltypes[j]
      
      count_bhi_val <- count_bhi[i, j]
      count_pea_val <- count_pea[i, j]
      count_diff_val <- count_diff[i, j]
      
      weight_bhi_val <- weight_bhi[i, j]
      weight_pea_val <- weight_pea[i, j]
      weight_diff_val <- weight_diff[i, j]
      
      # 计算倍数变化
      fold_change_count <- ifelse(count_bhi_val > 0, count_pea_val / count_bhi_val, 
                                 ifelse(count_pea_val > 0, Inf, 1))
      fold_change_weight <- ifelse(weight_bhi_val > 0, weight_pea_val / weight_bhi_val,
                                  ifelse(weight_pea_val > 0, Inf, 1))
      
      detailed_matrix_diff <- rbind(detailed_matrix_diff, data.frame(
        Source_Cell = source_cell,
        Target_Cell = target_cell,
        Count_BHI = round(count_bhi_val, 2),
        Count_PEA = round(count_pea_val, 2),
        Count_Difference = round(count_diff_val, 2),
        Weight_BHI = round(weight_bhi_val, 6),
        Weight_PEA = round(weight_pea_val, 6),
        Weight_Difference = round(weight_diff_val, 6),
        Fold_Change_Count = round(fold_change_count, 3),
        Fold_Change_Weight = round(fold_change_weight, 3),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
  
  # 按绝对差异排序
  detailed_matrix_diff <- detailed_matrix_diff[order(abs(detailed_matrix_diff$Count_Difference), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  
  # 保存详细差异表格
  write.csv(detailed_matrix_diff, 
            file.path(output_dir, "detailed_celltype_communication_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("细胞类型间通讯强度矩阵差异分析完成！\n")
  cat("生成的文件:\n")
  cat("- communication_count_matrix_BHI.csv\n")
  cat("- communication_count_matrix_PEA.csv\n")
  cat("- communication_count_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv\n")
  cat("- communication_weight_matrix_BHI.csv\n")
  cat("- communication_weight_matrix_PEA.csv\n")
  cat("- communication_weight_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv\n")
  cat("- detailed_celltype_communication_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv\n")
  
  # 输出前5个变化最大的细胞对
  cat("\n=== 前5个通讯数量变化最大的细胞对 ===\n")
  top_count_changes <- head(detailed_matrix_diff, 5)
  for(i in 1:nrow(top_count_changes)) {
    cat(sprintf("%d. %s -> %s: %.1f (PEA) - %.1f (BHI) = %.1f\n",
               i,
               top_count_changes$Source_Cell[i],
               top_count_changes$Target_Cell[i],
               top_count_changes$Count_PEA[i],
               top_count_changes$Count_BHI[i],
               top_count_changes$Count_Difference[i]))
  }
}

# 生成细胞类型间通讯强度矩阵差异
tryCatch({
  generate_celltype_communication_matrix_difference(cellchat_bhi, cellchat_pea, output_dir)
}, error = function(e) {
  cat(sprintf("生成细胞类型通讯矩阵差异时出错: %s\n", e$message))
})

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 详细差异分析全部完成！ =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("新生成的详细差异分析文件:\n")
cat("1. detailed_communication_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv - 详细的配体-受体对差异\n")
cat("2. pathway_difference_summary_PEA_vs_BHI.csv - 按通路分组的差异摘要\n") 
cat("3. detailed_celltype_communication_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv - 细胞类型间详细差异\n")
cat("4. communication_count/weight_difference_PEA_vs_BHI.csv - 通讯强度矩阵差异\n")
```



```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 机器学习分析：全面组合评估与敏感性分析（修复版）
# =============================================================================

# 加载必要的包
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(caret)
library(randomForest)
library(xgboost)
library(glmnet)
library(e1071)
library(nnet)
library(naivebayes)
library(ROCR)
library(pROC)
library(pheatmap)
library(doParallel)
library(infotheo)
library(gridExtra)

# 设置并行计算
cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

# 创建输出目录
ml_output_dir <- "machine_learning_comprehensive_analysis"
if (!dir.exists(ml_output_dir)) {
  dir.create(ml_output_dir)
}

# 创建子目录
roc_dir <- file.path(ml_output_dir, "ROC_curves")
sensitivity_dir <- file.path(ml_output_dir, "sensitivity_analysis")
if (!dir.exists(roc_dir)) dir.create(roc_dir)
if (!dir.exists(sensitivity_dir)) dir.create(sensitivity_dir)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：数据准备和清理
# =============================================================================
cat("=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤1：数据准备和NA处理 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 加载数据
seurat_obj <- readRDS(file.path("module_score_analysis", "seurat_with_module_scores.rds"))

# 提取表达矩阵
expression_data <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(GetAssayData(seurat_obj, slot = "data"))))
metadata <- seurat_obj@meta.data

# 去除NA值
cat("处理NA值...\n")
na_cells <- which(is.na(metadata$refined_celltype) | is.na(metadata$group))
if (length(na_cells) > 0) {
  expression_data <- expression_data[-na_cells, ]
  metadata <- metadata[-na_cells, ]
  cat(sprintf("移除 %d 个含NA的细胞\n", length(na_cells)))
}

# 填充表达矩阵中的NA值
for (i in 1:ncol(expression_data)) {
  if (any(is.na(expression_data[, i]))) {
    expression_data[is.na(expression_data[, i]), i] <- median(expression_data[, i], na.rm = TRUE)
  }
}

# 创建标签
y <- factor(metadata$group, levels = c("BHI", "PEA"))
X <- expression_data

# 预筛选高方差基因
gene_vars <- apply(X, 2, var)
top_var_genes <- names(sort(gene_vars, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(2000, ncol(X))])
X <- X[, top_var_genes]

cat(sprintf("数据维度: %d 细胞, %d 基因\n", nrow(X), ncol(X)))

# 数据划分
set.seed(123)
train_index <- createDataPartition(y, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
X_train <- X[train_index, ]
X_test <- X[-train_index, ]
y_train <- y[train_index]
y_test <- y[-train_index]

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：定义特征选择方法（不包含Boruta）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤2：特征选择方法定义 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 特征选择函数集合
feature_selection_methods <- list(
  # 1. LASSO
  LASSO = function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 50) {
    set.seed(123)
    cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(as.matrix(X_train), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, nfolds = 10)
    lasso_model <- glmnet(as.matrix(X_train), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, lambda = cv_lasso$lambda.1se)
    lasso_coef <- coef(lasso_model)
    selected <- rownames(lasso_coef)[which(lasso_coef != 0)][-1]
    if (length(selected) == 0) selected <- colnames(X_train)[1:min(n_features, ncol(X_train))]
    return(selected)
  },
  
  # 2. Elastic Net
  ElasticNet = function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 50) {
    set.seed(123)
    cv_enet <- cv.glmnet(as.matrix(X_train), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 0.5, nfolds = 10)
    enet_model <- glmnet(as.matrix(X_train), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 0.5, lambda = cv_enet$lambda.1se)
    enet_coef <- coef(enet_model)
    selected <- rownames(enet_coef)[which(enet_coef != 0)][-1]
    if (length(selected) == 0) selected <- colnames(X_train)[1:min(n_features, ncol(X_train))]
    return(selected)
  },
  
  # 3. Random Forest重要性
  RFE = function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 50) {
    set.seed(123)
    rf_model <- randomForest(x = X_train, y = y_train, ntree = 100, importance = TRUE)
    rf_importance <- importance(rf_model)[, "MeanDecreaseGini"]
    selected <- names(sort(rf_importance, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(n_features, length(rf_importance))])
    return(selected)
  },
  
  # 4. PCA
  PCA = function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 50) {
    pca_result <- prcomp(X_train, scale. = TRUE, center = TRUE)
    loadings <- abs(pca_result$rotation[, 1:min(10, ncol(pca_result$rotation))])
    importance <- rowSums(loadings)
    selected <- names(sort(importance, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(n_features, length(importance))])
    return(selected)
  },
  
  # 5. 互信息
  MutualInformation = function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 50) {
    mi_scores <- apply(X_train, 2, function(x) {
      discretize_x <- discretize(x, disc = "equalfreq", nbins = 5)
      mutinformation(discretize_x, as.numeric(y_train))
    })
    selected <- names(sort(mi_scores, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(n_features, length(mi_scores))])
    return(selected)
  },
  
  # 6. ANOVA F-test
  ANOVA = function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 50) {
    p_values <- apply(X_train, 2, function(x) {
      if (length(unique(x)) > 1) {
        anova(lm(x ~ y_train))$`Pr(>F)`[1]
      } else {
        1
      }
    })
    selected <- names(sort(p_values)[1:min(n_features, length(p_values))])
    return(selected)
  },
  
  # 7. 方差阈值
  Variance = function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 50) {
    vars <- apply(X_train, 2, var)
    selected <- names(sort(vars, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(n_features, length(vars))])
    return(selected)
  },
  
  # 8. Pearson相关性
  Pearson = function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 50) {
    cors <- apply(X_train, 2, function(x) abs(cor(x, as.numeric(y_train))))
    selected <- names(sort(cors, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(n_features, length(cors))])
    return(selected)
  },
  
  # 9. Spearman相关性
  Spearman = function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 50) {
    cors <- apply(X_train, 2, function(x) abs(cor(x, as.numeric(y_train), method = "spearman")))
    selected <- names(sort(cors, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(n_features, length(cors))])
    return(selected)
  },
  
  # 10. Kendall相关性
  Kendall = function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 50) {
    cors <- apply(X_train, 2, function(x) abs(cor(x, as.numeric(y_train), method = "kendall")))
    selected <- names(sort(cors, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(n_features, length(cors))])
    return(selected)
  }
)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：定义机器学习模型（修复神经网络）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤3：机器学习模型定义 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 模型训练和预测函数
ml_models <- list(
  # 1. Logistic Regression
  LogisticRegression = function(X_train, y_train, X_test) {
    # 处理完全分离问题
    tryCatch({
      model <- glm(y ~ ., data = data.frame(y = y_train, X_train), family = binomial)
      pred_prob <- predict(model, newdata = data.frame(X_test), type = "response")
    }, warning = function(w) {
      # 如果出现警告，使用正则化的逻辑回归
      cv_model <- cv.glmnet(as.matrix(X_train), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, nfolds = 5)
      model <- glmnet(as.matrix(X_train), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, lambda = cv_model$lambda.1se)
      pred_prob <- predict(model, as.matrix(X_test), type = "response")[, 1]
    })
    return(pred_prob)
  },
  
  # 2. Naive Bayes
  NaiveBayes = function(X_train, y_train, X_test) {
    model <- naive_bayes(x = X_train, y = y_train)
    pred_prob <- predict(model, X_test, type = "prob")[, 2]
    return(pred_prob)
  },
  
  # 3. Neural Network（修复版）
  NeuralNetwork = function(X_train, y_train, X_test) {
    # 限制输入特征数量避免权重过多
    max_features <- min(ncol(X_train), 50)
    if (ncol(X_train) > max_features) {
      # 选择最重要的特征
      vars <- apply(X_train, 2, var)
      selected_cols <- names(sort(vars, decreasing = TRUE)[1:max_features])
      X_train <- X_train[, selected_cols, drop = FALSE]
      X_test <- X_test[, selected_cols, drop = FALSE]
    }
    
    # 使用较小的隐藏层
    hidden_size <- min(5, ceiling(ncol(X_train) / 10))
    
    model <- nnet(y ~ ., data = data.frame(y = y_train, X_train), 
                  size = hidden_size, maxit = 100, trace = FALSE, MaxNWts = 10000)
    pred_prob <- predict(model, newdata = data.frame(X_test), type = "raw")[, 1]
    return(pred_prob)
  },
  
  # 4. Random Forest
  RandomForest = function(X_train, y_train, X_test) {
    model <- randomForest(x = X_train, y = y_train, ntree = 100)
    pred_prob <- predict(model, X_test, type = "prob")[, 2]
    return(pred_prob)
  },
  
  # 5. SVM
  SVM = function(X_train, y_train, X_test) {
    model <- svm(x = X_train, y = y_train, probability = TRUE, kernel = "radial")
    pred <- predict(model, X_test, probability = TRUE)
    pred_prob <- attr(pred, "probabilities")[, 2]
    return(pred_prob)
  },
  
  # 6. XGBoost
  XGBoost = function(X_train, y_train, X_test) {
    dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(as.matrix(X_train), label = as.numeric(y_train) - 1)
    dtest <- xgb.DMatrix(as.matrix(X_test))
    params <- list(objective = "binary:logistic", eval_metric = "auc", max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1)
    model <- xgb.train(params, dtrain, nrounds = 50, verbose = 0)
    pred_prob <- predict(model, dtest)
    return(pred_prob)
  },
  
  # 7. Ridge
  Ridge = function(X_train, y_train, X_test) {
    cv_ridge <- cv.glmnet(as.matrix(X_train), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 0, nfolds = 10)
    model <- glmnet(as.matrix(X_train), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 0, lambda = cv_ridge$lambda.1se)
    pred_prob <- predict(model, as.matrix(X_test), type = "response")[, 1]
    return(pred_prob)
  }
)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：评估所有组合（添加"All"特征选择）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤4：评估所有特征选择和模型组合 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 添加"All"特征选择（使用前100个高方差基因以避免过拟合）
feature_selection_methods$All <- function(X_train, y_train, n_features = 100) {
  vars <- apply(X_train, 2, var)
  selected <- names(sort(vars, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(n_features, ncol(X_train))])
  return(selected)
}

# 存储所有结果
all_results <- list()
performance_matrix <- matrix(NA, 
                           nrow = length(ml_models), 
                           ncol = length(feature_selection_methods))
rownames(performance_matrix) <- names(ml_models)
colnames(performance_matrix) <- names(feature_selection_methods)

# 存储所有ROC对象
all_roc_objects <- list()

# 遍历所有组合
for (fs_name in names(feature_selection_methods)) {
  cat(sprintf("\n--- 特征选择方法: %s ---\n", fs_name))
  
  # 选择特征
  tryCatch({
    selected_features <- feature_selection_methods[[fs_name]](X_train, y_train)
    
    # 确保至少有10个特征
    if (length(selected_features) < 10) {
      cat(sprintf("  特征数不足，跳过 %s\n", fs_name))
      next
    }
    
    cat(sprintf("  选择了 %d 个特征\n", length(selected_features)))
    
    # 准备数据
    X_train_fs <- X_train[, intersect(selected_features, colnames(X_train)), drop = FALSE]
    X_test_fs <- X_test[, intersect(selected_features, colnames(X_test)), drop = FALSE]
    
    # 对每个模型进行训练和评估
    for (model_name in names(ml_models)) {
      cat(sprintf("    训练 %s...\n", model_name))
      
      tryCatch({
        # 训练和预测
        pred_prob <- ml_models[[model_name]](X_train_fs, y_train, X_test_fs)
        
        # 计算AUC
        roc_obj <- roc(y_test, pred_prob, quiet = TRUE)
        auc_value <- auc(roc_obj)
        
        # 存储结果
        combo_name <- paste(fs_name, model_name, sep = "_")
        all_results[[combo_name]] <- list(
          feature_selection = fs_name,
          model = model_name,
          n_features = ncol(X_train_fs),
          auc = auc_value,
          roc_obj = roc_obj,
          pred_prob = pred_prob,
          selected_features = selected_features
        )
        
        # 更新性能矩阵
        performance_matrix[model_name, fs_name] <- auc_value
        
        # 存储ROC对象
        all_roc_objects[[combo_name]] <- roc_obj
        
      }, error = function(e) {
        cat(sprintf("      错误: %s\n", e$message))
      })
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  特征选择错误: %s\n", e$message))
  })
}

# 保存性能矩阵
write.csv(performance_matrix, file.path(ml_output_dir, "performance_matrix_all_combinations.csv"))

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：生成性能热图（修复angle_col参数）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤5：生成性能热图 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 将性能矩阵中的NA替换为0（用于可视化）
performance_matrix_vis <- performance_matrix
performance_matrix_vis[is.na(performance_matrix_vis)] <- 0

pdf(file.path(ml_output_dir, "performance_heatmap_all_combinations.pdf"), width = 14, height = 8)
pheatmap(performance_matrix_vis,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         breaks = seq(0.4, 1, length.out = 101),
         display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_format = "%.2f",
         number_color = "black",
         fontsize_number = 8,
         cluster_rows = FALSE,
         cluster_cols = FALSE,
         main = "AUC Performance: All Feature Selection and Model Combinations",
         angle_col = "45",  # 这里不需要引号
         border_color = "black")
dev.off()

png(file.path(ml_output_dir, "performance_heatmap_all_combinations.png"), 
    width = 14*100, height = 8*100, res = 100)
pheatmap(performance_matrix_vis,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         breaks = seq(0.4, 1, length.out = 101),
         display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_format = "%.2f",
         number_color = "black",
         fontsize_number = 8,
         cluster_rows = FALSE,
         cluster_cols = FALSE,
         main = "AUC Performance: All Feature Selection and Model Combinations",
         angle_col = "45",
         border_color = "black")
dev.off()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：找出最佳组合并绘制ROC曲线
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤6：识别最佳组合 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 找出最佳组合
if (length(all_results) > 0) {
  best_combo <- names(which.max(sapply(all_results, function(x) x$auc)))
  best_result <- all_results[[best_combo]]
  
  cat(sprintf("\n最佳组合: %s\n", best_combo))
  cat(sprintf("特征选择方法: %s\n", best_result$feature_selection))
  cat(sprintf("机器学习模型: %s\n", best_result$model))
  cat(sprintf("特征数量: %d\n", best_result$n_features))
  cat(sprintf("AUC: %.4f\n", best_result$auc))
  
  # 为每个特征选择方法找出最佳模型并绘制ROC曲线
  for (fs_name in colnames(performance_matrix)) {
    # 找出该特征选择方法下的最佳模型
    best_model_idx <- which.max(performance_matrix[, fs_name])
    if (length(best_model_idx) == 0 || is.na(performance_matrix[best_model_idx, fs_name])) next
    
    best_model_name <- rownames(performance_matrix)[best_model_idx]
    combo_name <- paste(fs_name, best_model_name, sep = "_")
    
    if (combo_name %in% names(all_roc_objects)) {
      # 绘制ROC曲线
      pdf(file.path(roc_dir, paste0("ROC_", combo_name, ".pdf")), width = 8, height = 8)
      plot(all_roc_objects[[combo_name]], 
           main = sprintf("ROC Curve: %s + %s", fs_name, best_model_name),
           col = "red", lwd = 2)
      text(0.6, 0.2, sprintf("AUC = %.3f", auc(all_roc_objects[[combo_name]])), cex = 1.2)
      dev.off()
      
      png(file.path(roc_dir, paste0("ROC_", combo_name, ".png")), width = 800, height = 800)
      plot(all_roc_objects[[combo_name]], 
           main = sprintf("ROC Curve: %s + %s", fs_name, best_model_name),
           col = "red", lwd = 2)
      text(0.6, 0.2, sprintf("AUC = %.3f", auc(all_roc_objects[[combo_name]])), cex = 1.2)
      dev.off()
    }
  }
  
  # 绘制最佳组合的ROC曲线
  pdf(file.path(ml_output_dir, "ROC_best_combination.pdf"), width = 8, height = 8)
  plot(best_result$roc_obj, 
       main = sprintf("Best Combination: %s", best_combo),
       col = "darkred", lwd = 3)
  text(0.6, 0.2, sprintf("AUC = %.4f", best_result$auc), cex = 1.5)
  dev.off()
  
  png(file.path(ml_output_dir, "ROC_best_combination.png"), width = 800, height = 800)
  plot(best_result$roc_obj, 
       main = sprintf("Best Combination: %s", best_combo),
       col = "darkred", lwd = 3)
  text(0.6, 0.2, sprintf("AUC = %.4f", best_result$auc), cex = 1.5)
  dev.off()
  
} else {
  cat("警告：没有成功的模型训练结果\n")
  best_result <- NULL
}

```
```{r}
 # =============================================================================
# 完整的ROC曲线分析：训练集+测试集，每个算法的最佳组合
# =============================================================================

# 加载必要的包
library(ROCR)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(dplyr)
library(RColorBrewer)

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== ROC曲线分析：训练集+测试集 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：重新训练所有组合，同时记录训练集和测试集性能
# =============================================================================

# 存储训练集和测试集的结果
all_results_complete <- list()

# 遍历所有组合，同时计算训练集和测试集的ROC
for (fs_name in names(feature_selection_methods)) {
  cat(sprintf("\n--- 特征选择方法: %s ---\n", fs_name))
  
  tryCatch({
    # 选择特征
    selected_features <- feature_selection_methods[[fs_name]](X_train, y_train)
    
    if (length(selected_features) < 10) {
      cat(sprintf("  特征数不足，跳过 %s\n", fs_name))
      next
    }
    
    cat(sprintf("  选择了 %d 个特征\n", length(selected_features)))
    
    # 准备数据
    X_train_fs <- X_train[, intersect(selected_features, colnames(X_train)), drop = FALSE]
    X_test_fs <- X_test[, intersect(selected_features, colnames(X_test)), drop = FALSE]
    
    # 对每个模型进行训练和评估
    for (model_name in names(ml_models)) {
      cat(sprintf("    训练 %s...\n", model_name))
      
      tryCatch({
        # 训练模型并预测训练集和测试集
        if (model_name == "LogisticRegression") {
          tryCatch({
            model <- glm(y ~ ., data = data.frame(y = y_train, X_train_fs), family = binomial)
            pred_prob_train <- predict(model, newdata = data.frame(X_train_fs), type = "response")
            pred_prob_test <- predict(model, newdata = data.frame(X_test_fs), type = "response")
          }, warning = function(w) {
            cv_model <- cv.glmnet(as.matrix(X_train_fs), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, nfolds = 5)
            model <- glmnet(as.matrix(X_train_fs), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, lambda = cv_model$lambda.1se)
            pred_prob_train <- predict(model, as.matrix(X_train_fs), type = "response")[, 1]
            pred_prob_test <- predict(model, as.matrix(X_test_fs), type = "response")[, 1]
          })
        } else if (model_name == "NaiveBayes") {
          model <- naive_bayes(x = X_train_fs, y = y_train)
          pred_prob_train <- predict(model, X_train_fs, type = "prob")[, 2]
          pred_prob_test <- predict(model, X_test_fs, type = "prob")[, 2]
        } else if (model_name == "NeuralNetwork") {
          max_features <- min(ncol(X_train_fs), 50)
          if (ncol(X_train_fs) > max_features) {
            vars <- apply(X_train_fs, 2, var)
            selected_cols <- names(sort(vars, decreasing = TRUE)[1:max_features])
            X_train_fs <- X_train_fs[, selected_cols, drop = FALSE]
            X_test_fs <- X_test_fs[, selected_cols, drop = FALSE]
          }
          hidden_size <- min(5, ceiling(ncol(X_train_fs) / 10))
          model <- nnet(y ~ ., data = data.frame(y = y_train, X_train_fs), 
                       size = hidden_size, maxit = 100, trace = FALSE, MaxNWts = 10000)
          pred_prob_train <- predict(model, newdata = data.frame(X_train_fs), type = "raw")[, 1]
          pred_prob_test <- predict(model, newdata = data.frame(X_test_fs), type = "raw")[, 1]
        } else if (model_name == "RandomForest") {
          model <- randomForest(x = X_train_fs, y = y_train, ntree = 100)
          pred_prob_train <- predict(model, X_train_fs, type = "prob")[, 2]
          pred_prob_test <- predict(model, X_test_fs, type = "prob")[, 2]
        } else if (model_name == "SVM") {
          model <- svm(x = X_train_fs, y = y_train, probability = TRUE, kernel = "radial")
          pred_train <- predict(model, X_train_fs, probability = TRUE)
          pred_test <- predict(model, X_test_fs, probability = TRUE)
          pred_prob_train <- attr(pred_train, "probabilities")[, 2]
          pred_prob_test <- attr(pred_test, "probabilities")[, 2]
        } else if (model_name == "XGBoost") {
          dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(as.matrix(X_train_fs), label = as.numeric(y_train) - 1)
          dtest <- xgb.DMatrix(as.matrix(X_test_fs))
          params <- list(objective = "binary:logistic", eval_metric = "auc", max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1)
          model <- xgb.train(params, dtrain, nrounds = 50, verbose = 0)
          pred_prob_train <- predict(model, dtrain)
          pred_prob_test <- predict(model, dtest)
        } else if (model_name == "Ridge") {
          cv_ridge <- cv.glmnet(as.matrix(X_train_fs), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 0, nfolds = 10)
          model <- glmnet(as.matrix(X_train_fs), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 0, lambda = cv_ridge$lambda.1se)
          pred_prob_train <- predict(model, as.matrix(X_train_fs), type = "response")[, 1]
          pred_prob_test <- predict(model, as.matrix(X_test_fs), type = "response")[, 1]
        }
        
        # 计算训练集和测试集的AUC
        roc_train <- roc(y_train, pred_prob_train, quiet = TRUE)
        roc_test <- roc(y_test, pred_prob_test, quiet = TRUE)
        auc_train <- auc(roc_train)
        auc_test <- auc(roc_test)
        
        # 存储完整结果
        combo_name <- paste(fs_name, model_name, sep = "_")
        all_results_complete[[combo_name]] <- list(
          feature_selection = fs_name,
          model = model_name,
          n_features = ncol(X_train_fs),
          auc_train = auc_train,
          auc_test = auc_test,
          roc_train = roc_train,
          roc_test = roc_test,
          pred_prob_train = pred_prob_train,
          pred_prob_test = pred_prob_test,
          selected_features = selected_features
        )
        
      }, error = function(e) {
        cat(sprintf("      错误: %s\n", e$message))
      })
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  特征选择错误: %s\n", e$message))
  })
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：为每个算法找到最佳的特征选择组合
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 寻找每个算法的最佳组合 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 为每个模型找到最佳的特征选择方法
best_combinations <- list()
model_names <- names(ml_models)

for (model_name in model_names) {
  # 找到该模型的所有结果
  model_results <- all_results_complete[grepl(paste0("_", model_name, "$"), names(all_results_complete))]
  
  if (length(model_results) > 0) {
    # 按测试集AUC排序
    test_aucs <- sapply(model_results, function(x) x$auc_test)
    best_idx <- which.max(test_aucs)
    best_combinations[[model_name]] <- model_results[[best_idx]]
    
    cat(sprintf("%s 最佳组合: %s (测试集AUC: %.3f, 训练集AUC: %.3f)\n", 
                model_name, 
                best_combinations[[model_name]]$feature_selection,
                best_combinations[[model_name]]$auc_test,
                best_combinations[[model_name]]$auc_train))
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：生成每个算法最佳组合的ROC曲线（训练集+测试集）
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 生成ROC曲线图 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 设置颜色
colors <- brewer.pal(min(length(best_combinations), 11), "Spectral")
if (length(best_combinations) > 11) {
  colors <- rainbow(length(best_combinations))
}

# 创建单个综合ROC图
pdf(file.path(roc_dir, "best_combinations_roc_curves.pdf"), width = 12, height = 8)
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

# 训练集ROC曲线
plot(1, 1, type = "n", xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), 
     xlab = "False Positive Rate", ylab = "True Positive Rate",
     main = "ROC Curves - Training Set (Best Combinations)")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2, col = "gray")

for (i in seq_along(best_combinations)) {
  model_name <- names(best_combinations)[i]
  result <- best_combinations[[model_name]]
  roc_obj <- result$roc_train
  
  lines(1 - roc_obj$specificities, roc_obj$sensitivities, 
        col = colors[i], lwd = 2)
}

legend("bottomright", 
       legend = paste0(names(best_combinations), " (", 
                      sapply(best_combinations, function(x) x$feature_selection), ", ",
                      sprintf("AUC=%.3f", sapply(best_combinations, function(x) x$auc_train)), ")"),
       col = colors[1:length(best_combinations)], 
       lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)

# 测试集ROC曲线
plot(1, 1, type = "n", xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), 
     xlab = "False Positive Rate", ylab = "True Positive Rate",
     main = "ROC Curves - Test Set (Best Combinations)")
abline(0, 1, lty = 2, col = "gray")

for (i in seq_along(best_combinations)) {
  model_name <- names(best_combinations)[i]
  result <- best_combinations[[model_name]]
  roc_obj <- result$roc_test
  
  lines(1 - roc_obj$specificities, roc_obj$sensitivities, 
        col = colors[i], lwd = 2)
}

legend("bottomright", 
       legend = paste0(names(best_combinations), " (", 
                      sapply(best_combinations, function(x) x$feature_selection), ", ",
                      sprintf("AUC=%.3f", sapply(best_combinations, function(x) x$auc_test)), ")"),
       col = colors[1:length(best_combinations)], 
       lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)

dev.off()

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：为每个算法生成单独的训练集vs测试集对比图
# =============================================================================

# 创建每个算法的单独ROC图
for (model_name in names(best_combinations)) {
  result <- best_combinations[[model_name]]
  
  pdf(file.path(roc_dir, paste0(model_name, "_train_vs_test_roc.pdf")), width = 10, height = 6)
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
  
  # 训练集ROC
  plot(1 - result$roc_train$specificities, result$roc_train$sensitivities,
       type = "l", col = "blue", lwd = 3,
       xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1),
       xlab = "False Positive Rate", ylab = "True Positive Rate",
       main = paste0(model_name, " - Training Set\n(", result$feature_selection, ")"))
  abline(0, 1, lty = 2, col = "gray")
  text(0.6, 0.3, paste0("AUC = ", sprintf("%.3f", result$auc_train)), 
       col = "blue", cex = 1.2, font = 2)
  
  # 测试集ROC
  plot(1 - result$roc_test$specificities, result$roc_test$sensitivities,
       type = "l", col = "red", lwd = 3,
       xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1),
       xlab = "False Positive Rate", ylab = "True Positive Rate",
       main = paste0(model_name, " - Test Set\n(", result$feature_selection, ")"))
  abline(0, 1, lty = 2, col = "gray")
  text(0.6, 0.3, paste0("AUC = ", sprintf("%.3f", result$auc_test)), 
       col = "red", cex = 1.2, font = 2)
  
  dev.off()
  
  # 同时创建训练集和测试集在同一个图中的版本
  pdf(file.path(roc_dir, paste0(model_name, "_combined_roc.pdf")), width = 8, height = 8)
  plot(1, 1, type = "n", xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1),
       xlab = "False Positive Rate", ylab = "True Positive Rate",
       main = paste0(model_name, " ROC Curves\nFeature Selection: ", result$feature_selection))
  abline(0, 1, lty = 2, col = "gray")
  
  # 训练集曲线
  lines(1 - result$roc_train$specificities, result$roc_train$sensitivities,
        col = "blue", lwd = 3)
  
  # 测试集曲线
  lines(1 - result$roc_test$specificities, result$roc_test$sensitivities,
        col = "red", lwd = 3)
  
  legend("bottomright", 
         legend = c(paste0("Training (AUC=", sprintf("%.3f", result$auc_train), ")"),
                   paste0("Test (AUC=", sprintf("%.3f", result$auc_test), ")")),
         col = c("blue", "red"), 
         lwd = 3, cex = 1.1)
  
  dev.off()
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：生成性能比较表
# =============================================================================

# 创建性能比较表
performance_comparison <- data.frame(
  Model = names(best_combinations),
  Feature_Selection = sapply(best_combinations, function(x) x$feature_selection),
  N_Features = sapply(best_combinations, function(x) x$n_features),
  AUC_Train = sapply(best_combinations, function(x) sprintf("%.3f", x$auc_train)),
  AUC_Test = sapply(best_combinations, function(x) sprintf("%.3f", x$auc_test)),
  Overfitting = sapply(best_combinations, function(x) sprintf("%.3f", x$auc_train - x$auc_test)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 保存结果
write.csv(performance_comparison, 
          file.path(ml_output_dir, "best_combinations_performance.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 打印性能比较表
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 最佳组合性能比较表 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")
print(performance_comparison)

# 保存完整结果
saveRDS(all_results_complete, file.path(ml_output_dir, "all_results_complete.rds"))
saveRDS(best_combinations, file.path(ml_output_dir, "best_combinations.rds"))

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== ROC分析完成！ =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")
cat("生成的文件：\n")
cat("1. 综合ROC曲线图：best_combinations_roc_curves.pdf\n")
cat("2. 各模型单独ROC图：[ModelName]_train_vs_test_roc.pdf\n")
cat("3. 各模型合并ROC图：[ModelName]_combined_roc.pdf\n")
cat("4. 性能比较表：best_combinations_performance.csv\n")
cat("5. 完整结果数据：all_results_complete.rds\n")
cat("6. 最佳组合数据：best_combinations.rds\n")
```
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 特征基因筛选和分类性能指标分析
# =============================================================================

# 加载必要的包
library(caret)
library(e1071)

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 特征基因筛选和性能指标分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 加载之前保存的最佳组合结果
best_combinations <- readRDS(file.path(ml_output_dir, "best_combinations.rds"))

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：计算特征重要性并筛选特征基因
# =============================================================================

cat("步骤1：计算特征重要性并筛选特征基因...\n")

# 存储所有模型的特征重要性
feature_importance_results <- list()
feature_genes_by_model <- list()

# 为每个最佳组合计算特征重要性
for (model_name in names(best_combinations)) {
  cat(sprintf("  分析 %s 的特征重要性...\n", model_name))
  
  result <- best_combinations[[model_name]]
  fs_name <- result$feature_selection
  selected_features <- result$selected_features
  
  # 准备数据
  X_train_fs <- X_train[, intersect(selected_features, colnames(X_train)), drop = FALSE]
  X_test_fs <- X_test[, intersect(selected_features, colnames(X_test)), drop = FALSE]
  
  # 初始化重要性分数
  importance_scores <- NULL
  
  tryCatch({
    if (model_name == "RandomForest") {
      # Random Forest 特征重要性
      model <- randomForest(x = X_train_fs, y = y_train, ntree = 100, importance = TRUE)
      importance_scores <- importance(model)[, "MeanDecreaseGini"]
      
    } else if (model_name == "XGBoost") {
      # XGBoost 特征重要性
      dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(as.matrix(X_train_fs), label = as.numeric(y_train) - 1)
      params <- list(objective = "binary:logistic", eval_metric = "auc", max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1)
      model <- xgb.train(params, dtrain, nrounds = 50, verbose = 0)
      
      # 获取重要性
      importance_df <- xgb.importance(colnames(X_train_fs), model = model)
      importance_scores <- importance_df$Gain
      names(importance_scores) <- importance_df$Feature
      
    } else if (model_name %in% c("LogisticRegression", "Ridge")) {
      # 逻辑回归/Ridge 系数重要性
      importance_scores <- tryCatch({
        model <- glm(y ~ ., data = data.frame(y = y_train, X_train_fs), family = binomial)
        if (any(is.na(coef(model)))) {
          stop("GLM coefficients contain NA")
        }
        scores <- abs(coef(model)[-1])
        names(scores) <- names(coef(model))[-1]
        scores
      }, warning = function(w) {
        cv_model <- cv.glmnet(as.matrix(X_train_fs), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, nfolds = 5)
        model <- glmnet(as.matrix(X_train_fs), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, lambda = cv_model$lambda.1se)
        coef_matrix <- coef(model)
        scores <- abs(as.vector(coef_matrix[-1, 1]))
        names(scores) <- rownames(coef_matrix)[-1]
        scores[!is.na(scores) & scores > 0]
      }, error = function(e) {
        apply(X_train_fs, 2, function(x) {
          if (length(unique(x)) > 1) {
            abs(cor(x, as.numeric(y_train), use = "complete.obs"))
          } else {
            0
          }
        })
      })
      
    } else if (model_name == "SVM") {
      # SVM 使用随机森林来估计重要性
      rf_model <- randomForest(x = X_train_fs, y = y_train, ntree = 100, importance = TRUE)
      importance_scores <- importance(rf_model)[, "MeanDecreaseGini"]
      
    } else if (model_name == "NaiveBayes") {
      # Naive Bayes 使用类间方差比
      importance_scores <- apply(X_train_fs, 2, function(x) {
        if (length(unique(x)) > 1) {
          group1 <- x[y_train == levels(y_train)[1]]
          group2 <- x[y_train == levels(y_train)[2]]
          
          between_var <- var(c(mean(group1, na.rm = TRUE), mean(group2, na.rm = TRUE)))
          within_var <- (var(group1, na.rm = TRUE) + var(group2, na.rm = TRUE)) / 2
          
          if (is.na(within_var) || within_var == 0) {
            return(0)
          } else {
            return(between_var / within_var)
          }
        } else {
          0
        }
      })
      
    } else if (model_name == "NeuralNetwork") {
      # 神经网络使用相关性作为重要性
      importance_scores <- apply(X_train_fs, 2, function(x) {
        if (length(unique(x)) > 1) {
          abs(cor(x, as.numeric(y_train), use = "complete.obs"))
        } else {
          0
        }
      })
      
    } else {
      # 其他模型使用相关性
      importance_scores <- apply(X_train_fs, 2, function(x) {
        if (length(unique(x)) > 1) {
          abs(cor(x, as.numeric(y_train), use = "complete.obs"))
        } else {
          0
        }
      })
    }
    
    # 检查和清理重要性分数
    if (!is.null(importance_scores) && length(importance_scores) > 0) {
      importance_scores <- importance_scores[!is.na(importance_scores)]
      importance_scores <- importance_scores[is.finite(importance_scores)]
      
      if (length(importance_scores) > 0 && max(importance_scores) > 0) {
        # 标准化重要性分数
        importance_scores <- importance_scores / max(importance_scores)
        
        # 筛选top 20%的特征基因
        top_threshold <- quantile(importance_scores, 0.8, na.rm = TRUE)
        top_genes <- names(importance_scores)[importance_scores >= top_threshold]
        
        # 存储结果
        feature_importance_results[[model_name]] <- importance_scores
        feature_genes_by_model[[model_name]] <- top_genes
        
        cat(sprintf("    成功筛选出 %d 个特征基因（总共 %d 个特征）\n", 
                   length(top_genes), length(importance_scores)))
      }
    }
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("    错误: %s\n", e$message))
  })
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：生成特征基因详细报告
# =============================================================================

cat("\n步骤2：生成特征基因详细报告...\n")

# 创建特征基因汇总
all_feature_genes <- unique(unlist(feature_genes_by_model))
gene_selection_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = length(all_feature_genes), 
                               ncol = length(feature_genes_by_model))
rownames(gene_selection_matrix) <- all_feature_genes
colnames(gene_selection_matrix) <- names(feature_genes_by_model)

# 填充选择矩阵
for (model in names(feature_genes_by_model)) {
  genes <- feature_genes_by_model[[model]]
  gene_selection_matrix[genes, model] <- 1
}

# 计算每个基因被选择的次数
gene_selection_counts <- rowSums(gene_selection_matrix)

# 创建详细的特征基因报告
feature_genes_report <- data.frame(
  Gene = all_feature_genes,
  Total_Selections = gene_selection_counts,
  Selected_By_Models = apply(gene_selection_matrix, 1, function(x) {
    models <- colnames(gene_selection_matrix)[x == 1]
    paste(models, collapse = ", ")
  }),
  LogisticRegression = gene_selection_matrix[, "LogisticRegression"],
  NaiveBayes = ifelse("NaiveBayes" %in% colnames(gene_selection_matrix), 
                     gene_selection_matrix[, "NaiveBayes"], 0),
  NeuralNetwork = ifelse("NeuralNetwork" %in% colnames(gene_selection_matrix), 
                        gene_selection_matrix[, "NeuralNetwork"], 0),
  RandomForest = ifelse("RandomForest" %in% colnames(gene_selection_matrix), 
                       gene_selection_matrix[, "RandomForest"], 0),
  SVM = ifelse("SVM" %in% colnames(gene_selection_matrix), 
              gene_selection_matrix[, "SVM"], 0),
  XGBoost = ifelse("XGBoost" %in% colnames(gene_selection_matrix), 
                  gene_selection_matrix[, "XGBoost"], 0),
  Ridge = ifelse("Ridge" %in% colnames(gene_selection_matrix), 
                gene_selection_matrix[, "Ridge"], 0),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 按选择次数排序
feature_genes_report <- feature_genes_report[order(feature_genes_report$Total_Selections, 
                                                  decreasing = TRUE), ]

# 保存特征基因报告
write.csv(feature_genes_report, 
          file.path(sensitivity_dir, "feature_genes_detailed_report.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 创建模型特征基因统计报告
model_gene_stats <- data.frame(
  Model = names(feature_genes_by_model),
  Feature_Selection_Method = sapply(names(feature_genes_by_model), function(m) {
    best_combinations[[m]]$feature_selection
  }),
  Total_Features = sapply(names(feature_genes_by_model), function(m) {
    best_combinations[[m]]$n_features
  }),
  Selected_Feature_Genes = sapply(feature_genes_by_model, length),
  Feature_Genes = sapply(feature_genes_by_model, function(x) {
    paste(head(x, 10), collapse = ", ")  # 只显示前10个
  }),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

write.csv(model_gene_stats, 
          file.path(sensitivity_dir, "model_feature_genes_summary.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：计算详细的分类性能指标
# =============================================================================

cat("\n步骤3：计算详细的分类性能指标...\n")

# 计算所有性能指标的函数
calculate_performance_metrics <- function(actual, predicted, pred_prob) {
  # 确保是因子类型
  actual <- factor(actual, levels = c("BHI", "PEA"))
  predicted <- factor(predicted, levels = c("BHI", "PEA"))
  
  # 计算混淆矩阵
  cm <- confusionMatrix(predicted, actual, positive = "PEA")
  
  # 提取指标
  sensitivity <- cm$byClass["Sensitivity"]
  specificity <- cm$byClass["Specificity"]
  ppv <- cm$byClass["Pos Pred Value"]
  npv <- cm$byClass["Neg Pred Value"]
  
  # 计算F1分数
  precision <- ppv
  recall <- sensitivity
  f1_score <- 2 * (precision * recall) / (precision + recall)
  
  # 计算Kappa
  kappa <- cm$overall["Kappa"]
  
  # 计算G-Mean (几何平均数)
  g_mean <- sqrt(sensitivity * specificity)
  
  # 计算AUC
  auc_value <- auc(roc(actual, pred_prob, quiet = TRUE))
  
  return(list(
    Sensitivity = as.numeric(sensitivity),
    Specificity = as.numeric(specificity),
    PPV = as.numeric(ppv),
    NPV = as.numeric(npv),
    F1_Score = as.numeric(f1_score),
    Kappa = as.numeric(kappa),
    G_Mean = as.numeric(g_mean),
    AUC = as.numeric(auc_value)
  ))
}

# 存储性能指标
performance_metrics_train <- list()
performance_metrics_test <- list()

# 为每个最佳组合计算性能指标
for (model_name in names(best_combinations)) {
  cat(sprintf("  计算 %s 的性能指标...\n", model_name))
  
  result <- best_combinations[[model_name]]
  selected_features <- result$selected_features
  
  # 准备数据
  X_train_fs <- X_train[, intersect(selected_features, colnames(X_train)), drop = FALSE]
  X_test_fs <- X_test[, intersect(selected_features, colnames(X_test)), drop = FALSE]
  
  tryCatch({
    # 训练模型并获取预测概率
    pred_prob_train <- ml_models[[model_name]](X_train_fs, y_train, X_train_fs)
    pred_prob_test <- ml_models[[model_name]](X_train_fs, y_train, X_test_fs)
    
    # 转换为分类预测
    pred_train <- factor(ifelse(pred_prob_train > 0.5, "PEA", "BHI"), levels = c("BHI", "PEA"))
    pred_test <- factor(ifelse(pred_prob_test > 0.5, "PEA", "BHI"), levels = c("BHI", "PEA"))
    
    # 计算训练集性能指标
    metrics_train <- calculate_performance_metrics(y_train, pred_train, pred_prob_train)
    performance_metrics_train[[model_name]] <- metrics_train
    
    # 计算测试集性能指标
    metrics_test <- calculate_performance_metrics(y_test, pred_test, pred_prob_test)
    performance_metrics_test[[model_name]] <- metrics_test
    
    cat(sprintf("    训练集AUC: %.3f, 测试集AUC: %.3f\n", 
               metrics_train$AUC, metrics_test$AUC))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("    错误: %s\n", e$message))
  })
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：生成性能指标报告
# =============================================================================

cat("\n步骤4：生成性能指标报告...\n")

# 创建训练集性能指标表
train_metrics_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(performance_metrics_train), function(model) {
  metrics <- performance_metrics_train[[model]]
  data.frame(
    Model = model,
    Dataset = "Training",
    Sensitivity = round(metrics$Sensitivity, 4),
    Specificity = round(metrics$Specificity, 4),
    PPV = round(metrics$PPV, 4),
    NPV = round(metrics$NPV, 4),
    F1_Score = round(metrics$F1_Score, 4),
    Kappa = round(metrics$Kappa, 4),
    G_Mean = round(metrics$G_Mean, 4),
    AUC = round(metrics$AUC, 4),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

# 创建测试集性能指标表
test_metrics_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(performance_metrics_test), function(model) {
  metrics <- performance_metrics_test[[model]]
  data.frame(
    Model = model,
    Dataset = "Test",
    Sensitivity = round(metrics$Sensitivity, 4),
    Specificity = round(metrics$Specificity, 4),
    PPV = round(metrics$PPV, 4),
    NPV = round(metrics$NPV, 4),
    F1_Score = round(metrics$F1_Score, 4),
    Kappa = round(metrics$Kappa, 4),
    G_Mean = round(metrics$G_Mean, 4),
    AUC = round(metrics$AUC, 4),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

# 合并训练集和测试集指标
all_metrics_df <- rbind(train_metrics_df, test_metrics_df)

# 保存性能指标报告
write.csv(all_metrics_df, 
          file.path(sensitivity_dir, "detailed_performance_metrics.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 创建模型比较表（仅测试集）
model_comparison <- test_metrics_df[, -2]  # 移除Dataset列
rownames(model_comparison) <- model_comparison$Model
model_comparison <- model_comparison[, -1]  # 移除Model列

write.csv(model_comparison, 
          file.path(sensitivity_dir, "model_comparison_test_metrics.csv"), 
          row.names = TRUE)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：生成汇总报告
# =============================================================================

cat("\n步骤5：生成最终汇总报告...\n")

# 打印各算法筛选的特征基因数量
cat("\n各机器学习算法筛选的特征基因数量：\n")
for (model in names(feature_genes_by_model)) {
  cat(sprintf("%s: %d 个特征基因\n", model, length(feature_genes_by_model[[model]])))
}

# 找出被多个算法选择的基因
consensus_genes <- all_feature_genes[gene_selection_counts >= 2]
highly_consensus_genes <- all_feature_genes[gene_selection_counts >= 3]

cat(sprintf("\n被至少2个算法选择的基因: %d 个\n", length(consensus_genes)))
cat(sprintf("被至少3个算法选择的基因: %d 个\n", length(highly_consensus_genes)))

if (length(highly_consensus_genes) > 0) {
  cat("\n高度一致的特征基因（被≥3个算法选择）：\n")
  for (gene in head(highly_consensus_genes, 10)) {
    selected_by <- feature_genes_report$Selected_By_Models[feature_genes_report$Gene == gene]
    cat(sprintf("  %s: %s\n", gene, selected_by))
  }
}

# 生成最终汇总
final_summary <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Total Feature Genes", "Consensus Genes (≥2)", "High Consensus Genes (≥3)", 
            "Models Analyzed", "Best Test AUC", "Best Test Sensitivity", "Best Test Specificity"),
  Value = c(
    length(all_feature_genes),
    length(consensus_genes),
    length(highly_consensus_genes),
    length(performance_metrics_test),
    round(max(test_metrics_df$AUC, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    round(max(test_metrics_df$Sensitivity, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    round(max(test_metrics_df$Specificity, na.rm = TRUE), 4)
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

write.csv(final_summary, 
          file.path(sensitivity_dir, "analysis_final_summary.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 分析完成！ =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("生成的文件：\n")
cat("1. feature_genes_detailed_report.csv - 详细特征基因报告\n")
cat("2. model_feature_genes_summary.csv - 各模型特征基因统计\n")
cat("3. detailed_performance_metrics.csv - 详细性能指标（训练+测试）\n")
cat("4. model_comparison_test_metrics.csv - 模型比较（仅测试集）\n")
cat("5. analysis_final_summary.csv - 最终汇总报告\n\n")

print(final_summary)
```
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 稳健的性能分析和报告生成（修复版）
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 修复并完成分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 检查之前的结果
cat("检查已有的性能指标结果...\n")
successful_models <- names(performance_metrics_test)
failed_models <- setdiff(names(best_combinations), successful_models)

cat(sprintf("成功分析的模型: %s\n", paste(successful_models, collapse = ", ")))
if (length(failed_models) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("失败的模型: %s\n", paste(failed_models, collapse = ", ")))
}

# =============================================================================
# 针对失败的模型进行修复（特别是LogisticRegression）
# =============================================================================

if ("LogisticRegression" %in% failed_models) {
  cat("\n修复 LogisticRegression...\n")
  
  result <- best_combinations[["LogisticRegression"]]
  selected_features <- result$selected_features
  
  # 准备数据
  X_train_fs <- X_train[, intersect(selected_features, colnames(X_train)), drop = FALSE]
  X_test_fs <- X_test[, intersect(selected_features, colnames(X_test)), drop = FALSE]
  
  tryCatch({
    # 使用glmnet进行稳健的逻辑回归
    cv_model <- cv.glmnet(as.matrix(X_train_fs), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, nfolds = 5)
    model <- glmnet(as.matrix(X_train_fs), y_train, family = "binomial", alpha = 1, lambda = cv_model$lambda.1se)
    
    # 预测
    pred_prob_train <- as.vector(predict(model, as.matrix(X_train_fs), type = "response"))
    pred_prob_test <- as.vector(predict(model, as.matrix(X_test_fs), type = "response"))
    
    # 确保长度正确
    if (length(pred_prob_train) == length(y_train) && length(pred_prob_test) == length(y_test)) {
      # 转换为分类预测
      pred_train <- factor(ifelse(pred_prob_train > 0.5, "PEA", "BHI"), levels = c("BHI", "PEA"))
      pred_test <- factor(ifelse(pred_prob_test > 0.5, "PEA", "BHI"), levels = c("BHI", "PEA"))
      
      # 计算性能指标
      metrics_train <- calculate_performance_metrics(y_train, pred_train, pred_prob_train)
      performance_metrics_train[["LogisticRegression"]] <- metrics_train
      
      metrics_test <- calculate_performance_metrics(y_test, pred_test, pred_prob_test)
      performance_metrics_test[["LogisticRegression"]] <- metrics_test
      
      cat(sprintf("  LogisticRegression 修复成功 - 训练集AUC: %.3f, 测试集AUC: %.3f\n", 
                 metrics_train$AUC, metrics_test$AUC))
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  LogisticRegression 修复失败: %s\n", e$message))
  })
}

# =============================================================================
# 生成完整的性能指标报告
# =============================================================================

cat("\n生成完整的性能指标报告...\n")

# 确保我们有有效的性能指标
valid_models <- intersect(names(performance_metrics_train), names(performance_metrics_test))

if (length(valid_models) > 0) {
  # 创建训练集性能指标表
  train_metrics_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(valid_models, function(model) {
    metrics <- performance_metrics_train[[model]]
    data.frame(
      Model = model,
      Dataset = "Training",
      Sensitivity = round(metrics$Sensitivity, 4),
      Specificity = round(metrics$Specificity, 4),
      PPV = round(metrics$PPV, 4),
      NPV = round(metrics$NPV, 4),
      F1_Score = round(metrics$F1_Score, 4),
      Kappa = round(metrics$Kappa, 4),
      G_Mean = round(metrics$G_Mean, 4),
      AUC = round(metrics$AUC, 4),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }))
  
  # 创建测试集性能指标表
  test_metrics_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(valid_models, function(model) {
    metrics <- performance_metrics_test[[model]]
    data.frame(
      Model = model,
      Dataset = "Test",
      Sensitivity = round(metrics$Sensitivity, 4),
      Specificity = round(metrics$Specificity, 4),
      PPV = round(metrics$PPV, 4),
      NPV = round(metrics$NPV, 4),
      F1_Score = round(metrics$F1_Score, 4),
      Kappa = round(metrics$Kappa, 4),
      G_Mean = round(metrics$G_Mean, 4),
      AUC = round(metrics$AUC, 4),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }))
  
  # 合并训练集和测试集指标
  all_metrics_df <- rbind(train_metrics_df, test_metrics_df)
  
  # 保存性能指标报告
  write.csv(all_metrics_df, 
            file.path(sensitivity_dir, "detailed_performance_metrics.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # 创建模型比较表（仅测试集）
  model_comparison <- test_metrics_df[, -2]  # 移除Dataset列
  rownames(model_comparison) <- model_comparison$Model
  model_comparison <- model_comparison[, -1]  # 移除Model列
  
  write.csv(model_comparison, 
            file.path(sensitivity_dir, "model_comparison_test_metrics.csv"), 
            row.names = TRUE)
  
  cat("性能指标报告已生成\n")
} else {
  cat("警告: 没有有效的性能指标数据\n")
}

# =============================================================================
# 生成最终的特征基因和性能汇总报告
# =============================================================================

cat("\n生成最终汇总报告...\n")

# 确保特征基因数据可用
if (exists("feature_genes_by_model") && length(feature_genes_by_model) > 0) {
  
  # 计算特征基因统计
  cat("\n各机器学习算法筛选的特征基因数量：\n")
  feature_gene_counts <- sapply(feature_genes_by_model, length)
  for (model in names(feature_gene_counts)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: %d 个特征基因\n", model, feature_gene_counts[model]))
  }
  
  # 生成特征基因选择统计表
  model_gene_summary <- data.frame(
    Model = names(feature_genes_by_model),
    Feature_Selection_Method = sapply(names(feature_genes_by_model), function(m) {
      if (m %in% names(best_combinations)) {
        best_combinations[[m]]$feature_selection
      } else {
        "Unknown"
      }
    }),
    Total_Features = sapply(names(feature_genes_by_model), function(m) {
      if (m %in% names(best_combinations)) {
        best_combinations[[m]]$n_features
      } else {
        NA
      }
    }),
    Selected_Feature_Genes = feature_gene_counts,
    Selection_Rate = round(feature_gene_counts / sapply(names(feature_genes_by_model), function(m) {
      if (m %in% names(best_combinations)) {
        best_combinations[[m]]$n_features
      } else {
        1
      }
    }) * 100, 2),
    Performance_AUC = sapply(names(feature_genes_by_model), function(m) {
      if (m %in% names(performance_metrics_test)) {
        round(performance_metrics_test[[m]]$AUC, 4)
      } else {
        NA
      }
    }),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  write.csv(model_gene_summary, 
            file.path(sensitivity_dir, "model_feature_genes_summary.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # 分析基因选择一致性
  all_feature_genes <- unique(unlist(feature_genes_by_model))
  
  if (length(all_feature_genes) > 0) {
    # 计算每个基因被选择的次数
    gene_selection_counts <- sapply(all_feature_genes, function(gene) {
      sum(sapply(feature_genes_by_model, function(genes) gene %in% genes))
    })
    
    # 创建基因选择矩阵
    gene_selection_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = length(all_feature_genes), 
                                   ncol = length(feature_genes_by_model))
    rownames(gene_selection_matrix) <- all_feature_genes
    colnames(gene_selection_matrix) <- names(feature_genes_by_model)
    
    for (model in names(feature_genes_by_model)) {
      genes <- feature_genes_by_model[[model]]
      gene_selection_matrix[genes, model] <- 1
    }
    
    # 创建详细的基因报告
    gene_details <- data.frame(
      Gene = all_feature_genes,
      Selection_Count = gene_selection_counts,
      Selection_Rate = round(gene_selection_counts / length(feature_genes_by_model) * 100, 1),
      Selected_By = apply(gene_selection_matrix, 1, function(x) {
        models <- colnames(gene_selection_matrix)[x == 1]
        paste(models, collapse = ", ")
      }),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # 按选择次数排序
    gene_details <- gene_details[order(gene_details$Selection_Count, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    
    write.csv(gene_details, 
              file.path(sensitivity_dir, "feature_genes_detailed_report.csv"), 
              row.names = FALSE)
    
    # 统计一致性基因
    consensus_genes_2 <- all_feature_genes[gene_selection_counts >= 2]
    consensus_genes_3 <- all_feature_genes[gene_selection_counts >= 3]
    
    cat(sprintf("\n基因选择一致性分析：\n"))
    cat(sprintf("  总特征基因数: %d\n", length(all_feature_genes)))
    cat(sprintf("  被≥2个算法选择: %d 个 (%.1f%%)\n", 
               length(consensus_genes_2), length(consensus_genes_2)/length(all_feature_genes)*100))
    cat(sprintf("  被≥3个算法选择: %d 个 (%.1f%%)\n", 
               length(consensus_genes_3), length(consensus_genes_3)/length(all_feature_genes)*100))
    
    if (length(consensus_genes_3) > 0) {
      cat("\n高度一致的特征基因（被≥3个算法选择）：\n")
      for (i in 1:min(10, length(consensus_genes_3))) {
        gene <- consensus_genes_3[i]
        selected_by <- gene_details$Selected_By[gene_details$Gene == gene]
        cat(sprintf("  %s: %s\n", gene, selected_by))
      }
    }
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# 生成最终汇总统计
# =============================================================================

# 性能统计
if (length(valid_models) > 0) {
  test_aucs <- sapply(valid_models, function(m) performance_metrics_test[[m]]$AUC)
  test_sensitivities <- sapply(valid_models, function(m) performance_metrics_test[[m]]$Sensitivity)
  test_specificities <- sapply(valid_models, function(m) performance_metrics_test[[m]]$Specificity)
  
  best_auc_model <- names(test_aucs)[which.max(test_aucs)]
  best_sensitivity_model <- names(test_sensitivities)[which.max(test_sensitivities)]
  best_specificity_model <- names(test_specificities)[which.max(test_specificities)]
  
  cat(sprintf("\n性能最佳模型：\n"))
  cat(sprintf("  最高AUC: %s (%.4f)\n", best_auc_model, max(test_aucs)))
  cat(sprintf("  最高敏感性: %s (%.4f)\n", best_sensitivity_model, max(test_sensitivities)))
  cat(sprintf("  最高特异性: %s (%.4f)\n", best_specificity_model, max(test_specificities)))
}

# 最终汇总表
final_summary <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Models Analyzed", "Successful Models", "Total Feature Genes", 
            "Consensus Genes (≥2)", "Best AUC", "Best Sensitivity", "Best Specificity"),
  Value = c(
    length(names(best_combinations)),
    length(valid_models),
    ifelse(exists("all_feature_genes"), length(all_feature_genes), 0),
    ifelse(exists("consensus_genes_2"), length(consensus_genes_2), 0),
    ifelse(length(valid_models) > 0, round(max(test_aucs), 4), NA),
    ifelse(length(valid_models) > 0, round(max(test_sensitivities), 4), NA),
    ifelse(length(valid_models) > 0, round(max(test_specificities), 4), NA)
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

write.csv(final_summary, 
          file.path(sensitivity_dir, "analysis_final_summary.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 分析完成！ =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("生成的文件：\n")
cat("1. detailed_performance_metrics.csv - 详细性能指标（训练+测试）\n")
cat("2. model_comparison_test_metrics.csv - 模型比较（仅测试集）\n")
cat("3. model_feature_genes_summary.csv - 各模型特征基因统计\n")
cat("4. feature_genes_detailed_report.csv - 详细特征基因报告\n")
cat("5. analysis_final_summary.csv - 最终汇总报告\n\n")

print(final_summary)
```


针对Hspa8的专项分析
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 补充分析：Hspa8基因在目标细胞群体的表达分析（增强版）
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 补充分析：Hspa8基因表达分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 创建输出目录
hspa8_output_dir <- "Hspa8_expression_analysis_enhanced"
if (!dir.exists(hspa8_output_dir)) {
  dir.create(hspa8_output_dir)
}

# 加载必要的包
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(monocle3)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：加载数据并提取Hspa8表达信息
# =============================================================================
cat("步骤1：加载数据并提取Hspa8表达信息...\n")

# 加载纯净数据集
seurat_pure <- readRDS(file.path("stage0_preprocessing_results", "seurat_pure_annotated.rds"))

# 检查Hspa8基因是否存在
if (!"Hspa8" %in% rownames(seurat_pure)) {
  stop("Hspa8基因不在数据集中")
}

# 提取Hspa8表达数据
hspa8_expr <- FetchData(seurat_pure, vars = c("Hspa8", "refined_celltype", "group"))

# 筛选目标细胞类型
target_celltypes <- c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
hspa8_expr_target <- hspa8_expr %>%
  filter(refined_celltype %in% target_celltypes)

cat(sprintf("分析的细胞数: %d\n", nrow(hspa8_expr_target)))

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：Hspa8在三种细胞群体的表达分布（带统计检验）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤2：生成Hspa8在三种细胞群体的表达分布图（带统计检验）...\n")

# 图1：小提琴图 - 按细胞类型分组（带统计显著性）
# 定义比较组合
my_comparisons <- list(
  c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13"),
  c("Epithelial_7", "Tuft_30"),
  c("Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
)

p1 <- ggplot(hspa8_expr_target, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = Hspa8, fill = refined_celltype)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 0.5, 
               position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                              "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                              "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "Hspa8 Expression Across Cell Types",
       subtitle = "Statistical comparison between cell types",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Hspa8 Expression Level",
       fill = "Cell Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "none") +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,
                     method = "wilcox.test",
                     label = "p.signif",
                     size = 4)

ggsave(file.path(hspa8_output_dir, "01_Hspa8_expression_by_celltype_with_stats.png"), 
       p1, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(hspa8_output_dir, "01_Hspa8_expression_by_celltype_with_stats.pdf"), 
       p1, width = 8, height = 7)

# 图2：分面小提琴图 - 按细胞类型和处理组（每个细胞类型内的组间比较）
p2_data <- hspa8_expr_target

# 为每个细胞类型创建单独的图
p2_list <- list()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- p2_data %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  # 计算组间p值
  bhi_expr <- ct_data$Hspa8[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_expr <- ct_data$Hspa8[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  if(length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
    p_val <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr)$p.value,
                      error = function(e) NA)
```
