```{r}
       subtitle = "Log2 fold change values",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Log2 Fold Change",
       fill = "Direction") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(ywhaz_output_dir, "09_fold_change_visualization.png"), 
       p9, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(ywhaz_output_dir, "09_fold_change_visualization.pdf"), 
       p9, width = 8, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：UMAP可视化（增强版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤5：生成增强版UMAP可视化...\n")

# 图10：UMAP上的Ywhaz表达（分面图）
p10 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_subset, 
                   features = "Ywhaz",
                   split.by = "group",
                   cols = c("lightgrey", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
                   pt.size = 0.8) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Ywhaz Expression on UMAP",
    subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave(file.path(ywhaz_output_dir, "10_Ywhaz_UMAP_expression_split.png"), 
       p10, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(ywhaz_output_dir, "10_Ywhaz_UMAP_expression_split.pdf"), 
       p10, width = 12, height = 6)

# 图11：UMAP上的细胞类型分布
Idents(seurat_subset) <- "refined_celltype"
p11 <- DimPlot(seurat_subset,
               reduction = "umap",
               split.by = "group",
               cols = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                       "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                       "Tuft_30" = "#009E74"),
               pt.size = 0.8) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Cell Type Distribution on UMAP",
    subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave(file.path(ywhaz_output_dir, "11_celltype_UMAP_distribution.png"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(ywhaz_output_dir, "11_celltype_UMAP_distribution.pdf"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：详细统计结果输出
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤6：输出详细统计结果...\n")

# 1. 组间比较结果（含多重检验校正）
comparison_results <- data.frame()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  data_ct <- ywhaz_expr_target %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  if (nrow(data_ct) > 0) {
    bhi_expr <- data_ct$Ywhaz[data_ct$group == "BHI"]
    pea_expr <- data_ct$Ywhaz[data_ct$group == "PEA"]
    
    if (length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
      test_result <- tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr),
        error = function(e) list(p.value = NA)
      )
      
      # 计算Cohen's d
      if (!is.na(test_result$p.value)) {
        pooled_sd <- sqrt(((length(bhi_expr)-1)*var(bhi_expr) + 
                          (length(pea_expr)-1)*var(pea_expr)) / 
                         (length(bhi_expr) + length(pea_expr) - 2))
        cohen_d <- if(pooled_sd > 0) {
          (mean(pea_expr) - mean(bhi_expr)) / pooled_sd
        } else { NA }
      } else {
        cohen_d <- NA
      }
      
      comparison_results <- rbind(comparison_results, data.frame(
        Cell_Type = ct,
        BHI_n = length(bhi_expr),
        PEA_n = length(pea_expr),
        BHI_mean = mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        BHI_median = median(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        PEA_mean = mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        PEA_median = median(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        Fold_Change = mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        Log2_FC = log2(mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE)),
        Cohen_d = cohen_d,
        P_value = test_result$p.value,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

# 添加多重检验校正
if (nrow(comparison_results) > 0) {
  # 只对非NA的p值进行校正
  valid_p <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_value)
  comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH <- NA
  comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni <- NA
  
  if (sum(valid_p) > 0) {
    comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH[valid_p] <- p.adjust(comparison_results$P_value[valid_p], method = "BH")
    comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni[valid_p] <- p.adjust(comparison_results$P_value[valid_p], method = "bonferroni")
  }
  
  comparison_results$Significant_BH <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH) & comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH < 0.05
  comparison_results$Significant_bonferroni <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni) & comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni < 0.05
}

write.csv(comparison_results, 
          file.path(ywhaz_output_dir, "Ywhaz_group_comparison_detailed.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 2. 伪时序相关性分析（安全版本）
pseudotime_correlation <- data.frame()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  for (grp in c("BHI", "PEA")) {
    subset_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
      filter(refined_celltype == ct, group == grp)
    
    if (nrow(subset_data) > 3) {
      # 移除NA值
      clean_data <- subset_data %>%
        filter(!is.na(pseudotime), !is.na(Ywhaz))
      
      if (nrow(clean_data) > 3) {
        # 尝试计算相关性
        spearman_result <- tryCatch({
          cor.test(clean_data$pseudotime, clean_data$Ywhaz, method = "spearman")
        }, error = function(e) {
          list(estimate = NA, p.value = NA)
        })
        
        pearson_result <- tryCatch({
          cor.test(clean_data$pseudotime, clean_data$Ywhaz, method = "pearson")
        }, error = function(e) {
          list(estimate = NA, p.value = NA)
        })
        
        pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
          refined_celltype = ct,
          group = grp,
          n_cells = nrow(clean_data),
          spearman_cor = as.numeric(spearman_result$estimate),
          pearson_cor = as.numeric(pearson_result$estimate),
          spearman_p = spearman_result$p.value,
          pearson_p = pearson_result$p.value,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      } else {
        pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
          refined_celltype = ct,
          group = grp,
          n_cells = nrow(clean_data),
          spearman_cor = NA,
          pearson_cor = NA,
          spearman_p = NA,
          pearson_p = NA,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    } else {
      pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
        refined_celltype = ct,
        group = grp,
        n_cells = nrow(subset_data),
        spearman_cor = NA,
        pearson_cor = NA,
        spearman_p = NA,
        pearson_p = NA,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

write.csv(pseudotime_correlation, 
          file.path(ywhaz_output_dir, "Ywhaz_pseudotime_correlation_detailed.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 3. 时间分布统计
time_distribution_stats <- pseudotime_data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_time = mean(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_time = sd(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_time = median(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1_time = quantile(pseudotime, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_time = quantile(pseudotime, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, 
              values_from = c(n, mean_time, sd_time, median_time, Q1_time, Q3_time))

write.csv(time_distribution_stats, 
          file.path(ywhaz_output_dir, "pseudotime_distribution_stats.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 4. 综合统计表
write.csv(comprehensive_stats, 
          file.path(ywhaz_output_dir, "Ywhaz_expression_comprehensive_stats.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# =============================================================================
# 最终总结报告
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Ywhaz表达分析完成（增强版）=====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("分析总结:\n")
cat("----------\n")
cat(sprintf("总分析细胞数: %d\n", nrow(ywhaz_expr_target)))
cat(sprintf("- Epithelial_7: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(ywhaz_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7"),
            sum(ywhaz_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                ywhaz_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(ywhaz_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                ywhaz_expr_target$group == "PEA")))
cat(sprintf("- Epithelial_13: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(ywhaz_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13"),
            sum(ywhaz_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                ywhaz_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(ywhaz_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                ywhaz_expr_target$group == "PEA")))
cat(sprintf("- Tuft_30: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(ywhaz_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30"),
            sum(ywhaz_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" & 
                ywhaz_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(ywhaz_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" & 
                ywhaz_expr_target$group == "PEA")))

cat("\n表达差异统计:\n")
cat("---------------\n")
# 格式化输出
if (nrow(comparison_results) > 0) {
  comparison_output <- comparison_results[, c("Cell_Type", "Log2_FC", "P_value", "P_adjusted_BH", "Significant_BH")]
  comparison_output$Log2_FC <- round(comparison_output$Log2_FC, 3)
  comparison_output$P_value <- round(comparison_output$P_value, 4)
  comparison_output$P_adjusted_BH <- round(comparison_output$P_adjusted_BH, 4)
  print(comparison_output, row.names = FALSE)
} else {
  cat("No significant comparisons found.\n")
}

cat("\n伪时序相关性:\n")
cat("-------------\n")
# 过滤掉NA值并格式化输出
correlation_output <- pseudotime_correlation[, c("refined_celltype", "group", "n_cells", "spearman_cor", "spearman_p")]
correlation_output$spearman_cor <- round(correlation_output$spearman_cor, 3)
correlation_output$spearman_p <- round(correlation_output$spearman_p, 4)
print(correlation_output, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n生成的图表文件:\n")
cat("----------------\n")
cat("所有图表均提供PNG和PDF两种格式：\n")
cat("1. 01_Ywhaz_expression_by_celltype_with_stats (.png/.pdf) - 细胞类型间表达比较（含显著性）\n")
cat("2. 02_Ywhaz_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats (.png/.pdf) - 各细胞类型内组间比较\n")
cat("3. 03_Ywhaz_expression_density_enhanced (.png/.pdf) - 表达密度分布图\n")
cat("4. 04_Ywhaz_pseudotime_overall_enhanced (.png/.pdf) - 伪时序总体表达趋势\n")
cat("5. 05_Ywhaz_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats (.png/.pdf) - 各细胞类型伪时序表达（含统计）\n")
cat("6. 06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison (.png/.pdf) - 伪时间分布比较\n")
cat("7. 07_Ywhaz_expression_heatmap (.png/.pdf) - 表达热图\n")
cat("8. 08_mean_expression_comparison (.png/.pdf) - 平均表达量比较\n")
cat("9. 09_fold_change_visualization (.png/.pdf) - 倍数变化可视化\n")
cat("10. 10_Ywhaz_UMAP_expression_split (.png/.pdf) - UMAP表达分布\n")
cat("11. 11_celltype_UMAP_distribution (.png/.pdf) - UMAP细胞类型分布\n")

cat("\n数据文件:\n")
cat("---------\n")
cat("1. Ywhaz_group_comparison_detailed.csv - 详细组间比较结果\n")
cat("2. Ywhaz_pseudotime_correlation_detailed.csv - 伪时序相关性分析\n")
cat("3. pseudotime_distribution_stats.csv - 时间分布统计\n")
cat("4. Ywhaz_expression_comprehensive_stats.csv - 综合表达统计\n")

cat("\n所有结果保存在:", ywhaz_output_dir, "\n")
cat("=====================================\n")
```
多项研究表明，α-synuclein（α-syn）的稳态与降解过程受到分子伴侣和调节蛋白的显著影响。其中，Hsc70（HSPA8）是伴侣介导自噬（CMA）的关键成分，能直接识别并结合α-syn底物，从而促进其溶解及溶酶体降解（Cuervo et al., 2004；Vogiatzi et al., 2008）。同属伴侣家族的Hsp90（HSP90AB1）也被发现与α-syn纤维或寡聚体结合，抑制其聚集并调节毒性（Daturpalli et al., 2013）。此外，14-3-3ζ蛋白（YWHAZ）在帕金森病脑组织的路易小体中与α-syn共定位，并可与其直接相互作用，从而影响其构象稳定性及聚集过程（Ubl et al., 2002；Underwood et al., 2020）。这些研究共同支持了HSPA8、HSP90AB1和YWHAZ在α-syn聚集、降解和毒性调控中的关键作用。

参考文献（APA格式）：

Cuervo, A. M., Stefanis, L., Fredenburg, R., Lansbury, P. T., & Sulzer, D. (2004). Impaired degradation of mutant α-synuclein by chaperone-mediated autophagy. Science, 305(5688), 1292–1295. https://doi.org/10.1126/science.1101738

Vogiatzi, T., Xilouri, M., Vekrellis, K., & Stefanis, L. (2008). Wild type α-synuclein is degraded by chaperone-mediated autophagy and macroautophagy in neuronal cells. Journal of Biological Chemistry, 283(35), 23542–23556. https://doi.org/10.1074/jbc.M801992200

Daturpalli, S., Waudby, C. A., Meehan, S., & Jackson, S. E. (2013). Hsp90 inhibits α-synuclein aggregation by interacting with soluble oligomers. Journal of Molecular Biology, 425(22), 4614–4628. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jmb.2013.08.002

Ubl, A., Berg, D., Holzmann, C., Krüger, R., Berger, K., & Wüllner, U. (2002). 14-3-3 protein is a component of Lewy bodies in Parkinson’s disease. Annals of Neurology, 51(5), 693–700. https://doi.org/10.1002/ana.10179

Underwood, R., Corbet, A., Chappell, J., et al. (2020). 14-3-3 proteins reduce cell-to-cell transfer and propagation of α-synuclein. Acta Neuropathologica Communications, 8(1), 222. https://doi.org/10.1186/s40478-020-01091-y


```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 补充分析：Atp1b1基因在目标细胞群体的表达分析（增强版）
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 补充分析：Atp1b1基因表达分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 创建输出目录
Atp1b1_output_dir <- "Atp1b1_expression_analysis_enhanced"
if (!dir.exists(Atp1b1_output_dir)) {
  dir.create(Atp1b1_output_dir)
}

# 加载必要的包
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(monocle3)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：加载数据并提取Atp1b1表达信息
# =============================================================================
cat("步骤1：加载数据并提取Atp1b1表达信息...\n")

# 加载纯净数据集
seurat_pure <- readRDS(file.path("stage0_preprocessing_results", "seurat_pure_annotated.rds"))

# 检查Atp1b1基因是否存在
if (!"Atp1b1" %in% rownames(seurat_pure)) {
  stop("Atp1b1基因不在数据集中")
}

# 提取Atp1b1表达数据
Atp1b1_expr <- FetchData(seurat_pure, vars = c("Atp1b1", "refined_celltype", "group"))

# 筛选目标细胞类型
target_celltypes <- c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
Atp1b1_expr_target <- Atp1b1_expr %>%
  filter(refined_celltype %in% target_celltypes)

cat(sprintf("分析的细胞数: %d\n", nrow(Atp1b1_expr_target)))

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：Atp1b1在三种细胞群体的表达分布（带统计检验）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤2：生成Atp1b1在三种细胞群体的表达分布图（带统计检验）...\n")

# 图1：小提琴图 - 按细胞类型分组（带统计显著性）
# 定义比较组合
my_comparisons <- list(
  c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13"),
  c("Epithelial_7", "Tuft_30"),
  c("Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
)

p1 <- ggplot(Atp1b1_expr_target, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = Atp1b1, fill = refined_celltype)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 0.5, 
               position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                              "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                              "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "Atp1b1 Expression Across Cell Types",
       subtitle = "Statistical comparison between cell types",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Atp1b1 Expression Level",
       fill = "Cell Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "none") +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,
                     method = "wilcox.test",
                     label = "p.signif",
                     size = 4)

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "01_Atp1b1_expression_by_celltype_with_stats.png"), 
       p1, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "01_Atp1b1_expression_by_celltype_with_stats.pdf"), 
       p1, width = 8, height = 7)

# 图2：分面小提琴图 - 按细胞类型和处理组（每个细胞类型内的组间比较）
p2_data <- Atp1b1_expr_target

# 为每个细胞类型创建单独的图
p2_list <- list()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- p2_data %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  # 计算组间p值
  bhi_expr <- ct_data$Atp1b1[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_expr <- ct_data$Atp1b1[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  if(length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
    p_val <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr)$p.value,
                      error = function(e) NA)
    
    sig_label <- if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
             ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    } else { "NA" }
    
    subtitle_text <- if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      paste("p =", format.pval(p_val, digits = 3))
    } else { "Insufficient data" }
  } else {
    p_val <- NA
    sig_label <- ""
    subtitle_text <- "Insufficient data"
  }
  
  # 计算y轴最大值以放置标签
  y_max <- max(ct_data$Atp1b1) * 1.15
  
  p2_list[[ct]] <- ggplot(ct_data, aes(x = group, y = Atp1b1, fill = group)) +
    geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = ct,
         x = "Treatment Group",
         y = "Atp1b1 Expression",
         subtitle = subtitle_text) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
  
  # 只在有显著差异时添加标注
  if(!is.na(p_val) && p_val < 0.05) {
    p2_list[[ct]] <- p2_list[[ct]] +
      annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = y_max, label = sig_label, size = 5) +
      annotate("segment", x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_max * 0.95, yend = y_max * 0.95)
  }
}

p2 <- wrap_plots(p2_list, ncol = 3)

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "02_Atp1b1_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats.png"), 
       p2, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "02_Atp1b1_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats.pdf"), 
       p2, width = 14, height = 5)

# 图3：密度图（增强版）
p3 <- ggplot(Atp1b1_expr_target, aes(x = Atp1b1, fill = refined_celltype)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, adjust = 1.5) +
  geom_rug(aes(color = refined_celltype), alpha = 0.3, sides = "b") +
  facet_wrap(~group, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                              "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                              "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                               "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                               "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "Atp1b1 Expression Density Distribution",
       subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
       x = "Atp1b1 Expression Level",
       y = "Density",
       fill = "Cell Type",
       color = "Cell Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey50"))

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "03_Atp1b1_expression_density_enhanced.png"), 
       p3, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "03_Atp1b1_expression_density_enhanced.pdf"), 
       p3, width = 10, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：伪时序分析中的Atp1b1表达（增强版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤3：伪时序分析中的Atp1b1表达（增强版）...\n")

# 筛选目标细胞并构建轨迹
seurat_subset <- subset(seurat_pure, refined_celltype %in% target_celltypes)
cds <- as.cell_data_set(seurat_subset)
cds <- preprocess_cds(cds, num_dim = 100)
set.seed(123)
cds <- reduce_dimension(cds, reduction_method = "UMAP")
cds <- cluster_cells(cds, resolution = 1e-5)
cds <- learn_graph(cds)

# 设置根节点
get_root_node <- function(cds, cell_type = "Epithelial_7"){
  cell_ids <- which(colData(cds)[, "refined_celltype"] == cell_type)
  if (length(cell_ids) == 0) {
    stop("未找到指定细胞类型的细胞")
  }
  closest_vertex <- cds@principal_graph_aux[["UMAP"]]$pr_graph_cell_proj_closest_vertex
  closest_vertex <- as.matrix(closest_vertex[cell_ids, ])
  root_pr_nodes <- igraph::V(principal_graph(cds)[["UMAP"]])$name[as.numeric(names(which.max(table(closest_vertex))))]
  root_pr_nodes
}

root_node <- get_root_node(cds, cell_type = "Epithelial_7")
cds <- order_cells(cds, root_pr_nodes = root_node)

# 提取伪时间和Atp1b1表达数据
pseudotime_data <- data.frame(
  cell_id = rownames(colData(cds)),
  pseudotime = pseudotime(cds),
  Atp1b1 = exprs(cds)["Atp1b1", ],
  refined_celltype = colData(cds)$refined_celltype,
  group = colData(cds)$group,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 过滤无效数据
pseudotime_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
  filter(is.finite(pseudotime))

# 图4：Atp1b1表达随伪时间变化（总体，增强版）
p4 <- ggplot(pseudotime_data, aes(x = pseudotime, y = Atp1b1)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = refined_celltype), alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, color = "black", size = 1.2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = refined_celltype), method = "loess", se = FALSE, size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                               "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                               "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "Atp1b1 Expression Along Pseudotime Trajectory",
       subtitle = "Overall trend (black) and cell-type specific trends",
       x = "Pseudotime",
       y = "Atp1b1 Expression Level",
       color = "Cell Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "04_Atp1b1_pseudotime_overall_enhanced.png"), 
       p4, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "04_Atp1b1_pseudotime_overall_enhanced.pdf"), 
       p4, width = 10, height = 7)

# 图5：Atp1b1表达随伪时间变化（按细胞类型分面，带统计）
# 计算每个细胞类型中两组的时间分布差异
time_comparison <- pseudotime_data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_time = mean(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_time = sd(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

p5_list <- list()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- pseudotime_data %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  # 时间分布差异检验
  bhi_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  time_p <- if(length(bhi_time) > 3 && length(pea_time) > 3) {
    tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_time, pea_time)$p.value,
             error = function(e) NA)
  } else { NA }
  
  # 表达量差异检验
  bhi_expr <- ct_data$Atp1b1[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_expr <- ct_data$Atp1b1[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  expr_p <- if(length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
    tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr)$p.value,
             error = function(e) NA)
  } else { NA }
  
  # 创建副标题
  subtitle_text <- if(!is.na(time_p) && !is.na(expr_p)) {
    paste("Time dist. p =", format.pval(time_p, digits = 2),
          "| Expr. p =", format.pval(expr_p, digits = 2))
  } else if(!is.na(time_p)) {
    paste("Time dist. p =", format.pval(time_p, digits = 2))
  } else if(!is.na(expr_p)) {
    paste("Expr. p =", format.pval(expr_p, digits = 2))
  } else {
    "Insufficient data for statistical test"
  }
  
  p5_list[[ct]] <- ggplot(ct_data, aes(x = pseudotime, y = Atp1b1)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = group), alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color = group), method = "loess", se = TRUE, size = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = ct,
         subtitle = subtitle_text,
         x = "Pseudotime",
         y = "Atp1b1 Expression") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom")
}

p5 <- wrap_plots(p5_list, ncol = 3, guides = "collect") & 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "05_Atp1b1_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats.png"), 
       p5, width = 15, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "05_Atp1b1_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats.pdf"), 
       p5, width = 15, height = 5)

# 图6：时间分布比较箱线图
# 先计算所有的统计检验结果
time_stats <- data.frame()
for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- pseudotime_data %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  bhi_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  if(length(bhi_time) > 3 && length(pea_time) > 3) {
    p_val <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_time, pea_time)$p.value,
                      error = function(e) NA)
  } else {
    p_val <- NA
  }
  
  time_stats <- rbind(time_stats, data.frame(
    celltype = ct,
    p_value = p_val,
    sig_label = if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
             ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    } else { "" }
  ))
}

p6 <- ggplot(pseudotime_data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = pseudotime, fill = group)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8, jitter.width = 0.2),
             alpha = 0.3, size = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Pseudotime Distribution Comparison",
       subtitle = "Temporal differences between BHI and PEA groups",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Pseudotime",
       fill = "Group") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom")

# 添加统计显著性标注
for (i in 1:nrow(time_stats)) {
  if (!is.na(time_stats$p_value[i]) && time_stats$p_value[i] < 0.05) {
    y_max <- max(pseudotime_data$pseudotime[pseudotime_data$refined_celltype == time_stats$celltype[i]]) * 1.05
    
    p6 <- p6 + 
      annotate("text", 
               x = i, 
               y = y_max, 
               label = time_stats$sig_label[i], 
               size = 4)
  }
}

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison.png"), 
       p6, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison.pdf"), 
       p6, width = 8, height = 6)

# 图7：Atp1b1表达热图（按伪时间排序）
# 创建矩阵数据
heatmap_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
  arrange(pseudotime) %>%
  mutate(pseudotime_bin = cut(pseudotime, breaks = 50, labels = FALSE))

heatmap_summary <- heatmap_data %>%
  group_by(pseudotime_bin, refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_expr = mean(Atp1b1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(refined_celltype, group), 
              values_from = mean_expr,
              names_sep = "_")

p7 <- heatmap_summary %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -pseudotime_bin, names_to = "condition", values_to = "expression") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = pseudotime_bin, y = condition, fill = expression)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(title = "Atp1b1 Expression Heatmap Along Pseudotime",
       x = "Pseudotime Bins",
       y = "Cell Type and Group",
       fill = "Mean Expression") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "07_Atp1b1_expression_heatmap.png"), 
       p7, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "07_Atp1b1_expression_heatmap.pdf"), 
       p7, width = 10, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：综合统计分析和可视化
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤4：综合统计分析和可视化...\n")

# 创建综合统计表
comprehensive_stats <- Atp1b1_expr_target %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(Atp1b1, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Atp1b1, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(Atp1b1, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(Atp1b1, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(Atp1b1, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(Atp1b1, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(Atp1b1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

# 图8：均值比较条形图（带误差棒和显著性）
p8_data <- comprehensive_stats

# 计算组间比较的统计显著性
bar_stats <- data.frame()
for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- Atp1b1_expr_target %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  bhi_expr <- ct_data$Atp1b1[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_expr <- ct_data$Atp1b1[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  if(length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
    p_val <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr)$p.value,
                      error = function(e) NA)
  } else {
    p_val <- NA
  }
  
  bar_stats <- rbind(bar_stats, data.frame(
    celltype = ct,
    p_value = p_val,
    sig_label = if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
             ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    } else { "" }
  ))
}

p8 <- ggplot(p8_data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = mean, fill = group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(0.9), alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd),
                position = position_dodge(0.9), width = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Mean Atp1b1 Expression Comparison",
       subtitle = "Error bars show standard deviation",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Mean Atp1b1 Expression ± SD",
       fill = "Group") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom")

# 添加组间比较的显著性标注
for (i in 1:nrow(bar_stats)) {
  if (!is.na(bar_stats$p_value[i]) && bar_stats$p_value[i] < 0.05) {
    ct <- bar_stats$celltype[i]
    y_pos <- max(p8_data$mean[p8_data$refined_celltype == ct] + 
                 p8_data$sd[p8_data$refined_celltype == ct]) * 1.1
    
    p8 <- p8 + 
      annotate("text", 
               x = i, 
               y = y_pos, 
               label = bar_stats$sig_label[i], 
               size = 5)
  }
}

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "08_mean_expression_comparison.png"), 
       p8, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "08_mean_expression_comparison.pdf"), 
       p8, width = 8, height = 6)

# 图9：折叠变化（Fold Change）可视化
fc_data <- comprehensive_stats %>%
  select(refined_celltype, group, mean) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = mean) %>%
  mutate(
    fold_change = PEA / BHI,
    log2_fc = log2(fold_change),
    direction = ifelse(log2_fc > 0, "Up", "Down")
  )

p9 <- ggplot(fc_data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = log2_fc, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(log2_fc, 2)), 
            vjust = ifelse(fc_data$log2_fc > 0, -0.5, 1.5),
            size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up" = "#E59693", "Down" = "#78A9cd")) +
  labs(title = "Atp1b1 Expression Fold Change (PEA vs BHI)",
       subtitle = "Log2 fold change values",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Log2 Fold Change",
       fill = "Direction") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "09_fold_change_visualization.png"), 
       p9, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "09_fold_change_visualization.pdf"), 
       p9, width = 8, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：UMAP可视化（增强版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤5：生成增强版UMAP可视化...\n")

# 图10：UMAP上的Atp1b1表达（分面图）
p10 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_subset, 
                   features = "Atp1b1",
                   split.by = "group",
                   cols = c("lightgrey", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
                   pt.size = 0.8) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Atp1b1 Expression on UMAP",
    subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "10_Atp1b1_UMAP_expression_split.png"), 
       p10, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "10_Atp1b1_UMAP_expression_split.pdf"), 
       p10, width = 12, height = 6)

# 图11：UMAP上的细胞类型分布
Idents(seurat_subset) <- "refined_celltype"
p11 <- DimPlot(seurat_subset,
               reduction = "umap",
               split.by = "group",
               cols = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                       "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                       "Tuft_30" = "#009E74"),
               pt.size = 0.8) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Cell Type Distribution on UMAP",
    subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "11_celltype_UMAP_distribution.png"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "11_celltype_UMAP_distribution.pdf"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：详细统计结果输出
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤6：输出详细统计结果...\n")

# 1. 组间比较结果（含多重检验校正）
comparison_results <- data.frame()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  data_ct <- Atp1b1_expr_target %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  if (nrow(data_ct) > 0) {
    bhi_expr <- data_ct$Atp1b1[data_ct$group == "BHI"]
    pea_expr <- data_ct$Atp1b1[data_ct$group == "PEA"]
    
    if (length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
      test_result <- tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr),
        error = function(e) list(p.value = NA)
      )
      
      # 计算Cohen's d
      if (!is.na(test_result$p.value)) {
        pooled_sd <- sqrt(((length(bhi_expr)-1)*var(bhi_expr) + 
                          (length(pea_expr)-1)*var(pea_expr)) / 
                         (length(bhi_expr) + length(pea_expr) - 2))
        cohen_d <- if(pooled_sd > 0) {
          (mean(pea_expr) - mean(bhi_expr)) / pooled_sd
        } else { NA }
      } else {
        cohen_d <- NA
      }
      
      comparison_results <- rbind(comparison_results, data.frame(
        Cell_Type = ct,
        BHI_n = length(bhi_expr),
        PEA_n = length(pea_expr),
        BHI_mean = mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        BHI_median = median(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        PEA_mean = mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        PEA_median = median(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        Fold_Change = mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        Log2_FC = log2(mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE)),
        Cohen_d = cohen_d,
        P_value = test_result$p.value,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

# 添加多重检验校正
if (nrow(comparison_results) > 0) {
  # 只对非NA的p值进行校正
  valid_p <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_value)
  comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH <- NA
  comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni <- NA
  
  if (sum(valid_p) > 0) {
    comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH[valid_p] <- p.adjust(comparison_results$P_value[valid_p], method = "BH")
    comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni[valid_p] <- p.adjust(comparison_results$P_value[valid_p], method = "bonferroni")
  }
  
  comparison_results$Significant_BH <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH) & comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH < 0.05
  comparison_results$Significant_bonferroni <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni) & comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni < 0.05
}

write.csv(comparison_results, 
          file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "Atp1b1_group_comparison_detailed.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 2. 伪时序相关性分析（安全版本）
pseudotime_correlation <- data.frame()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  for (grp in c("BHI", "PEA")) {
    subset_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
      filter(refined_celltype == ct, group == grp)
    
    if (nrow(subset_data) > 3) {
      # 移除NA值
      clean_data <- subset_data %>%
        filter(!is.na(pseudotime), !is.na(Atp1b1))
      
      if (nrow(clean_data) > 3) {
        # 尝试计算相关性
        spearman_result <- tryCatch({
          cor.test(clean_data$pseudotime, clean_data$Atp1b1, method = "spearman")
        }, error = function(e) {
          list(estimate = NA, p.value = NA)
        })
        
        pearson_result <- tryCatch({
          cor.test(clean_data$pseudotime, clean_data$Atp1b1, method = "pearson")
        }, error = function(e) {
          list(estimate = NA, p.value = NA)
        })
        
        pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
          refined_celltype = ct,
          group = grp,
          n_cells = nrow(clean_data),
          spearman_cor = as.numeric(spearman_result$estimate),
          pearson_cor = as.numeric(pearson_result$estimate),
          spearman_p = spearman_result$p.value,
          pearson_p = pearson_result$p.value,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      } else {
        pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
          refined_celltype = ct,
          group = grp,
          n_cells = nrow(clean_data),
          spearman_cor = NA,
          pearson_cor = NA,
          spearman_p = NA,
          pearson_p = NA,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    } else {
      pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
        refined_celltype = ct,
        group = grp,
        n_cells = nrow(subset_data),
        spearman_cor = NA,
        pearson_cor = NA,
        spearman_p = NA,
        pearson_p = NA,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

write.csv(pseudotime_correlation, 
          file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "Atp1b1_pseudotime_correlation_detailed.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 3. 时间分布统计
time_distribution_stats <- pseudotime_data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_time = mean(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_time = sd(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_time = median(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1_time = quantile(pseudotime, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_time = quantile(pseudotime, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, 
              values_from = c(n, mean_time, sd_time, median_time, Q1_time, Q3_time))

write.csv(time_distribution_stats, 
          file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "pseudotime_distribution_stats.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 4. 综合统计表
write.csv(comprehensive_stats, 
          file.path(Atp1b1_output_dir, "Atp1b1_expression_comprehensive_stats.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# =============================================================================
# 最终总结报告
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Atp1b1表达分析完成（增强版）=====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("分析总结:\n")
cat("----------\n")
cat(sprintf("总分析细胞数: %d\n", nrow(Atp1b1_expr_target)))
cat(sprintf("- Epithelial_7: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(Atp1b1_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7"),
            sum(Atp1b1_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                Atp1b1_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(Atp1b1_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                Atp1b1_expr_target$group == "PEA")))
cat(sprintf("- Epithelial_13: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(Atp1b1_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13"),
            sum(Atp1b1_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                Atp1b1_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(Atp1b1_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                Atp1b1_expr_target$group == "PEA")))
cat(sprintf("- Tuft_30: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(Atp1b1_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30"),
            sum(Atp1b1_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" & 
                Atp1b1_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(Atp1b1_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" & 
                Atp1b1_expr_target$group == "PEA")))

cat("\n表达差异统计:\n")
cat("---------------\n")
# 格式化输出
if (nrow(comparison_results) > 0) {
  comparison_output <- comparison_results[, c("Cell_Type", "Log2_FC", "P_value", "P_adjusted_BH", "Significant_BH")]
  comparison_output$Log2_FC <- round(comparison_output$Log2_FC, 3)
  comparison_output$P_value <- round(comparison_output$P_value, 4)
  comparison_output$P_adjusted_BH <- round(comparison_output$P_adjusted_BH, 4)
  print(comparison_output, row.names = FALSE)
} else {
  cat("No significant comparisons found.\n")
}

cat("\n伪时序相关性:\n")
cat("-------------\n")
# 过滤掉NA值并格式化输出
correlation_output <- pseudotime_correlation[, c("refined_celltype", "group", "n_cells", "spearman_cor", "spearman_p")]
correlation_output$spearman_cor <- round(correlation_output$spearman_cor, 3)
correlation_output$spearman_p <- round(correlation_output$spearman_p, 4)
print(correlation_output, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n生成的图表文件:\n")
cat("----------------\n")
cat("所有图表均提供PNG和PDF两种格式：\n")
cat("1. 01_Atp1b1_expression_by_celltype_with_stats (.png/.pdf) - 细胞类型间表达比较（含显著性）\n")
cat("2. 02_Atp1b1_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats (.png/.pdf) - 各细胞类型内组间比较\n")
cat("3. 03_Atp1b1_expression_density_enhanced (.png/.pdf) - 表达密度分布图\n")
cat("4. 04_Atp1b1_pseudotime_overall_enhanced (.png/.pdf) - 伪时序总体表达趋势\n")
cat("5. 05_Atp1b1_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats (.png/.pdf) - 各细胞类型伪时序表达（含统计）\n")
cat("6. 06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison (.png/.pdf) - 伪时间分布比较\n")
cat("7. 07_Atp1b1_expression_heatmap (.png/.pdf) - 表达热图\n")
cat("8. 08_mean_expression_comparison (.png/.pdf) - 平均表达量比较\n")
cat("9. 09_fold_change_visualization (.png/.pdf) - 倍数变化可视化\n")
cat("10. 10_Atp1b1_UMAP_expression_split (.png/.pdf) - UMAP表达分布\n")
cat("11. 11_celltype_UMAP_distribution (.png/.pdf) - UMAP细胞类型分布\n")

cat("\n数据文件:\n")
cat("---------\n")
cat("1. Atp1b1_group_comparison_detailed.csv - 详细组间比较结果\n")
cat("2. Atp1b1_pseudotime_correlation_detailed.csv - 伪时序相关性分析\n")
cat("3. pseudotime_distribution_stats.csv - 时间分布统计\n")
cat("4. Atp1b1_expression_comprehensive_stats.csv - 综合表达统计\n")

cat("\n所有结果保存在:", Atp1b1_output_dir, "\n")
cat("=====================================\n")
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 补充分析：S100a10基因在目标细胞群体的表达分析（增强版）
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 补充分析：S100a10基因表达分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 创建输出目录
S100a10_output_dir <- "S100a10_expression_analysis_enhanced"
if (!dir.exists(S100a10_output_dir)) {
  dir.create(S100a10_output_dir)
}

# 加载必要的包
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(monocle3)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：加载数据并提取S100a10表达信息
# =============================================================================
cat("步骤1：加载数据并提取S100a10表达信息...\n")

# 加载纯净数据集
seurat_pure <- readRDS(file.path("stage0_preprocessing_results", "seurat_pure_annotated.rds"))

# 检查S100a10基因是否存在
if (!"S100a10" %in% rownames(seurat_pure)) {
  stop("S100a10基因不在数据集中")
}

# 提取S100a10表达数据
S100a10_expr <- FetchData(seurat_pure, vars = c("S100a10", "refined_celltype", "group"))

# 筛选目标细胞类型
target_celltypes <- c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
S100a10_expr_target <- S100a10_expr %>%
  filter(refined_celltype %in% target_celltypes)

cat(sprintf("分析的细胞数: %d\n", nrow(S100a10_expr_target)))

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：S100a10在三种细胞群体的表达分布（带统计检验）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤2：生成S100a10在三种细胞群体的表达分布图（带统计检验）...\n")

# 图1：小提琴图 - 按细胞类型分组（带统计显著性）
# 定义比较组合
my_comparisons <- list(
  c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13"),
  c("Epithelial_7", "Tuft_30"),
  c("Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
)

p1 <- ggplot(S100a10_expr_target, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = S100a10, fill = refined_celltype)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 0.5, 
               position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                              "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                              "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "S100a10 Expression Across Cell Types",
       subtitle = "Statistical comparison between cell types",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "S100a10 Expression Level",
       fill = "Cell Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "none") +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,
                     method = "wilcox.test",
                     label = "p.signif",
                     size = 4)

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "01_S100a10_expression_by_celltype_with_stats.png"), 
       p1, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "01_S100a10_expression_by_celltype_with_stats.pdf"), 
       p1, width = 8, height = 7)

# 图2：分面小提琴图 - 按细胞类型和处理组（每个细胞类型内的组间比较）
p2_data <- S100a10_expr_target

# 为每个细胞类型创建单独的图
p2_list <- list()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- p2_data %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  # 计算组间p值
  bhi_expr <- ct_data$S100a10[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_expr <- ct_data$S100a10[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  if(length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
    p_val <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr)$p.value,
                      error = function(e) NA)
    
    sig_label <- if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
             ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    } else { "NA" }
    
    subtitle_text <- if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      paste("p =", format.pval(p_val, digits = 3))
    } else { "Insufficient data" }
  } else {
    p_val <- NA
    sig_label <- ""
    subtitle_text <- "Insufficient data"
  }
  
  # 计算y轴最大值以放置标签
  y_max <- max(ct_data$S100a10) * 1.15
  
  p2_list[[ct]] <- ggplot(ct_data, aes(x = group, y = S100a10, fill = group)) +
    geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = ct,
         x = "Treatment Group",
         y = "S100a10 Expression",
         subtitle = subtitle_text) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
  
  # 只在有显著差异时添加标注
  if(!is.na(p_val) && p_val < 0.05) {
    p2_list[[ct]] <- p2_list[[ct]] +
      annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = y_max, label = sig_label, size = 5) +
      annotate("segment", x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_max * 0.95, yend = y_max * 0.95)
  }
}

p2 <- wrap_plots(p2_list, ncol = 3)

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "02_S100a10_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats.png"), 
       p2, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "02_S100a10_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats.pdf"), 
       p2, width = 14, height = 5)

# 图3：密度图（增强版）
p3 <- ggplot(S100a10_expr_target, aes(x = S100a10, fill = refined_celltype)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, adjust = 1.5) +
  geom_rug(aes(color = refined_celltype), alpha = 0.3, sides = "b") +
  facet_wrap(~group, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                              "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                              "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                               "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                               "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "S100a10 Expression Density Distribution",
       subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
       x = "S100a10 Expression Level",
       y = "Density",
       fill = "Cell Type",
       color = "Cell Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey50"))

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "03_S100a10_expression_density_enhanced.png"), 
       p3, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "03_S100a10_expression_density_enhanced.pdf"), 
       p3, width = 10, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：伪时序分析中的S100a10表达（增强版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤3：伪时序分析中的S100a10表达（增强版）...\n")

# 筛选目标细胞并构建轨迹
seurat_subset <- subset(seurat_pure, refined_celltype %in% target_celltypes)
cds <- as.cell_data_set(seurat_subset)
cds <- preprocess_cds(cds, num_dim = 100)
set.seed(123)
cds <- reduce_dimension(cds, reduction_method = "UMAP")
cds <- cluster_cells(cds, resolution = 1e-5)
cds <- learn_graph(cds)

# 设置根节点
get_root_node <- function(cds, cell_type = "Epithelial_7"){
  cell_ids <- which(colData(cds)[, "refined_celltype"] == cell_type)
  if (length(cell_ids) == 0) {
    stop("未找到指定细胞类型的细胞")
  }
  closest_vertex <- cds@principal_graph_aux[["UMAP"]]$pr_graph_cell_proj_closest_vertex
  closest_vertex <- as.matrix(closest_vertex[cell_ids, ])
  root_pr_nodes <- igraph::V(principal_graph(cds)[["UMAP"]])$name[as.numeric(names(which.max(table(closest_vertex))))]
  root_pr_nodes
}

root_node <- get_root_node(cds, cell_type = "Epithelial_7")
cds <- order_cells(cds, root_pr_nodes = root_node)

# 提取伪时间和S100a10表达数据
pseudotime_data <- data.frame(
  cell_id = rownames(colData(cds)),
  pseudotime = pseudotime(cds),
  S100a10 = exprs(cds)["S100a10", ],
  refined_celltype = colData(cds)$refined_celltype,
  group = colData(cds)$group,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 过滤无效数据
pseudotime_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
  filter(is.finite(pseudotime))

# 图4：S100a10表达随伪时间变化（总体，增强版）
p4 <- ggplot(pseudotime_data, aes(x = pseudotime, y = S100a10)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = refined_celltype), alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, color = "black", size = 1.2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = refined_celltype), method = "loess", se = FALSE, size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                               "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                               "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "S100a10 Expression Along Pseudotime Trajectory",
       subtitle = "Overall trend (black) and cell-type specific trends",
       x = "Pseudotime",
       y = "S100a10 Expression Level",
       color = "Cell Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "04_S100a10_pseudotime_overall_enhanced.png"), 
       p4, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "04_S100a10_pseudotime_overall_enhanced.pdf"), 
       p4, width = 10, height = 7)

# 图5：S100a10表达随伪时间变化（按细胞类型分面，带统计）
# 计算每个细胞类型中两组的时间分布差异
time_comparison <- pseudotime_data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_time = mean(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_time = sd(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

p5_list <- list()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- pseudotime_data %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  # 时间分布差异检验
  bhi_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  time_p <- if(length(bhi_time) > 3 && length(pea_time) > 3) {
    tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_time, pea_time)$p.value,
             error = function(e) NA)
  } else { NA }
  
  # 表达量差异检验
  bhi_expr <- ct_data$S100a10[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_expr <- ct_data$S100a10[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  expr_p <- if(length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
    tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr)$p.value,
             error = function(e) NA)
  } else { NA }
  
  # 创建副标题
  subtitle_text <- if(!is.na(time_p) && !is.na(expr_p)) {
    paste("Time dist. p =", format.pval(time_p, digits = 2),
          "| Expr. p =", format.pval(expr_p, digits = 2))
  } else if(!is.na(time_p)) {
    paste("Time dist. p =", format.pval(time_p, digits = 2))
  } else if(!is.na(expr_p)) {
    paste("Expr. p =", format.pval(expr_p, digits = 2))
  } else {
    "Insufficient data for statistical test"
  }
  
  p5_list[[ct]] <- ggplot(ct_data, aes(x = pseudotime, y = S100a10)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = group), alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color = group), method = "loess", se = TRUE, size = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = ct,
         subtitle = subtitle_text,
         x = "Pseudotime",
         y = "S100a10 Expression") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom")
}

p5 <- wrap_plots(p5_list, ncol = 3, guides = "collect") & 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "05_S100a10_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats.png"), 
       p5, width = 15, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "05_S100a10_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats.pdf"), 
       p5, width = 15, height = 5)

# 图6：时间分布比较箱线图
# 先计算所有的统计检验结果
time_stats <- data.frame()
for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- pseudotime_data %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  bhi_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  if(length(bhi_time) > 3 && length(pea_time) > 3) {
    p_val <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_time, pea_time)$p.value,
                      error = function(e) NA)
  } else {
    p_val <- NA
  }
  
  time_stats <- rbind(time_stats, data.frame(
    celltype = ct,
    p_value = p_val,
    sig_label = if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
             ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    } else { "" }
  ))
}

p6 <- ggplot(pseudotime_data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = pseudotime, fill = group)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8, jitter.width = 0.2),
             alpha = 0.3, size = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Pseudotime Distribution Comparison",
       subtitle = "Temporal differences between BHI and PEA groups",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Pseudotime",
       fill = "Group") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom")

# 添加统计显著性标注
for (i in 1:nrow(time_stats)) {
  if (!is.na(time_stats$p_value[i]) && time_stats$p_value[i] < 0.05) {
    y_max <- max(pseudotime_data$pseudotime[pseudotime_data$refined_celltype == time_stats$celltype[i]]) * 1.05
    
    p6 <- p6 + 
      annotate("text", 
               x = i, 
               y = y_max, 
               label = time_stats$sig_label[i], 
               size = 4)
  }
}

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison.png"), 
       p6, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison.pdf"), 
       p6, width = 8, height = 6)

# 图7：S100a10表达热图（按伪时间排序）
# 创建矩阵数据
heatmap_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
  arrange(pseudotime) %>%
  mutate(pseudotime_bin = cut(pseudotime, breaks = 50, labels = FALSE))

heatmap_summary <- heatmap_data %>%
  group_by(pseudotime_bin, refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_expr = mean(S100a10, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(refined_celltype, group), 
              values_from = mean_expr,
              names_sep = "_")

p7 <- heatmap_summary %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -pseudotime_bin, names_to = "condition", values_to = "expression") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = pseudotime_bin, y = condition, fill = expression)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(title = "S100a10 Expression Heatmap Along Pseudotime",
       x = "Pseudotime Bins",
       y = "Cell Type and Group",
       fill = "Mean Expression") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "07_S100a10_expression_heatmap.png"), 
       p7, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "07_S100a10_expression_heatmap.pdf"), 
       p7, width = 10, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：综合统计分析和可视化
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤4：综合统计分析和可视化...\n")

# 创建综合统计表
comprehensive_stats <- S100a10_expr_target %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(S100a10, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(S100a10, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(S100a10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(S100a10, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(S100a10, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(S100a10, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(S100a10, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

# 图8：均值比较条形图（带误差棒和显著性）
p8_data <- comprehensive_stats

# 计算组间比较的统计显著性
bar_stats <- data.frame()
for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- S100a10_expr_target %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  bhi_expr <- ct_data$S100a10[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_expr <- ct_data$S100a10[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  if(length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
    p_val <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr)$p.value,
                      error = function(e) NA)
  } else {
    p_val <- NA
  }
  
  bar_stats <- rbind(bar_stats, data.frame(
    celltype = ct,
    p_value = p_val,
    sig_label = if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
             ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    } else { "" }
  ))
}

p8 <- ggplot(p8_data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = mean, fill = group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(0.9), alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd),
                position = position_dodge(0.9), width = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Mean S100a10 Expression Comparison",
       subtitle = "Error bars show standard deviation",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Mean S100a10 Expression ± SD",
       fill = "Group") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom")

# 添加组间比较的显著性标注
for (i in 1:nrow(bar_stats)) {
  if (!is.na(bar_stats$p_value[i]) && bar_stats$p_value[i] < 0.05) {
    ct <- bar_stats$celltype[i]
    y_pos <- max(p8_data$mean[p8_data$refined_celltype == ct] + 
                 p8_data$sd[p8_data$refined_celltype == ct]) * 1.1
    
    p8 <- p8 + 
      annotate("text", 
               x = i, 
               y = y_pos, 
               label = bar_stats$sig_label[i], 
               size = 5)
  }
}

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "08_mean_expression_comparison.png"), 
       p8, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "08_mean_expression_comparison.pdf"), 
       p8, width = 8, height = 6)

# 图9：折叠变化（Fold Change）可视化
fc_data <- comprehensive_stats %>%
  select(refined_celltype, group, mean) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = mean) %>%
  mutate(
    fold_change = PEA / BHI,
    log2_fc = log2(fold_change),
    direction = ifelse(log2_fc > 0, "Up", "Down")
  )

p9 <- ggplot(fc_data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = log2_fc, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(log2_fc, 2)), 
            vjust = ifelse(fc_data$log2_fc > 0, -0.5, 1.5),
            size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up" = "#E59693", "Down" = "#78A9cd")) +
  labs(title = "S100a10 Expression Fold Change (PEA vs BHI)",
       subtitle = "Log2 fold change values",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Log2 Fold Change",
       fill = "Direction") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "09_fold_change_visualization.png"), 
       p9, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "09_fold_change_visualization.pdf"), 
       p9, width = 8, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：UMAP可视化（增强版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤5：生成增强版UMAP可视化...\n")

# 图10：UMAP上的S100a10表达（分面图）
p10 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_subset, 
                   features = "S100a10",
                   split.by = "group",
                   cols = c("lightgrey", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
                   pt.size = 0.8) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "S100a10 Expression on UMAP",
    subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "10_S100a10_UMAP_expression_split.png"), 
       p10, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "10_S100a10_UMAP_expression_split.pdf"), 
       p10, width = 12, height = 6)

# 图11：UMAP上的细胞类型分布
Idents(seurat_subset) <- "refined_celltype"
p11 <- DimPlot(seurat_subset,
               reduction = "umap",
               split.by = "group",
               cols = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                       "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                       "Tuft_30" = "#009E74"),
               pt.size = 0.8) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Cell Type Distribution on UMAP",
    subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "11_celltype_UMAP_distribution.png"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "11_celltype_UMAP_distribution.pdf"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：详细统计结果输出
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤6：输出详细统计结果...\n")

# 1. 组间比较结果（含多重检验校正）
comparison_results <- data.frame()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  data_ct <- S100a10_expr_target %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  if (nrow(data_ct) > 0) {
    bhi_expr <- data_ct$S100a10[data_ct$group == "BHI"]
    pea_expr <- data_ct$S100a10[data_ct$group == "PEA"]
    
    if (length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
      test_result <- tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr),
        error = function(e) list(p.value = NA)
      )
      
      # 计算Cohen's d
      if (!is.na(test_result$p.value)) {
        pooled_sd <- sqrt(((length(bhi_expr)-1)*var(bhi_expr) + 
                          (length(pea_expr)-1)*var(pea_expr)) / 
                         (length(bhi_expr) + length(pea_expr) - 2))
        cohen_d <- if(pooled_sd > 0) {
          (mean(pea_expr) - mean(bhi_expr)) / pooled_sd
        } else { NA }
      } else {
        cohen_d <- NA
      }
      
      comparison_results <- rbind(comparison_results, data.frame(
        Cell_Type = ct,
        BHI_n = length(bhi_expr),
        PEA_n = length(pea_expr),
        BHI_mean = mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        BHI_median = median(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        PEA_mean = mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        PEA_median = median(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        Fold_Change = mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        Log2_FC = log2(mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE)),
        Cohen_d = cohen_d,
        P_value = test_result$p.value,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

# 添加多重检验校正
if (nrow(comparison_results) > 0) {
  # 只对非NA的p值进行校正
  valid_p <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_value)
  comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH <- NA
  comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni <- NA
  
  if (sum(valid_p) > 0) {
    comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH[valid_p] <- p.adjust(comparison_results$P_value[valid_p], method = "BH")
    comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni[valid_p] <- p.adjust(comparison_results$P_value[valid_p], method = "bonferroni")
  }
  
  comparison_results$Significant_BH <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH) & comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH < 0.05
  comparison_results$Significant_bonferroni <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni) & comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni < 0.05
}

write.csv(comparison_results, 
          file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "S100a10_group_comparison_detailed.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 2. 伪时序相关性分析（安全版本）
pseudotime_correlation <- data.frame()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  for (grp in c("BHI", "PEA")) {
    subset_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
      filter(refined_celltype == ct, group == grp)
    
    if (nrow(subset_data) > 3) {
      # 移除NA值
      clean_data <- subset_data %>%
        filter(!is.na(pseudotime), !is.na(S100a10))
      
      if (nrow(clean_data) > 3) {
        # 尝试计算相关性
        spearman_result <- tryCatch({
          cor.test(clean_data$pseudotime, clean_data$S100a10, method = "spearman")
        }, error = function(e) {
          list(estimate = NA, p.value = NA)
        })
        
        pearson_result <- tryCatch({
          cor.test(clean_data$pseudotime, clean_data$S100a10, method = "pearson")
        }, error = function(e) {
          list(estimate = NA, p.value = NA)
        })
        
        pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
          refined_celltype = ct,
          group = grp,
          n_cells = nrow(clean_data),
          spearman_cor = as.numeric(spearman_result$estimate),
          pearson_cor = as.numeric(pearson_result$estimate),
          spearman_p = spearman_result$p.value,
          pearson_p = pearson_result$p.value,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      } else {
        pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
          refined_celltype = ct,
          group = grp,
          n_cells = nrow(clean_data),
          spearman_cor = NA,
          pearson_cor = NA,
          spearman_p = NA,
          pearson_p = NA,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    } else {
      pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
        refined_celltype = ct,
        group = grp,
        n_cells = nrow(subset_data),
        spearman_cor = NA,
        pearson_cor = NA,
        spearman_p = NA,
        pearson_p = NA,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

write.csv(pseudotime_correlation, 
          file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "S100a10_pseudotime_correlation_detailed.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 3. 时间分布统计
time_distribution_stats <- pseudotime_data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_time = mean(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_time = sd(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_time = median(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1_time = quantile(pseudotime, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_time = quantile(pseudotime, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, 
              values_from = c(n, mean_time, sd_time, median_time, Q1_time, Q3_time))

write.csv(time_distribution_stats, 
          file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "pseudotime_distribution_stats.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 4. 综合统计表
write.csv(comprehensive_stats, 
          file.path(S100a10_output_dir, "S100a10_expression_comprehensive_stats.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# =============================================================================
# 最终总结报告
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== S100a10表达分析完成（增强版）=====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("分析总结:\n")
cat("----------\n")
cat(sprintf("总分析细胞数: %d\n", nrow(S100a10_expr_target)))
cat(sprintf("- Epithelial_7: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(S100a10_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7"),
            sum(S100a10_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                S100a10_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(S100a10_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                S100a10_expr_target$group == "PEA")))
cat(sprintf("- Epithelial_13: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(S100a10_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13"),
            sum(S100a10_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                S100a10_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(S100a10_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                S100a10_expr_target$group == "PEA")))
cat(sprintf("- Tuft_30: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(S100a10_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30"),
            sum(S100a10_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" & 
                S100a10_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(S100a10_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" & 
                S100a10_expr_target$group == "PEA")))

cat("\n表达差异统计:\n")
cat("---------------\n")
# 格式化输出
if (nrow(comparison_results) > 0) {
  comparison_output <- comparison_results[, c("Cell_Type", "Log2_FC", "P_value", "P_adjusted_BH", "Significant_BH")]
  comparison_output$Log2_FC <- round(comparison_output$Log2_FC, 3)
  comparison_output$P_value <- round(comparison_output$P_value, 4)
  comparison_output$P_adjusted_BH <- round(comparison_output$P_adjusted_BH, 4)
  print(comparison_output, row.names = FALSE)
} else {
  cat("No significant comparisons found.\n")
}

cat("\n伪时序相关性:\n")
cat("-------------\n")
# 过滤掉NA值并格式化输出
correlation_output <- pseudotime_correlation[, c("refined_celltype", "group", "n_cells", "spearman_cor", "spearman_p")]
correlation_output$spearman_cor <- round(correlation_output$spearman_cor, 3)
correlation_output$spearman_p <- round(correlation_output$spearman_p, 4)
print(correlation_output, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n生成的图表文件:\n")
cat("----------------\n")
cat("所有图表均提供PNG和PDF两种格式：\n")
cat("1. 01_S100a10_expression_by_celltype_with_stats (.png/.pdf) - 细胞类型间表达比较（含显著性）\n")
cat("2. 02_S100a10_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats (.png/.pdf) - 各细胞类型内组间比较\n")
cat("3. 03_S100a10_expression_density_enhanced (.png/.pdf) - 表达密度分布图\n")
cat("4. 04_S100a10_pseudotime_overall_enhanced (.png/.pdf) - 伪时序总体表达趋势\n")
cat("5. 05_S100a10_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats (.png/.pdf) - 各细胞类型伪时序表达（含统计）\n")
cat("6. 06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison (.png/.pdf) - 伪时间分布比较\n")
cat("7. 07_S100a10_expression_heatmap (.png/.pdf) - 表达热图\n")
cat("8. 08_mean_expression_comparison (.png/.pdf) - 平均表达量比较\n")
cat("9. 09_fold_change_visualization (.png/.pdf) - 倍数变化可视化\n")
cat("10. 10_S100a10_UMAP_expression_split (.png/.pdf) - UMAP表达分布\n")
cat("11. 11_celltype_UMAP_distribution (.png/.pdf) - UMAP细胞类型分布\n")

cat("\n数据文件:\n")
cat("---------\n")
cat("1. S100a10_group_comparison_detailed.csv - 详细组间比较结果\n")
cat("2. S100a10_pseudotime_correlation_detailed.csv - 伪时序相关性分析\n")
cat("3. pseudotime_distribution_stats.csv - 时间分布统计\n")
cat("4. S100a10_expression_comprehensive_stats.csv - 综合表达统计\n")

cat("\n所有结果保存在:", S100a10_output_dir, "\n")
cat("=====================================\n")
```
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 补充分析：Jak2基因在目标细胞群体的表达分析（增强版）
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 补充分析：Jak2基因表达分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 创建输出目录
Jak2_output_dir <- "Jak2_expression_analysis_enhanced"
if (!dir.exists(Jak2_output_dir)) {
  dir.create(Jak2_output_dir)
}

# 加载必要的包
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(monocle3)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：加载数据并提取Jak2表达信息
# =============================================================================
cat("步骤1：加载数据并提取Jak2表达信息...\n")

# 加载纯净数据集
seurat_pure <- readRDS(file.path("stage0_preprocessing_results", "seurat_pure_annotated.rds"))

# 检查Jak2基因是否存在
if (!"Jak2" %in% rownames(seurat_pure)) {
  stop("Jak2基因不在数据集中")
}

# 提取Jak2表达数据
Jak2_expr <- FetchData(seurat_pure, vars = c("Jak2", "refined_celltype", "group"))

# 筛选目标细胞类型
target_celltypes <- c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
Jak2_expr_target <- Jak2_expr %>%
  filter(refined_celltype %in% target_celltypes)

cat(sprintf("分析的细胞数: %d\n", nrow(Jak2_expr_target)))

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：Jak2在三种细胞群体的表达分布（带统计检验）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤2：生成Jak2在三种细胞群体的表达分布图（带统计检验）...\n")

# 图1：小提琴图 - 按细胞类型分组（带统计显著性）
# 定义比较组合
my_comparisons <- list(
  c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13"),
  c("Epithelial_7", "Tuft_30"),
  c("Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
)

p1 <- ggplot(Jak2_expr_target, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = Jak2, fill = refined_celltype)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 0.5, 
               position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                              "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                              "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "Jak2 Expression Across Cell Types",
```
