```{r}
ggsave(file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "08_mean_expression_comparison.pdf"), 
       p8, width = 8, height = 6)

# 图9：折叠变化（Fold Change）可视化
fc_data <- comprehensive_stats %>%
  select(refined_celltype, group, mean) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = mean) %>%
  mutate(
    fold_change = PEA / BHI,
    log2_fc = log2(fold_change),
    direction = ifelse(log2_fc > 0, "Up", "Down")
  )

p9 <- ggplot(fc_data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = log2_fc, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(log2_fc, 2)), 
            vjust = ifelse(fc_data$log2_fc > 0, -0.5, 1.5),
            size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up" = "#E59693", "Down" = "#78A9cd")) +
  labs(title = "Rap1b Expression Fold Change (PEA vs BHI)",
       subtitle = "Log2 fold change values",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Log2 Fold Change",
       fill = "Direction") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "09_fold_change_visualization.png"), 
       p9, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "09_fold_change_visualization.pdf"), 
       p9, width = 8, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：UMAP可视化（增强版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤5：生成增强版UMAP可视化...\n")

# 图10：UMAP上的Rap1b表达（分面图）
p10 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_subset, 
                   features = "Rap1b",
                   split.by = "group",
                   cols = c("lightgrey", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
                   pt.size = 0.8) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Rap1b Expression on UMAP",
    subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave(file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "10_Rap1b_UMAP_expression_split.png"), 
       p10, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "10_Rap1b_UMAP_expression_split.pdf"), 
       p10, width = 12, height = 6)

# 图11：UMAP上的细胞类型分布
Idents(seurat_subset) <- "refined_celltype"
p11 <- DimPlot(seurat_subset,
               reduction = "umap",
               split.by = "group",
               cols = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                       "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                       "Tuft_30" = "#009E74"),
               pt.size = 0.8) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Cell Type Distribution on UMAP",
    subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave(file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "11_celltype_UMAP_distribution.png"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "11_celltype_UMAP_distribution.pdf"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：详细统计结果输出
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤6：输出详细统计结果...\n")

# 1. 组间比较结果（含多重检验校正）
comparison_results <- data.frame()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  data_ct <- Rap1b_expr_target %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  if (nrow(data_ct) > 0) {
    bhi_expr <- data_ct$Rap1b[data_ct$group == "BHI"]
    pea_expr <- data_ct$Rap1b[data_ct$group == "PEA"]
    
    if (length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
      test_result <- tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr),
        error = function(e) list(p.value = NA)
      )
      
      # 计算Cohen's d
      if (!is.na(test_result$p.value)) {
        pooled_sd <- sqrt(((length(bhi_expr)-1)*var(bhi_expr) + 
                          (length(pea_expr)-1)*var(pea_expr)) / 
                         (length(bhi_expr) + length(pea_expr) - 2))
        cohen_d <- if(pooled_sd > 0) {
          (mean(pea_expr) - mean(bhi_expr)) / pooled_sd
        } else { NA }
      } else {
        cohen_d <- NA
      }
      
      comparison_results <- rbind(comparison_results, data.frame(
        Cell_Type = ct,
        BHI_n = length(bhi_expr),
        PEA_n = length(pea_expr),
        BHI_mean = mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        BHI_median = median(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        PEA_mean = mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        PEA_median = median(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        Fold_Change = mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        Log2_FC = log2(mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE)),
        Cohen_d = cohen_d,
        P_value = test_result$p.value,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

# 添加多重检验校正
if (nrow(comparison_results) > 0) {
  # 只对非NA的p值进行校正
  valid_p <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_value)
  comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH <- NA
  comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni <- NA
  
  if (sum(valid_p) > 0) {
    comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH[valid_p] <- p.adjust(comparison_results$P_value[valid_p], method = "BH")
    comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni[valid_p] <- p.adjust(comparison_results$P_value[valid_p], method = "bonferroni")
  }
  
  comparison_results$Significant_BH <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH) & comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH < 0.05
  comparison_results$Significant_bonferroni <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni) & comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni < 0.05
}

write.csv(comparison_results, 
          file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "Rap1b_group_comparison_detailed.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 2. 伪时序相关性分析（安全版本）
pseudotime_correlation <- data.frame()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  for (grp in c("BHI", "PEA")) {
    subset_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
      filter(refined_celltype == ct, group == grp)
    
    if (nrow(subset_data) > 3) {
      # 移除NA值
      clean_data <- subset_data %>%
        filter(!is.na(pseudotime), !is.na(Rap1b))
      
      if (nrow(clean_data) > 3) {
        # 尝试计算相关性
        spearman_result <- tryCatch({
          cor.test(clean_data$pseudotime, clean_data$Rap1b, method = "spearman")
        }, error = function(e) {
          list(estimate = NA, p.value = NA)
        })
        
        pearson_result <- tryCatch({
          cor.test(clean_data$pseudotime, clean_data$Rap1b, method = "pearson")
        }, error = function(e) {
          list(estimate = NA, p.value = NA)
        })
        
        pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
          refined_celltype = ct,
          group = grp,
          n_cells = nrow(clean_data),
          spearman_cor = as.numeric(spearman_result$estimate),
          pearson_cor = as.numeric(pearson_result$estimate),
          spearman_p = spearman_result$p.value,
          pearson_p = pearson_result$p.value,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      } else {
        pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
          refined_celltype = ct,
          group = grp,
          n_cells = nrow(clean_data),
          spearman_cor = NA,
          pearson_cor = NA,
          spearman_p = NA,
          pearson_p = NA,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    } else {
      pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
        refined_celltype = ct,
        group = grp,
        n_cells = nrow(subset_data),
        spearman_cor = NA,
        pearson_cor = NA,
        spearman_p = NA,
        pearson_p = NA,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

write.csv(pseudotime_correlation, 
          file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "Rap1b_pseudotime_correlation_detailed.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 3. 时间分布统计
time_distribution_stats <- pseudotime_data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_time = mean(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_time = sd(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_time = median(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1_time = quantile(pseudotime, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_time = quantile(pseudotime, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, 
              values_from = c(n, mean_time, sd_time, median_time, Q1_time, Q3_time))

write.csv(time_distribution_stats, 
          file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "pseudotime_distribution_stats.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 4. 综合统计表
write.csv(comprehensive_stats, 
          file.path(Rap1b_output_dir, "Rap1b_expression_comprehensive_stats.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# =============================================================================
# 最终总结报告
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Rap1b表达分析完成（增强版）=====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("分析总结:\n")
cat("----------\n")
cat(sprintf("总分析细胞数: %d\n", nrow(Rap1b_expr_target)))
cat(sprintf("- Epithelial_7: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(Rap1b_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7"),
            sum(Rap1b_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                Rap1b_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(Rap1b_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                Rap1b_expr_target$group == "PEA")))
cat(sprintf("- Epithelial_13: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(Rap1b_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13"),
            sum(Rap1b_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                Rap1b_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(Rap1b_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                Rap1b_expr_target$group == "PEA")))
cat(sprintf("- Tuft_30: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(Rap1b_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30"),
            sum(Rap1b_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" & 
                Rap1b_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(Rap1b_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" & 
                Rap1b_expr_target$group == "PEA")))

cat("\n表达差异统计:\n")
cat("---------------\n")
# 格式化输出
if (nrow(comparison_results) > 0) {
  comparison_output <- comparison_results[, c("Cell_Type", "Log2_FC", "P_value", "P_adjusted_BH", "Significant_BH")]
  comparison_output$Log2_FC <- round(comparison_output$Log2_FC, 3)
  comparison_output$P_value <- round(comparison_output$P_value, 4)
  comparison_output$P_adjusted_BH <- round(comparison_output$P_adjusted_BH, 4)
  print(comparison_output, row.names = FALSE)
} else {
  cat("No significant comparisons found.\n")
}

cat("\n伪时序相关性:\n")
cat("-------------\n")
# 过滤掉NA值并格式化输出
correlation_output <- pseudotime_correlation[, c("refined_celltype", "group", "n_cells", "spearman_cor", "spearman_p")]
correlation_output$spearman_cor <- round(correlation_output$spearman_cor, 3)
correlation_output$spearman_p <- round(correlation_output$spearman_p, 4)
print(correlation_output, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n生成的图表文件:\n")
cat("----------------\n")
cat("所有图表均提供PNG和PDF两种格式：\n")
cat("1. 01_Rap1b_expression_by_celltype_with_stats (.png/.pdf) - 细胞类型间表达比较（含显著性）\n")
cat("2. 02_Rap1b_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats (.png/.pdf) - 各细胞类型内组间比较\n")
cat("3. 03_Rap1b_expression_density_enhanced (.png/.pdf) - 表达密度分布图\n")
cat("4. 04_Rap1b_pseudotime_overall_enhanced (.png/.pdf) - 伪时序总体表达趋势\n")
cat("5. 05_Rap1b_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats (.png/.pdf) - 各细胞类型伪时序表达（含统计）\n")
cat("6. 06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison (.png/.pdf) - 伪时间分布比较\n")
cat("7. 07_Rap1b_expression_heatmap (.png/.pdf) - 表达热图\n")
cat("8. 08_mean_expression_comparison (.png/.pdf) - 平均表达量比较\n")
cat("9. 09_fold_change_visualization (.png/.pdf) - 倍数变化可视化\n")
cat("10. 10_Rap1b_UMAP_expression_split (.png/.pdf) - UMAP表达分布\n")
cat("11. 11_celltype_UMAP_distribution (.png/.pdf) - UMAP细胞类型分布\n")

cat("\n数据文件:\n")
cat("---------\n")
cat("1. Rap1b_group_comparison_detailed.csv - 详细组间比较结果\n")
cat("2. Rap1b_pseudotime_correlation_detailed.csv - 伪时序相关性分析\n")
cat("3. pseudotime_distribution_stats.csv - 时间分布统计\n")
cat("4. Rap1b_expression_comprehensive_stats.csv - 综合表达统计\n")

cat("\n所有结果保存在:", Rap1b_output_dir, "\n")
cat("=====================================\n")
```
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 补充分析：Ccl5基因在目标细胞群体的表达分析（增强版）
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 补充分析：Ccl5基因表达分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 创建输出目录
Ccl5_output_dir <- "Ccl5_expression_analysis_enhanced"
if (!dir.exists(Ccl5_output_dir)) {
  dir.create(Ccl5_output_dir)
}

# 加载必要的包
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(monocle3)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：加载数据并提取Ccl5表达信息
# =============================================================================
cat("步骤1：加载数据并提取Ccl5表达信息...\n")

# 加载纯净数据集
seurat_pure <- readRDS(file.path("stage0_preprocessing_results", "seurat_pure_annotated.rds"))

# 检查Ccl5基因是否存在
if (!"Ccl5" %in% rownames(seurat_pure)) {
  stop("Ccl5基因不在数据集中")
}

# 提取Ccl5表达数据
Ccl5_expr <- FetchData(seurat_pure, vars = c("Ccl5", "refined_celltype", "group"))

# 筛选目标细胞类型
target_celltypes <- c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
Ccl5_expr_target <- Ccl5_expr %>%
  filter(refined_celltype %in% target_celltypes)

cat(sprintf("分析的细胞数: %d\n", nrow(Ccl5_expr_target)))

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：Ccl5在三种细胞群体的表达分布（带统计检验）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤2：生成Ccl5在三种细胞群体的表达分布图（带统计检验）...\n")

# 图1：小提琴图 - 按细胞类型分组（带统计显著性）
# 定义比较组合
my_comparisons <- list(
  c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13"),
  c("Epithelial_7", "Tuft_30"),
  c("Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
)

p1 <- ggplot(Ccl5_expr_target, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = Ccl5, fill = refined_celltype)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 0.5, 
               position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                              "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                              "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "Ccl5 Expression Across Cell Types",
       subtitle = "Statistical comparison between cell types",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Ccl5 Expression Level",
       fill = "Cell Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "none") +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,
                     method = "wilcox.test",
                     label = "p.signif",
                     size = 4)

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "01_Ccl5_expression_by_celltype_with_stats.png"), 
       p1, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "01_Ccl5_expression_by_celltype_with_stats.pdf"), 
       p1, width = 8, height = 7)

# 图2：分面小提琴图 - 按细胞类型和处理组（每个细胞类型内的组间比较）
p2_data <- Ccl5_expr_target

# 为每个细胞类型创建单独的图
p2_list <- list()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- p2_data %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  # 计算组间p值
  bhi_expr <- ct_data$Ccl5[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_expr <- ct_data$Ccl5[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  if(length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
    p_val <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr)$p.value,
                      error = function(e) NA)
    
    sig_label <- if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
             ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    } else { "NA" }
    
    subtitle_text <- if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      paste("p =", format.pval(p_val, digits = 3))
    } else { "Insufficient data" }
  } else {
    p_val <- NA
    sig_label <- ""
    subtitle_text <- "Insufficient data"
  }
  
  # 计算y轴最大值以放置标签
  y_max <- max(ct_data$Ccl5) * 1.15
  
  p2_list[[ct]] <- ggplot(ct_data, aes(x = group, y = Ccl5, fill = group)) +
    geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = ct,
         x = "Treatment Group",
         y = "Ccl5 Expression",
         subtitle = subtitle_text) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
  
  # 只在有显著差异时添加标注
  if(!is.na(p_val) && p_val < 0.05) {
    p2_list[[ct]] <- p2_list[[ct]] +
      annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = y_max, label = sig_label, size = 5) +
      annotate("segment", x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_max * 0.95, yend = y_max * 0.95)
  }
}

p2 <- wrap_plots(p2_list, ncol = 3)

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "02_Ccl5_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats.png"), 
       p2, width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "02_Ccl5_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats.pdf"), 
       p2, width = 14, height = 5)

# 图3：密度图（增强版）
p3 <- ggplot(Ccl5_expr_target, aes(x = Ccl5, fill = refined_celltype)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, adjust = 1.5) +
  geom_rug(aes(color = refined_celltype), alpha = 0.3, sides = "b") +
  facet_wrap(~group, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                              "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                              "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                               "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                               "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "Ccl5 Expression Density Distribution",
       subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
       x = "Ccl5 Expression Level",
       y = "Density",
       fill = "Cell Type",
       color = "Cell Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey50"))

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "03_Ccl5_expression_density_enhanced.png"), 
       p3, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "03_Ccl5_expression_density_enhanced.pdf"), 
       p3, width = 10, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：伪时序分析中的Ccl5表达（增强版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤3：伪时序分析中的Ccl5表达（增强版）...\n")

# 筛选目标细胞并构建轨迹
seurat_subset <- subset(seurat_pure, refined_celltype %in% target_celltypes)
cds <- as.cell_data_set(seurat_subset)
cds <- preprocess_cds(cds, num_dim = 100)
set.seed(123)
cds <- reduce_dimension(cds, reduction_method = "UMAP")
cds <- cluster_cells(cds, resolution = 1e-5)
cds <- learn_graph(cds)

# 设置根节点
get_root_node <- function(cds, cell_type = "Epithelial_7"){
  cell_ids <- which(colData(cds)[, "refined_celltype"] == cell_type)
  if (length(cell_ids) == 0) {
    stop("未找到指定细胞类型的细胞")
  }
  closest_vertex <- cds@principal_graph_aux[["UMAP"]]$pr_graph_cell_proj_closest_vertex
  closest_vertex <- as.matrix(closest_vertex[cell_ids, ])
  root_pr_nodes <- igraph::V(principal_graph(cds)[["UMAP"]])$name[as.numeric(names(which.max(table(closest_vertex))))]
  root_pr_nodes
}

root_node <- get_root_node(cds, cell_type = "Epithelial_7")
cds <- order_cells(cds, root_pr_nodes = root_node)

# 提取伪时间和Ccl5表达数据
pseudotime_data <- data.frame(
  cell_id = rownames(colData(cds)),
  pseudotime = pseudotime(cds),
  Ccl5 = exprs(cds)["Ccl5", ],
  refined_celltype = colData(cds)$refined_celltype,
  group = colData(cds)$group,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 过滤无效数据
pseudotime_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
  filter(is.finite(pseudotime))

# 图4：Ccl5表达随伪时间变化（总体，增强版）
p4 <- ggplot(pseudotime_data, aes(x = pseudotime, y = Ccl5)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = refined_celltype), alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, color = "black", size = 1.2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = refined_celltype), method = "loess", se = FALSE, size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                               "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                               "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
  labs(title = "Ccl5 Expression Along Pseudotime Trajectory",
       subtitle = "Overall trend (black) and cell-type specific trends",
       x = "Pseudotime",
       y = "Ccl5 Expression Level",
       color = "Cell Type") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "04_Ccl5_pseudotime_overall_enhanced.png"), 
       p4, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "04_Ccl5_pseudotime_overall_enhanced.pdf"), 
       p4, width = 10, height = 7)

# 图5：Ccl5表达随伪时间变化（按细胞类型分面，带统计）
# 计算每个细胞类型中两组的时间分布差异
time_comparison <- pseudotime_data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_time = mean(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_time = sd(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

p5_list <- list()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- pseudotime_data %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  # 时间分布差异检验
  bhi_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  time_p <- if(length(bhi_time) > 3 && length(pea_time) > 3) {
    tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_time, pea_time)$p.value,
             error = function(e) NA)
  } else { NA }
  
  # 表达量差异检验
  bhi_expr <- ct_data$Ccl5[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_expr <- ct_data$Ccl5[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  expr_p <- if(length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
    tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr)$p.value,
             error = function(e) NA)
  } else { NA }
  
  # 创建副标题
  subtitle_text <- if(!is.na(time_p) && !is.na(expr_p)) {
    paste("Time dist. p =", format.pval(time_p, digits = 2),
          "| Expr. p =", format.pval(expr_p, digits = 2))
  } else if(!is.na(time_p)) {
    paste("Time dist. p =", format.pval(time_p, digits = 2))
  } else if(!is.na(expr_p)) {
    paste("Expr. p =", format.pval(expr_p, digits = 2))
  } else {
    "Insufficient data for statistical test"
  }
  
  p5_list[[ct]] <- ggplot(ct_data, aes(x = pseudotime, y = Ccl5)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = group), alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color = group), method = "loess", se = TRUE, size = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
    labs(title = ct,
         subtitle = subtitle_text,
         x = "Pseudotime",
         y = "Ccl5 Expression") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom")
}

p5 <- wrap_plots(p5_list, ncol = 3, guides = "collect") & 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "05_Ccl5_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats.png"), 
       p5, width = 15, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "05_Ccl5_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats.pdf"), 
       p5, width = 15, height = 5)

# 图6：时间分布比较箱线图
# 先计算所有的统计检验结果
time_stats <- data.frame()
for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- pseudotime_data %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  bhi_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_time <- ct_data$pseudotime[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  if(length(bhi_time) > 3 && length(pea_time) > 3) {
    p_val <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_time, pea_time)$p.value,
                      error = function(e) NA)
  } else {
    p_val <- NA
  }
  
  time_stats <- rbind(time_stats, data.frame(
    celltype = ct,
    p_value = p_val,
    sig_label = if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
             ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    } else { "" }
  ))
}

p6 <- ggplot(pseudotime_data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = pseudotime, fill = group)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8, jitter.width = 0.2),
             alpha = 0.3, size = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Pseudotime Distribution Comparison",
       subtitle = "Temporal differences between BHI and PEA groups",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Pseudotime",
       fill = "Group") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom")

# 添加统计显著性标注
for (i in 1:nrow(time_stats)) {
  if (!is.na(time_stats$p_value[i]) && time_stats$p_value[i] < 0.05) {
    y_max <- max(pseudotime_data$pseudotime[pseudotime_data$refined_celltype == time_stats$celltype[i]]) * 1.05
    
    p6 <- p6 + 
      annotate("text", 
               x = i, 
               y = y_max, 
               label = time_stats$sig_label[i], 
               size = 4)
  }
}

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison.png"), 
       p6, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison.pdf"), 
       p6, width = 8, height = 6)

# 图7：Ccl5表达热图（按伪时间排序）
# 创建矩阵数据
heatmap_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
  arrange(pseudotime) %>%
  mutate(pseudotime_bin = cut(pseudotime, breaks = 50, labels = FALSE))

heatmap_summary <- heatmap_data %>%
  group_by(pseudotime_bin, refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_expr = mean(Ccl5, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(refined_celltype, group), 
              values_from = mean_expr,
              names_sep = "_")

p7 <- heatmap_summary %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -pseudotime_bin, names_to = "condition", values_to = "expression") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = pseudotime_bin, y = condition, fill = expression)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis(option = "C", na.value = "grey90") +
  labs(title = "Ccl5 Expression Heatmap Along Pseudotime",
       x = "Pseudotime Bins",
       y = "Cell Type and Group",
       fill = "Mean Expression") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "07_Ccl5_expression_heatmap.png"), 
       p7, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "07_Ccl5_expression_heatmap.pdf"), 
       p7, width = 10, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：综合统计分析和可视化
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤4：综合统计分析和可视化...\n")

# 创建综合统计表
comprehensive_stats <- Ccl5_expr_target %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(Ccl5, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Ccl5, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(Ccl5, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(Ccl5, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(Ccl5, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(Ccl5, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(Ccl5, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

# 图8：均值比较条形图（带误差棒和显著性）
p8_data <- comprehensive_stats

# 计算组间比较的统计显著性
bar_stats <- data.frame()
for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  ct_data <- Ccl5_expr_target %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  bhi_expr <- ct_data$Ccl5[ct_data$group == "BHI"]
  pea_expr <- ct_data$Ccl5[ct_data$group == "PEA"]
  
  if(length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
    p_val <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr)$p.value,
                      error = function(e) NA)
  } else {
    p_val <- NA
  }
  
  bar_stats <- rbind(bar_stats, data.frame(
    celltype = ct,
    p_value = p_val,
    sig_label = if(!is.na(p_val)) {
      ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
             ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                    ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
    } else { "" }
  ))
}

p8 <- ggplot(p8_data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = mean, fill = group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(0.9), alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd),
                position = position_dodge(0.9), width = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BHI" = "#78A9cd", "PEA" = "#E59693")) +
  labs(title = "Mean Ccl5 Expression Comparison",
       subtitle = "Error bars show standard deviation",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Mean Ccl5 Expression ± SD",
       fill = "Group") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom")

# 添加组间比较的显著性标注
for (i in 1:nrow(bar_stats)) {
  if (!is.na(bar_stats$p_value[i]) && bar_stats$p_value[i] < 0.05) {
    ct <- bar_stats$celltype[i]
    y_pos <- max(p8_data$mean[p8_data$refined_celltype == ct] + 
                 p8_data$sd[p8_data$refined_celltype == ct]) * 1.1
    
    p8 <- p8 + 
      annotate("text", 
               x = i, 
               y = y_pos, 
               label = bar_stats$sig_label[i], 
               size = 5)
  }
}

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "08_mean_expression_comparison.png"), 
       p8, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "08_mean_expression_comparison.pdf"), 
       p8, width = 8, height = 6)

# 图9：折叠变化（Fold Change）可视化
fc_data <- comprehensive_stats %>%
  select(refined_celltype, group, mean) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = mean) %>%
  mutate(
    fold_change = PEA / BHI,
    log2_fc = log2(fold_change),
    direction = ifelse(log2_fc > 0, "Up", "Down")
  )

p9 <- ggplot(fc_data, aes(x = refined_celltype, y = log2_fc, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(log2_fc, 2)), 
            vjust = ifelse(fc_data$log2_fc > 0, -0.5, 1.5),
            size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up" = "#E59693", "Down" = "#78A9cd")) +
  labs(title = "Ccl5 Expression Fold Change (PEA vs BHI)",
       subtitle = "Log2 fold change values",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Log2 Fold Change",
       fill = "Direction") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "09_fold_change_visualization.png"), 
       p9, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "09_fold_change_visualization.pdf"), 
       p9, width = 8, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：UMAP可视化（增强版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤5：生成增强版UMAP可视化...\n")

# 图10：UMAP上的Ccl5表达（分面图）
p10 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_subset, 
                   features = "Ccl5",
                   split.by = "group",
                   cols = c("lightgrey", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
                   pt.size = 0.8) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Ccl5 Expression on UMAP",
    subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "10_Ccl5_UMAP_expression_split.png"), 
       p10, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "10_Ccl5_UMAP_expression_split.pdf"), 
       p10, width = 12, height = 6)

# 图11：UMAP上的细胞类型分布
Idents(seurat_subset) <- "refined_celltype"
p11 <- DimPlot(seurat_subset,
               reduction = "umap",
               split.by = "group",
               cols = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                       "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                       "Tuft_30" = "#009E74"),
               pt.size = 0.8) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Cell Type Distribution on UMAP",
    subtitle = "Comparison between BHI and PEA groups",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "11_celltype_UMAP_distribution.png"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "11_celltype_UMAP_distribution.pdf"), 
       p11, width = 12, height = 6)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：详细统计结果输出
# =============================================================================
cat("\n步骤6：输出详细统计结果...\n")

# 1. 组间比较结果（含多重检验校正）
comparison_results <- data.frame()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  data_ct <- Ccl5_expr_target %>% filter(refined_celltype == ct)
  
  if (nrow(data_ct) > 0) {
    bhi_expr <- data_ct$Ccl5[data_ct$group == "BHI"]
    pea_expr <- data_ct$Ccl5[data_ct$group == "PEA"]
    
    if (length(bhi_expr) > 3 && length(pea_expr) > 3) {
      test_result <- tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(bhi_expr, pea_expr),
        error = function(e) list(p.value = NA)
      )
      
      # 计算Cohen's d
      if (!is.na(test_result$p.value)) {
        pooled_sd <- sqrt(((length(bhi_expr)-1)*var(bhi_expr) + 
                          (length(pea_expr)-1)*var(pea_expr)) / 
                         (length(bhi_expr) + length(pea_expr) - 2))
        cohen_d <- if(pooled_sd > 0) {
          (mean(pea_expr) - mean(bhi_expr)) / pooled_sd
        } else { NA }
      } else {
        cohen_d <- NA
      }
      
      comparison_results <- rbind(comparison_results, data.frame(
        Cell_Type = ct,
        BHI_n = length(bhi_expr),
        PEA_n = length(pea_expr),
        BHI_mean = mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        BHI_median = median(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        PEA_mean = mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        PEA_median = median(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        Fold_Change = mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE),
        Log2_FC = log2(mean(pea_expr, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(bhi_expr, na.rm = TRUE)),
        Cohen_d = cohen_d,
        P_value = test_result$p.value,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

# 添加多重检验校正
if (nrow(comparison_results) > 0) {
  # 只对非NA的p值进行校正
  valid_p <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_value)
  comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH <- NA
  comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni <- NA
  
  if (sum(valid_p) > 0) {
    comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH[valid_p] <- p.adjust(comparison_results$P_value[valid_p], method = "BH")
    comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni[valid_p] <- p.adjust(comparison_results$P_value[valid_p], method = "bonferroni")
  }
  
  comparison_results$Significant_BH <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH) & comparison_results$P_adjusted_BH < 0.05
  comparison_results$Significant_bonferroni <- !is.na(comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni) & comparison_results$P_adjusted_bonferroni < 0.05
}

write.csv(comparison_results, 
          file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "Ccl5_group_comparison_detailed.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 2. 伪时序相关性分析（安全版本）
pseudotime_correlation <- data.frame()

for (ct in target_celltypes) {
  for (grp in c("BHI", "PEA")) {
    subset_data <- pseudotime_data %>%
      filter(refined_celltype == ct, group == grp)
    
    if (nrow(subset_data) > 3) {
      # 移除NA值
      clean_data <- subset_data %>%
        filter(!is.na(pseudotime), !is.na(Ccl5))
      
      if (nrow(clean_data) > 3) {
        # 尝试计算相关性
        spearman_result <- tryCatch({
          cor.test(clean_data$pseudotime, clean_data$Ccl5, method = "spearman")
        }, error = function(e) {
          list(estimate = NA, p.value = NA)
        })
        
        pearson_result <- tryCatch({
          cor.test(clean_data$pseudotime, clean_data$Ccl5, method = "pearson")
        }, error = function(e) {
          list(estimate = NA, p.value = NA)
        })
        
        pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
          refined_celltype = ct,
          group = grp,
          n_cells = nrow(clean_data),
          spearman_cor = as.numeric(spearman_result$estimate),
          pearson_cor = as.numeric(pearson_result$estimate),
          spearman_p = spearman_result$p.value,
          pearson_p = pearson_result$p.value,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      } else {
        pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
          refined_celltype = ct,
          group = grp,
          n_cells = nrow(clean_data),
          spearman_cor = NA,
          pearson_cor = NA,
          spearman_p = NA,
          pearson_p = NA,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    } else {
      pseudotime_correlation <- rbind(pseudotime_correlation, data.frame(
        refined_celltype = ct,
        group = grp,
        n_cells = nrow(subset_data),
        spearman_cor = NA,
        pearson_cor = NA,
        spearman_p = NA,
        pearson_p = NA,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

write.csv(pseudotime_correlation, 
          file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "Ccl5_pseudotime_correlation_detailed.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 3. 时间分布统计
time_distribution_stats <- pseudotime_data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_time = mean(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_time = sd(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_time = median(pseudotime, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1_time = quantile(pseudotime, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_time = quantile(pseudotime, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, 
              values_from = c(n, mean_time, sd_time, median_time, Q1_time, Q3_time))

write.csv(time_distribution_stats, 
          file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "pseudotime_distribution_stats.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# 4. 综合统计表
write.csv(comprehensive_stats, 
          file.path(Ccl5_output_dir, "Ccl5_expression_comprehensive_stats.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# =============================================================================
# 最终总结报告
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== Ccl5表达分析完成（增强版）=====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

cat("分析总结:\n")
cat("----------\n")
cat(sprintf("总分析细胞数: %d\n", nrow(Ccl5_expr_target)))
cat(sprintf("- Epithelial_7: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(Ccl5_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7"),
            sum(Ccl5_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                Ccl5_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(Ccl5_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_7" & 
                Ccl5_expr_target$group == "PEA")))
cat(sprintf("- Epithelial_13: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(Ccl5_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13"),
            sum(Ccl5_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                Ccl5_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(Ccl5_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Epithelial_13" & 
                Ccl5_expr_target$group == "PEA")))
cat(sprintf("- Tuft_30: %d cells (BHI: %d, PEA: %d)\n", 
            sum(Ccl5_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30"),
            sum(Ccl5_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" & 
                Ccl5_expr_target$group == "BHI"),
            sum(Ccl5_expr_target$refined_celltype == "Tuft_30" & 
                Ccl5_expr_target$group == "PEA")))

cat("\n表达差异统计:\n")
cat("---------------\n")
# 格式化输出
if (nrow(comparison_results) > 0) {
  comparison_output <- comparison_results[, c("Cell_Type", "Log2_FC", "P_value", "P_adjusted_BH", "Significant_BH")]
  comparison_output$Log2_FC <- round(comparison_output$Log2_FC, 3)
  comparison_output$P_value <- round(comparison_output$P_value, 4)
  comparison_output$P_adjusted_BH <- round(comparison_output$P_adjusted_BH, 4)
  print(comparison_output, row.names = FALSE)
} else {
  cat("No significant comparisons found.\n")
}

cat("\n伪时序相关性:\n")
cat("-------------\n")
# 过滤掉NA值并格式化输出
correlation_output <- pseudotime_correlation[, c("refined_celltype", "group", "n_cells", "spearman_cor", "spearman_p")]
correlation_output$spearman_cor <- round(correlation_output$spearman_cor, 3)
correlation_output$spearman_p <- round(correlation_output$spearman_p, 4)
print(correlation_output, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n生成的图表文件:\n")
cat("----------------\n")
cat("所有图表均提供PNG和PDF两种格式：\n")
cat("1. 01_Ccl5_expression_by_celltype_with_stats (.png/.pdf) - 细胞类型间表达比较（含显著性）\n")
cat("2. 02_Ccl5_expression_by_celltype_and_group_stats (.png/.pdf) - 各细胞类型内组间比较\n")
cat("3. 03_Ccl5_expression_density_enhanced (.png/.pdf) - 表达密度分布图\n")
cat("4. 04_Ccl5_pseudotime_overall_enhanced (.png/.pdf) - 伪时序总体表达趋势\n")
cat("5. 05_Ccl5_pseudotime_by_celltype_stats (.png/.pdf) - 各细胞类型伪时序表达（含统计）\n")
cat("6. 06_pseudotime_distribution_comparison (.png/.pdf) - 伪时间分布比较\n")
cat("7. 07_Ccl5_expression_heatmap (.png/.pdf) - 表达热图\n")
cat("8. 08_mean_expression_comparison (.png/.pdf) - 平均表达量比较\n")
cat("9. 09_fold_change_visualization (.png/.pdf) - 倍数变化可视化\n")
cat("10. 10_Ccl5_UMAP_expression_split (.png/.pdf) - UMAP表达分布\n")
cat("11. 11_celltype_UMAP_distribution (.png/.pdf) - UMAP细胞类型分布\n")

cat("\n数据文件:\n")
cat("---------\n")
cat("1. Ccl5_group_comparison_detailed.csv - 详细组间比较结果\n")
cat("2. Ccl5_pseudotime_correlation_detailed.csv - 伪时序相关性分析\n")
cat("3. pseudotime_distribution_stats.csv - 时间分布统计\n")
cat("4. Ccl5_expression_comprehensive_stats.csv - 综合表达统计\n")

cat("\n所有结果保存在:", Ccl5_output_dir, "\n")
cat("=====================================\n")
```
HSPA8（Hsc70）和HSP90AB1（Hsp90）作为重要分子伴侣，维持蛋白质稳态并参与伴侣介导自噬，在阿尔茨海默病等认知障碍疾病中下调或功能受损（Cuervo et al., 2004；Wang et al., 2017）。YWHAZ（14-3-3ζ）在神经发育、突触可塑性和路易小体形成中起作用，并在阿尔茨海默病患者的脑脊液中升高，与认知下降相关（Ubl et al., 2002；Lu et al., 2022）。ATP1A1和ATP1B1（Na⁺/K⁺-ATPase亚基）对维持神经元电位及突触传递至关重要，其缺陷可导致学习记忆障碍（Moseley et al., 2007）。S100A10（p11）通过调控神经递质受体影响情绪与认知过程，在抑郁及认知障碍中均有报道（Chen et al., 2022）。JAK2-STAT3信号在海马突触可塑性与认知行为中发挥调控作用，调节该通路可改善或损害学习记忆（Hong et al., 2020）。DUSP1在应激反应及MAPK信号中调控海马神经元，其表达变化与空间学习和记忆损伤相关（Shao et al., 2021）。RAP1B在前脑和海马中影响突触可塑性，缺失Rap1b会导致恐惧学习缺陷（Chen et al., 2020）。CCL5可促进海马能量代谢和突触形成，缺乏CCL5的动物表现出记忆障碍（Ajoy et al., 2021）。这些发现共同提示，这些基因通过调控蛋白质稳态、突触可塑性、神经炎症或能量代谢等多种途径对认知功能产生重要影响。

参考文献（APA格式）：

Ajoy, R., et al. (2021). CCL5 promotion of bioenergy metabolism is crucial for hippocampal function and memory. Molecular Psychiatry.

Chen, M. X., et al. (2022). S100A10 and its binding partners in depression: Implications for cognitive processes. Frontiers in Psychiatry.

Chen, W. B., et al. (2020). Rap1b but not Rap1a in the forebrain is required for learned fear. Cell & Bioscience, 10, 68.

Cuervo, A. M., Stefanis, L., Fredenburg, R., Lansbury, P. T., & Sulzer, D. (2004). Impaired degradation of mutant α-synuclein by chaperone-mediated autophagy. Science, 305(5688), 1292–1295. https://doi.org/10.1126/science.1101738

Hong, X. Y., et al. (2020). STAT3 ameliorates cognitive deficits by positively regulating synaptic plasticity. Signal Transduction and Targeted Therapy.

Lu, Y., et al. (2022). Early increase of cerebrospinal fluid 14-3-3ζ protein in Alzheimer’s disease and its correlation with cognitive decline. Frontiers in Aging Neuroscience.

Moseley, A. E., et al. (2007). Deficiency in Na,K-ATPase α isoform genes alters spatial learning and hippocampal synaptic plasticity. The Journal of Neuroscience, 27(23), 616–624.

Shao, L. L., et al. (2021). DUSP1 regulates hippocampal damage and spatial learning impairment in epilepsy rats via MAPK pathway. Neuroscience Letters.

Ubl, A., Berg, D., Holzmann, C., Krüger, R., Berger, K., & Wüllner, U. (2002). 14-3-3 protein is a component of Lewy bodies in Parkinson’s disease. Annals of Neurology, 51(5), 693–700.

Wang, B., et al. (2017). A CNS-permeable Hsp90 inhibitor rescues synaptic deficits and improves cognition in Alzheimer’s models. The Journal of Neuroscience.
针对机器学习筛选＋手动筛选出来的基因进行分析
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 关键基因深度分析 - 探究10个核心基因在细胞状态转变中的关联性
# =============================================================================

library(Seurat)
library(monocle3)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(corrplot)
library(igraph)
library(GENIE3)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(dynamicTreeCut)
library(factoextra)

# 设置工作目录
setwd("F:/projectmanfei/final")
input_dir <- "enhanced_trajectory_analysis"
output_dir <- "key_genes_association_analysis"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：加载数据和提取关键基因表达
# =============================================================================
cat("=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤1：提取关键基因表达数据 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 定义关键基因
key_genes <- c("Hspa8", "Hsp90ab1", "Ywhaz", "Atp1a1", "Atp1b1", 
               "S100a10", "Jak2", "Dusp1", "Rap1b", "Ccl5")

# 加载轨迹数据
trajectory_data <- read.csv(file.path(input_dir, "comprehensive_trajectory_data.csv"))
seurat_obj <- readRDS("module_score_analysis/seurat_with_module_scores.rds")

# 筛选目标细胞
target_cells <- c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
cells_subset <- trajectory_data %>%
  filter(refined_celltype %in% target_cells)

# 提取关键基因的表达矩阵
key_genes_expr <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj, slot = "data")[key_genes, cells_subset$cell_id]
key_genes_expr_df <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(key_genes_expr)))
key_genes_expr_df$cell_id <- rownames(key_genes_expr_df)

# 合并伪时间和细胞类型信息
key_genes_data <- merge(cells_subset, key_genes_expr_df, by = "cell_id")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤2：基因间相关性网络分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤2：基因间相关性网络分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 计算基因间的相关性
gene_cor_matrix <- cor(key_genes_data[, key_genes], method = "spearman")

# 分别计算每种细胞类型和治疗组的相关性
correlation_by_group <- function(data, genes, group_col, group_val) {
  subset_data <- data[data[[group_col]] == group_val, genes]
  if (nrow(subset_data) > 10) {
    return(cor(subset_data, method = "spearman"))
  }
  return(NULL)
}

# 按细胞类型计算相关性
cor_matrices <- list()
for (ct in target_cells) {
  cor_matrices[[ct]] <- correlation_by_group(key_genes_data, key_genes, "refined_celltype", ct)
}

# 按治疗组计算相关性
for (grp in c("BHI", "PEA")) {
  cor_matrices[[grp]] <- correlation_by_group(key_genes_data, key_genes, "group", grp)
}

# 可视化相关性热图
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "01_gene_correlation_networks.pdf"), width = 15, height = 10)
par(mfrow = c(2, 3))
for (name in names(cor_matrices)) {
  if (!is.null(cor_matrices[[name]])) {
    corrplot(cor_matrices[[name]], method = "color", type = "upper",
             order = "hclust", tl.cex = 0.8, tl.col = "black",
             title = paste("Gene Correlation -", name),
             mar = c(0,0,2,0))
  }
}
dev.off()

# 识别强相关基因对（|r| > 0.6）
strong_correlations <- which(abs(gene_cor_matrix) > 0.6 & gene_cor_matrix != 1, arr.ind = TRUE)
strong_cor_df <- data.frame(
  Gene1 = rownames(gene_cor_matrix)[strong_correlations[,1]],
  Gene2 = colnames(gene_cor_matrix)[strong_correlations[,2]],
  Correlation = gene_cor_matrix[strong_correlations],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
strong_cor_df <- strong_cor_df[!duplicated(paste(pmin(strong_cor_df$Gene1, strong_cor_df$Gene2),
                                                  pmax(strong_cor_df$Gene1, strong_cor_df$Gene2))), ]
write.csv(strong_cor_df, file.path(output_dir, "strong_gene_correlations.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤3：伪时序动态表达模式聚类（修复版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤3：伪时序动态表达模式聚类 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 将伪时间分成20个bin
n_bins <- 20
key_genes_data$pseudotime_bin <- cut(key_genes_data$pseudotime, breaks = n_bins, labels = FALSE)

# 计算每个bin的平均表达
expression_dynamics <- key_genes_data %>%
  group_by(pseudotime_bin) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(key_genes), mean, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = 'drop')

# 检查实际的bin数量（可能少于20个）
actual_bins <- nrow(expression_dynamics)
cat(sprintf("实际的时间区间数: %d\n", actual_bins))

# 标准化表达矩阵用于聚类
expr_matrix <- as.matrix(expression_dynamics[, key_genes])
expr_matrix_scaled <- scale(t(expr_matrix))  # 基因为行，时间点为列

# 检查矩阵维度
cat(sprintf("缩放后矩阵维度: %d 行（基因）× %d 列（时间点）\n", 
            nrow(expr_matrix_scaled), ncol(expr_matrix_scaled)))

# 层次聚类识别表达模式
dist_matrix <- dist(expr_matrix_scaled, method = "euclidean")
hclust_result <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "ward.D2")

# 动态切割树识别聚类
clusters <- cutreeDynamic(hclust_result, distM = as.matrix(dist_matrix),
                          minClusterSize = 2, method = "tree")

# 如果所有基因被分到同一个聚类，手动分割
if(length(unique(clusters)) == 1) {
  clusters <- cutree(hclust_result, k = min(3, length(key_genes)))
}

# 创建聚类热图
cluster_colors <- rainbow(max(clusters))
names(cluster_colors) <- as.character(1:max(clusters))

# 创建伪时间注释（使用实际的时间点数）
time_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Pseudotime = 1:ncol(expr_matrix_scaled),  # 使用实际列数
  col = list(Pseudotime = colorRamp2(c(1, ncol(expr_matrix_scaled)), 
                                     c("white", "darkred")))
)

# 创建基因聚类注释
gene_annotation <- rowAnnotation(
  Cluster = as.character(clusters),
  col = list(Cluster = cluster_colors)
)

# 绘制动态表达热图
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "02_dynamic_expression_patterns.pdf"), width = 12, height = 8)
Heatmap(expr_matrix_scaled,
        name = "Scaled\nExpression",
        cluster_rows = hclust_result,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
        top_annotation = time_annotation,
        left_annotation = gene_annotation,
        column_title = "Pseudotime Progression",
        row_title = "Key Genes",
        column_names_rot = 45)
dev.off()

# PNG版本（备选）
png(file.path(output_dir, "02_dynamic_expression_patterns.png"), 
    width = 12*100, height = 8*100, res = 100)
Heatmap(expr_matrix_scaled,
        name = "Scaled\nExpression",
        cluster_rows = hclust_result,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
        top_annotation = time_annotation,
        left_annotation = gene_annotation,
        column_title = "Pseudotime Progression",
        row_title = "Key Genes",
        column_names_rot = 45)
dev.off()

# 保存聚类结果
gene_clusters <- data.frame(
  Gene = names(clusters),
  Cluster = clusters,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
write.csv(gene_clusters, file.path(output_dir, "gene_expression_clusters.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

cat(sprintf("基因被分为 %d 个聚类\n", max(clusters)))

# 打印每个聚类包含的基因
for(i in 1:max(clusters)) {
  genes_in_cluster <- gene_clusters$Gene[gene_clusters$Cluster == i]
  cat(sprintf("聚类 %d: %s\n", i, paste(genes_in_cluster, collapse = ", ")))
}

# =============================================================================
# 步骤4：基因调控网络推断（igraph 2.1.4兼容版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤4：基因调控网络推断 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 使用GENIE3推断基因调控网络
expr_for_genie3 <- as.matrix(key_genes_data[, key_genes])
set.seed(123)

cat("正在推断基因调控网络（可能需要几分钟）...\n")
weight_matrix <- GENIE3(t(expr_for_genie3), nCores = 1, verbose = FALSE)

# 提取top调控关系
link_list <- getLinkList(weight_matrix, threshold = 0.1)
colnames(link_list) <- c("Regulator", "Target", "Weight")

# 如果阈值太高，降低重试
if(nrow(link_list) == 0) {
  cat("警告：阈值0.1太高，降低至0.05重试...\n")
  link_list <- getLinkList(weight_matrix, threshold = 0.05)
  colnames(link_list) <- c("Regulator", "Target", "Weight")
}

# 如果还是没有，再降低
if(nrow(link_list) == 0) {
  cat("警告：阈值0.05仍太高，降低至0.01重试...\n")
  link_list <- getLinkList(weight_matrix, threshold = 0.01)
  colnames(link_list) <- c("Regulator", "Target", "Weight")
}

if(nrow(link_list) > 0) {
  # 构建网络图
  g <- graph_from_data_frame(link_list[1:min(50, nrow(link_list)), ], directed = TRUE)
  
  # 获取所有节点名称
  vertex_names <- V(g)$name
  n_vertices <- length(vertex_names)
  
  # 使用邻接矩阵计算所有度指标
  adj_matrix <- as.matrix(as_adjacency_matrix(g, sparse = FALSE))
  
  # 手动计算度
  degree_in <- colSums(adj_matrix)  # 入度
  degree_out <- rowSums(adj_matrix)  # 出度
  degree_total <- degree_in + degree_out  # 总度
  
  # 设置名称
  names(degree_in) <- vertex_names
  names(degree_out) <- vertex_names
  names(degree_total) <- vertex_names
  
  # 计算介数中心性（这个函数通常兼容）
  betweenness_vals <- tryCatch({
    betweenness(g)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("介数中心性计算失败，使用0填充\n")
    rep(0, n_vertices)
  })
  names(betweenness_vals) <- vertex_names
  
  # 计算简化的Hub Score（基于出度）
  hub_scores <- if(max(degree_out) > 0) {
    degree_out / max(degree_out)
  } else {
    rep(0.5, n_vertices)
  }
  names(hub_scores) <- vertex_names
  
  # 创建网络统计数据框
  network_stats <- data.frame(
    Gene = vertex_names,
    Total_Degree = degree_total[vertex_names],
    In_Degree = degree_in[vertex_names],
    Out_Degree = degree_out[vertex_names],
    Betweenness = betweenness_vals[vertex_names],
    Hub_Score = hub_scores[vertex_names],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # 处理NA值
  network_stats[is.na(network_stats)] <- 0
  
  # 保存统计结果
  write.csv(network_stats, file.path(output_dir, "gene_network_statistics.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  
  # 可视化网络
  pdf(file.path(output_dir, "03_gene_regulatory_network.pdf"), width = 10, height = 10)
  
  # 设置布局
  set.seed(123)
  layout_coords <- layout_with_fr(g)
  
  # 设置节点颜色（基于聚类）
  if(exists("gene_clusters") && !is.null(gene_clusters)) {
    # 匹配基因和聚类
    node_cluster_ids <- numeric(length(vertex_names))
    for(i in 1:length(vertex_names)) {
      match_idx <- which(gene_clusters$Gene == vertex_names[i])
      if(length(match_idx) > 0) {
        node_cluster_ids[i] <- gene_clusters$Cluster[match_idx[1]]
      } else {
        node_cluster_ids[i] <- 0  # 默认聚类
      }
    }
  } else {
    node_cluster_ids <- rep(1, length(vertex_names))
  }
  
  # 设置颜色调色板
  n_colors <- max(node_cluster_ids) + 1
  color_palette <- rainbow(n_colors)
  node_colors <- color_palette[node_cluster_ids + 1]
  
  # 计算节点大小
  max_hub <- max(hub_scores, na.rm = TRUE)
  if(is.finite(max_hub) && max_hub > 0) {
    node_sizes <- 10 + 20 * (hub_scores / max_hub)
  } else {
    node_sizes <- rep(15, length(vertex_names))
  }
  
  # 绘制网络
  plot(g, 
       vertex.size = node_sizes,
       vertex.color = node_colors,
       vertex.label = vertex_names,
       vertex.label.cex = 0.8,
       vertex.label.color = "black",
       vertex.label.dist = 0.5,
       edge.arrow.size = 0.3,
       edge.width = E(g)$Weight * 3,
       edge.color = rgb(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5),
       layout = layout_coords,
       main = "Inferred Gene Regulatory Network\n(PEA Disease Model)")
  
  # 添加图例
  if(length(unique(node_cluster_ids)) > 1) {
    legend("topright", 
           legend = paste("Cluster", sort(unique(node_cluster_ids))),
           col = color_palette[sort(unique(node_cluster_ids)) + 1], 
           pch = 19, 
           cex = 0.7,
           bty = "n",
           title = "Gene Clusters")
  }
  
  dev.off()
  
  # 输出详细统计
  cat("\n=== 网络统计 ===\n")
  cat(sprintf("网络节点数: %d\n", vcount(g)))
  cat(sprintf("网络边数: %d\n", ecount(g)))
  cat(sprintf("网络密度: %.3f\n", edge_density(g)))
  
  # 前3个调控基因
  top_regulators <- network_stats[order(network_stats$Out_Degree, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\n前3个调控基因（调控其他基因最多）:\n")
  for(i in 1:min(3, nrow(top_regulators))) {
    if(top_regulators$Out_Degree[i] > 0) {
      cat(sprintf("  %s: 调控 %d 个基因\n", 
                  top_regulators$Gene[i], 
                  top_regulators$Out_Degree[i]))
    }
  }
  
  # 前3个靶基因
  top_targets <- network_stats[order(network_stats$In_Degree, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\n前3个靶基因（被调控最多）:\n")
  for(i in 1:min(3, nrow(top_targets))) {
    if(top_targets$In_Degree[i] > 0) {
      cat(sprintf("  %s: 被 %d 个基因调控\n", 
                  top_targets$Gene[i], 
                  top_targets$In_Degree[i]))
    }
  }
  
  # Hub基因
  top_hubs <- network_stats[order(network_stats$Hub_Score, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  cat("\n前3个Hub基因（网络中心节点）:\n")
  for(i in 1:min(3, nrow(top_hubs))) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: Hub Score = %.3f\n", 
                top_hubs$Gene[i], 
                top_hubs$Hub_Score[i]))
  }
  
  # 输出具体的调控关系示例
  cat("\n前5个最强的调控关系:\n")
  top_links <- head(link_list[order(link_list$Weight, decreasing = TRUE), ], 5)
  for(i in 1:nrow(top_links)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s → %s (权重: %.3f)\n", 
                top_links$Regulator[i], 
                top_links$Target[i], 
                top_links$Weight[i]))
  }
  
} else {
  cat("警告：没有找到显著的调控关系\n")
  cat("这可能因为：\n")
  cat("1. 基因间相关性较弱\n")
  cat("2. 样本量不足\n")
  cat("3. 需要调整GENIE3参数\n")
  
  # 创建空统计文件
  network_stats <- data.frame(
    Gene = key_genes,
    Total_Degree = 0,
    In_Degree = 0,
    Out_Degree = 0,
    Betweenness = 0,
    Hub_Score = 0,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  write.csv(network_stats, file.path(output_dir, "gene_network_statistics.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\n基因调控网络分析完成\n")
# =============================================================================
# 步骤5：细胞状态转换点分析
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤5：细胞状态转换点分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 计算基因表达的变化率
calculate_expression_velocity <- function(data, gene, window = 5) {
  data <- data[order(data$pseudotime), ]
  expr <- data[[gene]]
  velocity <- numeric(length(expr))
  
  for (i in 1:length(expr)) {
    start_idx <- max(1, i - window)
    end_idx <- min(length(expr), i + window)
    
    if (end_idx > start_idx) {
      time_window <- data$pseudotime[start_idx:end_idx]
      expr_window <- expr[start_idx:end_idx]
      
      if (length(unique(time_window)) > 1) {
        fit <- lm(expr_window ~ time_window)
        velocity[i] <- coef(fit)[2]  # 斜率
      }
    }
  }
  return(velocity)
}

# 计算每个基因的表达速度
cat("计算各基因的表达速度...\n")
for (gene in key_genes) {
  key_genes_data[[paste0(gene, "_velocity")]] <- calculate_expression_velocity(key_genes_data, gene)
}

# 识别转换点（速度变化最大的点）
velocity_cols <- paste0(key_genes, "_velocity")

# 确保这些列存在
existing_velocity_cols <- velocity_cols[velocity_cols %in% colnames(key_genes_data)]

if(length(existing_velocity_cols) > 0) {
  # 提取速度矩阵
  velocity_matrix <- as.matrix(key_genes_data[, existing_velocity_cols])
  
  # 计算总速度变化（所有基因速度的绝对值之和）
  key_genes_data$total_velocity_change <- rowSums(abs(velocity_matrix), na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 找出前10%的转换点
  threshold <- quantile(key_genes_data$total_velocity_change, 0.9, na.rm = TRUE)
  transition_points <- key_genes_data[key_genes_data$total_velocity_change > threshold, ]
  
  cat(sprintf("识别了 %d 个潜在的转换点（前10%%）\n", nrow(transition_points)))
  
  # 可视化转换点
  p_transition <- ggplot(key_genes_data, aes(x = pseudotime, y = total_velocity_change)) +
    geom_line(alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(data = transition_points, 
               aes(x = pseudotime, y = total_velocity_change),  # 明确指定映射
               color = "red", size = 2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = threshold, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    facet_wrap(~refined_celltype, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(title = "Cell State Transition Points (PEA Disease Model)",
         subtitle = "Red points indicate top 10% expression velocity changes",
         x = "Pseudotime", y = "Total Expression Velocity") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))
  
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "04_transition_points.pdf"), p_transition, width = 12, height = 8)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "04_transition_points.png"), p_transition, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  
  # 识别各细胞类型的关键转换时间
  cat("\n各细胞类型的主要转换时间点:\n")
  for(ct in unique(key_genes_data$refined_celltype)) {
    ct_data <- key_genes_data[key_genes_data$refined_celltype == ct, ]
    ct_transitions <- transition_points[transition_points$refined_celltype == ct, ]
    if(nrow(ct_transitions) > 0) {
      mean_transition_time <- mean(ct_transitions$pseudotime)
      cat(sprintf("  %s: 平均转换时间 = %.2f (n=%d个转换点)\n", 
                  ct, mean_transition_time, nrow(ct_transitions)))
    }
  }
  
  # 分析转换点的基因特征
  cat("\n转换点的基因表达特征:\n")
  
  # 找出在转换点变化最大的基因
  transition_gene_changes <- colMeans(abs(velocity_matrix[key_genes_data$total_velocity_change > threshold, ]), na.rm = TRUE)
  names(transition_gene_changes) <- gsub("_velocity$", "", names(transition_gene_changes))
  
  top_transition_genes <- sort(transition_gene_changes, decreasing = TRUE)
  cat("转换点变化最大的前3个基因:\n")
  for(i in 1:min(3, length(top_transition_genes))) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: 平均速度 = %.4f\n", 
                names(top_transition_genes)[i], 
                top_transition_genes[i]))
  }
  
  # 保存转换点数据
  write.csv(transition_points, 
            file.path(output_dir, "transition_points_data.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
} else {
  cat("警告：无法计算速度，跳过转换点分析\n")
  key_genes_data$total_velocity_change <- 0
  transition_points <- key_genes_data[1:10, ]  # 创建一个空的数据框结构
}

cat("转换点分析完成\n")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤6：基因功能模块分析（修复版）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤6：基因功能模块分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 基于相关性定义功能模块
# 使用层次聚类将基因分组
gene_dist <- as.dist(1 - abs(gene_cor_matrix))
gene_hclust <- hclust(gene_dist, method = "average")

# 尝试不同的高度切割，确保有合理的模块
gene_modules <- cutree(gene_hclust, h = 0.4)  # 相关性阈值0.6

# 检查模块数量
n_modules <- length(unique(gene_modules))
cat(sprintf("初始聚类得到 %d 个模块\n", n_modules))

# 如果所有基因都在一个模块中，强制分成更小的模块
if(n_modules < 2) {
  cat("模块数太少，调整聚类参数...\n")
  gene_modules <- cutree(gene_hclust, k = 3)  # 强制分成3个模块
  n_modules <- length(unique(gene_modules))
}

# 显示每个模块的基因
module_list <- split(names(gene_modules), gene_modules)
for(i in seq_along(module_list)) {
  cat(sprintf("模块 %d: %s\n", i, paste(module_list[[i]], collapse = ", ")))
}

# 为每个模块创建评分
module_created <- FALSE
for (i in seq_along(module_list)) {
  module_genes <- module_list[[i]]
  if (length(module_genes) > 1) {
    score_name <- paste0("Module_", i, "_score")
    key_genes_data[[score_name]] <- 
      rowMeans(key_genes_data[, module_genes, drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
    module_created <- TRUE
    cat(sprintf("创建了 %s (包含 %d 个基因)\n", score_name, length(module_genes)))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("模块 %d 只有1个基因，跳过评分创建\n", i))
  }
}

# 如果没有创建任何模块评分，创建一个总体评分
if (!module_created) {
  cat("没有多基因模块，创建总体评分和分组评分...\n")
  
  # 创建总体评分
  key_genes_data$Module_All_score <- 
    rowMeans(key_genes_data[, key_genes], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 根据功能创建手动分组
  # 组1：应激反应相关（Hspa8, Hsp90ab1）
  key_genes_data$Module_Stress_score <- 
    rowMeans(key_genes_data[, c("Hspa8", "Hsp90ab1"), drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 组2：ATP代谢相关（Atp1a1, Atp1b1）
  key_genes_data$Module_ATP_score <- 
    rowMeans(key_genes_data[, c("Atp1a1", "Atp1b1"), drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 组3：信号转导相关（Jak2, Dusp1, Rap1b）
  key_genes_data$Module_Signal_score <- 
    rowMeans(key_genes_data[, c("Jak2", "Dusp1", "Rap1b"), drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cat("创建了手动功能分组评分\n")
}

# 检查是否有模块评分列
module_cols <- grep("Module_.*_score$", colnames(key_genes_data), value = TRUE)

if(length(module_cols) > 0) {
  # 可视化模块动态
  module_scores <- key_genes_data %>%
    select(pseudotime, refined_celltype, group, all_of(module_cols)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(module_cols), 
                 names_to = "Module", 
                 values_to = "Score")
  
  # 清理模块名称
  module_scores$Module <- gsub("Module_", "", module_scores$Module)
  module_scores$Module <- gsub("_score$", "", module_scores$Module)
  
  p_modules <- ggplot(module_scores, aes(x = pseudotime, y = Score, color = refined_celltype)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~Module, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                                 "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                                 "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
    labs(title = "Functional Module Dynamics Along Pseudotime",
         subtitle = "Gene co-expression modules in PEA disease model",
         x = "Pseudotime", y = "Module Score",
         color = "Cell Type") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom")
  
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "05_module_dynamics.pdf"), p_modules, width = 12, height = 8)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "05_module_dynamics.png"), p_modules, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  
  # 分析各模块在不同组的差异
  cat("\n模块在PEA vs BHI的差异:\n")
  module_diff <- module_scores %>%
    group_by(Module, group) %>%
    summarise(mean_score = mean(Score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = mean_score) %>%
    mutate(diff_PEA_BHI = PEA - BHI)
  
  print(module_diff)
  
  # 保存模块评分数据
  write.csv(module_scores, 
            file.path(output_dir, "module_scores_data.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
} else {
  cat("警告：无法创建任何模块评分\n")
  
  # 创建单基因动态图作为替代
  cat("生成单基因动态图作为替代...\n")
  
  single_gene_scores <- key_genes_data %>%
    select(pseudotime, refined_celltype, group, all_of(key_genes)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(key_genes), 
                 names_to = "Gene", 
                 values_to = "Expression")
  
  p_single <- ggplot(single_gene_scores, aes(x = pseudotime, y = Expression, color = refined_celltype)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, size = 0.8) +
    facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Epithelial_7" = "#d03c3b", 
                                 "Epithelial_13" = "#933c30", 
                                 "Tuft_30" = "#009E74")) +
    labs(title = "Individual Gene Expression Dynamics",
         subtitle = "10 key genes in PEA disease model",
         x = "Pseudotime", y = "Expression Level",
         color = "Cell Type") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
          legend.position = "bottom")
  
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "05_gene_dynamics.pdf"), p_single, width = 12, height = 10)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "05_gene_dynamics.png"), p_single, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
}

cat("基因功能模块分析完成\n")
# =============================================================================
# 步骤7：主成分分析和轨迹投影
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤7：主成分分析和轨迹投影 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# PCA分析
pca_result <- prcomp(key_genes_data[, key_genes], scale. = TRUE)

# 添加PC到数据
key_genes_data$PC1 <- pca_result$x[, 1]
key_genes_data$PC2 <- pca_result$x[, 2]
key_genes_data$PC3 <- pca_result$x[, 3]

# 可视化PCA结果
p_pca <- ggplot(key_genes_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = pseudotime, shape = refined_celltype), size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(name = "Pseudotime") +
  labs(title = "PCA of Key Genes Expression",
       subtitle = "Colored by pseudotime, shaped by cell type") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "06_pca_projection.pdf"), p_pca, width = 10, height = 8)

# 基因载荷图
loadings <- as.data.frame(pca_result$rotation[, 1:2])
loadings$Gene <- rownames(loadings)

p_loadings <- ggplot(loadings, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = 0, yend = 0), arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Gene), vjust = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "Gene Loadings on Principal Components",
       x = paste0("PC1 (", round(summary(pca_result)$importance[2,1]*100, 1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(summary(pca_result)$importance[2,2]*100, 1), "%)")) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "07_gene_loadings.pdf"), p_loadings, width = 8, height = 8)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤8：治疗响应分析
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤8：治疗响应分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 计算PEA vs BHI的差异响应
treatment_response <- key_genes_data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, pseudotime_bin) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(key_genes), 
                  ~mean(.x[group == "PEA"], na.rm = TRUE) - mean(.x[group == "BHI"], na.rm = TRUE)),
           .groups = 'drop')

# 转换为长格式
treatment_response_long <- treatment_response %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(key_genes), 
               names_to = "Gene", 
               values_to = "Differential_Expression")

# 可视化治疗响应
p_treatment <- ggplot(treatment_response_long, 
                      aes(x = pseudotime_bin, y = Differential_Expression, color = Gene)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~refined_celltype, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = "Treatment Response Along Pseudotime (PEA - BHI)",
       x = "Pseudotime Bin", y = "Differential Expression") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "08_treatment_response.pdf"), p_treatment, width = 12, height = 8)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤9：综合报告生成
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤9：生成综合分析报告 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 创建综合报告
report <- list(
  "基因相关性分析" = list(
    "平均相关性" = mean(abs(gene_cor_matrix[upper.tri(gene_cor_matrix)])),
    "强相关对数" = nrow(strong_cor_df),
    "最强正相关" = strong_cor_df[which.max(strong_cor_df$Correlation), ],
    "最强负相关" = strong_cor_df[which.min(strong_cor_df$Correlation), ]
  ),
  "表达模式聚类" = list(
    "聚类数" = max(clusters),
    "各聚类基因" = module_list
  ),
  "网络分析" = list(
    "最高度中心性基因" = network_stats[which.max(network_stats$Degree), "Gene"],
    "最高介数中心性基因" = network_stats[which.max(network_stats$Betweenness), "Gene"],
    "Hub基因" = network_stats[network_stats$Hub_Score > 0.8, "Gene"]
  ),
  "PCA分析" = list(
    "PC1方差解释" = summary(pca_result)$importance[2,1],
    "PC2方差解释" = summary(pca_result)$importance[2,2],
    "累积方差解释" = summary(pca_result)$importance[3,2]
  )
)

# 保存报告
saveRDS(report, file.path(output_dir, "analysis_report.rds"))
write.csv(key_genes_data, file.path(output_dir, "integrated_gene_expression_data.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# 打印总结
cat("\n=== 分析完成总结 ===\n")
cat("1. 基因相关性网络：\n")
cat(sprintf("   - 识别了 %d 对强相关基因对（|r| > 0.6）\n", nrow(strong_cor_df)))
cat(sprintf("   - 平均相关性：%.3f\n", report$基因相关性分析$平均相关性))

cat("\n2. 表达模式：\n")
cat(sprintf("   - 基因被分为 %d 个共表达聚类\n", max(clusters)))

cat("\n3. 调控网络：\n")
cat(sprintf("   - Hub基因：%s\n", paste(report$网络分析$Hub基因, collapse = ", ")))

cat("\n4. 主成分分析：\n")
cat(sprintf("   - 前两个主成分解释了 %.1f%% 的方差\n", report$PCA分析$累积方差解释 * 100))

cat("\n5. 转换点分析：\n")
cat(sprintf("   - 识别了 %d 个潜在的细胞状态转换点\n", nrow(transition_points)))

cat("\n所有结果已保存到：", output_dir, "\n")

# =============================================================================
# 步骤10：生成交互式网络（可选）
# =============================================================================
cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 步骤10：生成总结性可视化 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 创建综合热图显示所有关键信息
# 准备数据
heatmap_data <- key_genes_data %>%
  group_by(refined_celltype, pseudotime_bin) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(key_genes), mean, na.rm = TRUE),
           .groups = 'drop')

# 创建矩阵
heatmap_matrix <- as.matrix(heatmap_data[, key_genes])
rownames(heatmap_matrix) <- paste(heatmap_data$refined_celltype, 
                                  heatmap_data$pseudotime_bin, sep = "_")

# 创建注释
row_split <- factor(heatmap_data$refined_celltype, 
                   levels = c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30"))

# 生成综合热图
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "09_integrated_heatmap.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
Heatmap(t(scale(heatmap_matrix)),
        name = "Z-score",
        column_split = row_split,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        column_title = "Cell Type and Pseudotime Progression",
        row_title = "Key Genes",
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
        col = colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("blue", "white", "red")))
dev.off()

cat("\n所有分析完成！共生成9个主要图表和多个数据文件。\n")
```
PDF图表解读指南
01_gene_correlation_networks.pdf - 基因相关性网络图

横纵轴：10个关键基因的名称矩阵
颜色强度：Spearman相关系数（-1到1），蓝色=负相关，红色=正相关
生物学意义：揭示基因间的协同或拮抗关系。强正相关的基因对可能参与同一生物学过程或受相同调控机制控制；负相关可能提示功能拮抗或反馈调节。分别展示了每个细胞类型(Epi_7, Epi_13, Tuft_30)和处理组(BHI对照, PEA疾病)中的相关性模式差异。

02_dynamic_expression_patterns.pdf - 动态表达模式热图

横轴：20个伪时间区间（从早期到晚期的细胞分化进程）
纵轴：10个关键基因
颜色：标准化后的表达水平（Z-score），蓝色=低表达，红色=高表达
生物学意义：展示基因表达随细胞分化/状态转变的动态变化。相似表达模式的基因被聚类在一起（左侧Cluster标注），提示它们可能受共同调控或参与相同的生物学过程。

03_gene_regulatory_network.pdf - 基因调控网络图

节点：10个关键基因，大小代表Hub得分（枢纽重要性）
边：推断的调控关系，箭头指向被调控基因，线宽代表调控强度
颜色：基因所属的表达模式聚类
生物学意义：展示潜在的基因间调控关系。Hub基因（节点较大）可能是关键调控因子，在PEA疾病状态下协调其他基因的表达。

04_transition_points.pdf - 细胞状态转换点图

横轴：伪时间（细胞分化进程）
纵轴：总表达速度（所有基因表达变化率的总和）
红点：识别的转换点（表达剧烈变化的时刻）
生物学意义：高表达速度点代表细胞正在经历状态转变的关键时刻。这些转换点可能对应细胞命运决定或对PEA疾病刺激的响应节点。

05_module_dynamics.pdf - 功能模块动态图

横轴：伪时间
纵轴：模块评分（相关基因的平均表达）
颜色：细胞类型（Epi_7红色, Epi_13褐色, Tuft_30绿色）
生物学意义：将协同表达的基因分组为功能模块，展示这些模块在不同细胞类型中的活性变化。模块上升可能代表相关生物学功能的激活。

06_pca_projection.pdf - 主成分分析投影图

横轴：PC1（第一主成分，解释最大方差的基因表达组合）
纵轴：PC2（第二主成分）
颜色：伪时间（从早期紫色到晚期黄色）
形状：细胞类型
生物学意义：将10维基因表达空间降至2维可视化。如果点沿着某个方向呈现颜色渐变，说明基因表达变化与细胞分化进程高度相关。不同细胞类型的分离程度反映其基因表达差异。

07_gene_loadings.pdf - 基因载荷图

横轴：PC1载荷（基因对第一主成分的贡献）
纵轴：PC2载荷（基因对第二主成分的贡献）
箭头：从原点指向基因位置，长度代表重要性
生物学意义：揭示哪些基因是区分细胞状态的主要驱动因素。同方向的基因表达模式相似，反方向的基因表达相反。远离原点的基因对细胞异质性贡献更大。

08_treatment_response.pdf - 治疗响应分析图

横轴：伪时间区间（1-20）
纵轴：差异表达（PEA疾病组 - BHI对照组）
颜色：不同基因
分面：三种细胞类型
生物学意义：量化PEA疾病处理对每个基因在不同分化阶段的影响。正值表示基因在PEA中上调（可能参与疾病响应），负值表示下调（可能被疾病抑制）。不同细胞类型的响应模式差异提示细胞特异性的疾病机制。

09_integrated_heatmap.pdf - 综合表达热图

横轴：细胞类型_伪时间区间的组合
纵轴：10个关键基因
颜色：Z-score标准化表达（蓝色=低，白色=中等，红色=高）
垂直分隔：按细胞类型分组
生物学意义：全景展示10个关键基因在三种细胞类型整个分化轨迹上的表达动态。可以直观看出：

哪些基因在Tuft_30中特异性高表达（可能是Tuft细胞标志）
哪些基因表达模式在Epi_7→Epi_13→Tuft_30转变中逐渐改变
PEA疾病状态如何重塑这些表达模式
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# 补充分析：Maoa基因在目标细胞群体的表达分析（增强版）
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=====================================\n")
cat("===== 补充分析：Maoa基因表达分析 =====\n")
cat("=====================================\n\n")

# 创建输出目录
Maoa_output_dir <- "Maoa_expression_analysis_enhanced"
if (!dir.exists(Maoa_output_dir)) {
  dir.create(Maoa_output_dir)
}

# 加载必要的包
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(monocle3)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)

# =============================================================================
# 步骤1：加载数据并提取Maoa表达信息
# =============================================================================
cat("步骤1：加载数据并提取Maoa表达信息...\n")

# 加载纯净数据集
seurat_pure <- readRDS(file.path("stage0_preprocessing_results", "seurat_pure_annotated.rds"))

# 检查Maoa基因是否存在
if (!"Maoa" %in% rownames(seurat_pure)) {
  stop("Maoa基因不在数据集中")
}

# 提取Maoa表达数据
Maoa_expr <- FetchData(seurat_pure, vars = c("Maoa", "refined_celltype", "group"))

# 筛选目标细胞类型
target_celltypes <- c("Epithelial_7", "Epithelial_13", "Tuft_30")
Maoa_expr_target <- Maoa_expr %>%
  filter(refined_celltype %in% target_celltypes)
```
